Applied to FY-4B AGRI infrared and GPM GMI microwave observations, PRISMA improves Critical Success Index by up to 40.3% and reduces root-mean-square error by 22.6% relative to infrared-only estimation within microwave swaths, while also improving probabilistic skill and maintaining an average inference time of about 37 s. Independent rain-gauge validation across China confirms consistent gains, and typhoon case studies show that microwave conditioning restores eyewall and spiral rainband structures, reducing storm-core mean absolute error by up to 42.3%. PRISMA thus provides an extensible and efficient framework for multi-sensor precipitation estimation.

</details>


### [393] [Quantifying Cyber-Vulnerability in Power Electronics Systems via an Impedance-Based Attack Reachable Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14502)
*Hongwei Zhen,Ze Yu,Xin Xiang,Wuhua Li,Mingyang Sun*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于阻抗的攻击可达域（ARD）框架，通过阻抗重塑将对抗性动作映射到关键特征值迁移，并定义了攻击穿透指数（API）来量化电力电子系统中节点级的网络脆弱性，同时针对模型不可用场景设计了灰盒工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力电子系统面临日益增长的网络安全威胁，但缺乏一个从攻击者视角出发、能在权限受限动作空间内量化节点可被推向不稳定程度的指标。

Method: 提出阻抗基攻击可达域（ARD）框架，将可行对抗动作通过阻抗重塑映射到关键特征值迁移；基于ARD定义攻击穿透指数（API），联合表征标称稳定裕度的穿透性和权限受限动作空间内成功实施失稳攻击的可及性；针对逆变器模型不可用情况，集成阻抗辨识与可微代理工具构建灰盒工作流。

Result: 在4节点系统和改进的IEEE 39节点系统上的案例研究表明：跨层协同操控比单一层攻击的危害显著更大；所提指标能揭示电网强度指标无法反映的脆弱性模式。

Conclusion: 本文提出的ARD框架和API指标能有效量化电力电子系统的节点级网络脆弱性，揭示了跨层攻击的协同危害性，且能发现传统电网强度指标无法捕捉的脆弱性模式。

Abstract: Power electronics systems are increasingly exposed to cyber threats due to their integration with digital controllers and communication networks. However, an attacker-oriented metric is still lacking to quantify the extent to which a node can be pushed toward instability within a privilege-constrained action space. This letter proposes an impedance-based Attack Reachable Domain (ARD) framework that maps feasible adversarial actions to critical-eigenvalue migration through impedance reshaping. Based on the ARD, an Attack Penetration Index is defined to quantify node-level cyber-vulnerability by jointly characterizing the penetration of the nominal stability margin and the accessibility of successful destabilizing attacks within a privilege-constrained action space. To make the proposed assessment computable when inverter models are unavailable, a practical gray-box workflow is further established by integrating existing impedance identification and differentiable surrogate tools. Case studies on a 4-bus system and a modified IEEE 39-bus system show that coordinated cross-layer manipulations are markedly more damaging than isolated single-layer attacks, and that the proposed metric reveals vulnerability patterns that cannot be inferred from grid-strength indicators.

</details>


### [394] [Logging Policy Design for Off-Policy Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15108)
*Connor Douglas,Joel Persson,Foster Provost*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究如何设计日志策略（logging policy）以最小化离线策略评估（OPE）的误差，提出了一个统一的框架，刻画了奖励-覆盖率之间的权衡，并在目标策略和奖励分布已知、未知、部分已知三种信息状态下推导出最优日志策略，为企业在多个候选推荐系统中选择提供了理论指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线策略评估（OPE）在无需线上部署的情况下即可评估新策略（如推荐系统）的价值，但其精度高度依赖于收集数据的日志策略。现有研究缺乏对如何设计日志策略以最小化OPE误差的系统性指导，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 本文通过理论分析刻画了奖励与覆盖率之间的基本权衡（reward-coverage tradeoff），并提出了一个统一的日志策略设计框架。在三种信息状态下（目标策略和奖励分布已知、未知、部分已知）推导了最优日志策略的解析形式，并给出了在实际约束下的实用设计原则。

Result: 证明了存在奖励-覆盖率之间的基本权衡：将概率质量集中在高奖励动作上可降低方差，但可能遗漏目标策略可能采取的动作信号；在三种信息状态下分别推导出最优日志策略；给出了企业在操作约束下的实用设计原则。

Conclusion: 本文为离线策略评估中的数据收集策略设计提供了理论依据和可操作指导，强调了日志策略选择对OPE误差的重要影响，为企业在多个推荐系统中做出选择提供了最优策略。

Abstract: Off-policy evaluation (OPE) estimates the value of a target treatment policy (e.g., a recommender system) using data collected by a different logging policy. It enables high-stakes experimentation without live deployment, yet in practice accuracy depends heavily on the logging policy used to collect data for computing the estimate. We study how to design logging policies that minimize OPE error for given target policies. We characterize a fundamental reward-coverage tradeoff: concentrating probability mass on high-reward actions reduces variance but risks missing signal on actions the target policy may take. We propose a unifying framework for logging policy design and derive optimal policies in canonical informational regimes where the target policy and reward distribution are (i) known, (ii) unknown, and (iii) partially known through priors or noisy estimates at logging time. Our results provide actionable guidance for firms choosing among multiple candidate recommendation systems. We demonstrate the importance of treatment selection when gathering data for OPE, and describe theoretically optimal approaches when this is a firm's primary objective. We also distill practical design principles for selecting logging policies when operational constraints prevent implementing the theoretical optimum.

</details>


### [395] [Understanding How International Students in the U.S. Are Using Conversational AI to Support Cross-Cultural Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15127)
*Laleh Nourian,Anisa Callis,Stephanie Patterson,Jadeline Miao,Jamison Heard,Garreth W. Tigwell*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文通过60人问卷调查和14人访谈，研究国际学生如何采用和看待AI作为支持工具，发现AI被视为应对即时挑战的"急救工具"，但用户希望将其转变为长期支持伙伴。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有支持体系分散，国际学生面临独特挑战，虽然生成式AI已被广泛使用，但缺乏对其作为支持工具的采用模式和理解。

Method: 混合研究方法：先进行n=60的问卷调查，再进行n=14的访谈研究，探究国际学生挑战与AI采用模式之间的关系及使用动机与边界。

Result: AI被视为处理即时挑战的急救工具；用户有兴趣将AI从短期帮助工具转变为长期支持伙伴；研究识别了AI提供长期支持的适用场景和不足之处。

Conclusion: 提出了针对国际学生独特需求的AI支持工具设计建议，支持从短期急救向长期陪伴的转变。

Abstract: Moving to a new culture and adapting to a new life, as an international student, can be a stressful experience. In the US, international students face unique overlapping challenges, yet the current support ecosystem, including university support systems and informal social networks, remains largely fragmented. While conversational AI has emerged as a tool used by many (e.g., generative AI chatbots like ChatGPT and Google Gemini), we do not have a clear understanding of how international students adopt and perceive these technologies as support tools. We conducted a survey study (n=60) to map the relationship between international students' challenges and AI adoption patterns, followed by an interview study with 14 participants to identify the underlying motivations and boundaries of use. Our findings show that AI is perceived as a first-aid tool for immediate challenges, however, there is an interest in transforming AI from a tool for short-term help into a long-term support companion. By identifying where and how AI can provide long-term support, and where it is insufficient, we contribute recommendations for creating AI-powered support tailored to the unique needs of international students.

</details>


### [396] [Semantic Feature Segmentation for Interpretable Predictive Maintenance in Complex Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14318)
*Emilio Mastriani,Alessandro Costa,Federico Incardona,Kevin Munari,Sebastiano Spinello*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种语义特征分割框架，将监测变量分解为"典型成分"（保留主要预测信息）和"残差成分"（包含外围信号），通过领域知识进行功能分组（如吞吐量、延迟、压力等），实验表明典型空间在预测风险上优于残差空间，且相比全特征空间和PCA能保持相当的预测性能并保留原始变量的语义可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂系统中监测变量存在异质性和冗余性，会掩盖故障相关信息并降低模型可解释性，现有方法（如PCA）虽能降维但牺牲了语义可解释性，不利于预测性维护的实际应用。

Method: 提出语义特征分割框架，基于领域先验知识将监测变量按功能分组（如吞吐量、延迟、压力等），形成典型成分和残差成分；以预测风险作为任务相关信息的代理指标，通过时间感知交叉验证评估分割效果。

Result: 典型空间在不同时间配置下预测风险始终低于残差空间；典型成分内部段间一致性显著强于段间依赖性，且在冗余消除后结构保持稳定；与全特征空间和PCA相比，典型空间预测性能相当，同时保留了原始变量的语义含义。

Conclusion: 语义特征分割提供了一种可解释且信息保持的监测信号分解方法，能在不牺牲操作可解释性的前提下实现有竞争力的预测性能，适用于预测性维护场景。

Abstract: Predictive maintenance in complex systems is often complicated by the heterogeneity and redundancy of monitored variables,which can obscure fault-relevant information and reduce model interpretability. This work proposes a semantic feature segmentation framework that decomposes the monitored feature space into a canonical component,expected to retain the dominant predictive information, and a residual component containing structurally peripheral signals. The segmentation is defined through domain informed criteria and sets up monitoring variables into functional groups reflecting operational mechanisms such as throughput,latency,pressure,network activity,and structural state. To evaluate the effectiveness of this decomposition, we adopt a predictive perspective in which expected predictive risk is used as an operational proxy for task-relevant information. Experimental results obtained through time-aware cross-validation show that the canonical space consistently achieves lower predictive risk than the residual space across multiple temporal configurations, indicating that the semantic segmentation concentrates the most relevant information for fault anticipation. In addition, the canonical segments exhibit significantly stronger intra-segment coherence than inter-segment dependence, and this structural organization remains stable after redundancy reduction. When compared with the full feature space and with a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) representation, the canonical space carries out comparable predictive performance and furthermore preserves the semantic meaning of the original variables. These findings suggest that semantic feature segmentation provides an interpretable and information-preserving decomposition of monitoring signals, enabling competitive predictive performance without sacrificing the operational interpretability required in predictive maintenance applications.

</details>


### [397] [Synthesizing POMDP Policies: Sampling Meets Model-checking via Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14440)
*Debraj Chakraborty,Anirban Majumdar,Prince Mathew,Sayan Mukherjee,Jean-François Raskin*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种融合采样、自动机学习和模型检验的POMDP综合框架，通过将采样作为成员资格预言、模型检验作为等价预言，为有限状态控制器综合提供形式化保证，并证明相对完备性。实验表明该方法能解决现有形式化工具难以处理的阈值安全问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: POMDP中基于采样的方法缺乏形式化正确性保证（不适合安全关键场景），而形式化综合方法面临可扩展性瓶颈（一般POMDP综合不可判定），需要一种兼顾两者优势的框架来桥接这一差距。

Method: 受Angluin L*算法启发，设计一个综合框架：将采样方法作为成员资格预言（提供近似行为），将模型检验作为等价预言（验证正确性），通过自动机学习迭代合成有限状态控制器，并要求采样诱导的策略是正则的以获得形式化保证。

Result: 原型实现能够成功解决现有形式化综合工具难以处理的阈值安全问题，验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该算法可以作为解决POMDP综合问题固有难度的组合方法中的重要组件，在形式化保证和可扩展性之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are the standard framework for decision-making under uncertainty. While sampling-based methods scale well, they lack formal correctness guarantees, making them unsuitable for safety-critical applications. Conversely, formal synthesis techniques provide correctness-by-construction but often struggle with scalability, as general POMDP synthesis is undecidable. To bridge this gap, we propose a synthesis framework that integrates sampling, automata learning, and model-checking. Inspired by Angluin's $L^*$ algorithm, our approach utilizes sampling as a membership oracle and model-checking as an equivalence oracle. This enables the synthesis of finite-state controllers with formal guarantees, provided the sampling-induced policy is regular. We establish a relative completeness result for this framework. Experimental results from our prototypical implementation demonstrate that this method successfully solves threshold-safety problems that remain challenging for existing formal synthesis tools. We believe our algorithm serves as a valuable component in a portfolio approach to tackling the inherent difficulty of POMDP synthesis problems.

</details>


### [398] [Fully Dynamic Rebalancing in Dockless Bike-Sharing Systems via Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14501)
*Edoardo Scarpel,Alberto Pettena,Matteo Cederle,Federico Chiariotti,Marco Fabris,Gian Antonio Susto*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的动态单车重新平衡方法，通过图模拟器和时空关键度分数指导单辆卡车实时执行借还和充电操作，在真实数据上显著降低了可用性故障并减少了空间不平等。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对无桩共享单车系统中传统周期性、全网干预式重新平衡方法的局限性，解决实时动态调度问题。

Method: 将服务建模为基于图的模拟器，将重新平衡问题转化为马尔可夫决策过程；DRL代理实时引导单辆卡车，根据时空关键度分数执行局部借还和充电动作。

Result: 在真实数据实验中，用最小车队规模显著降低了可用性故障，同时限制了空间不平等和"移动荒漠"现象。

Conclusion: 基于学习的重新平衡方法能有效提升共享微出行系统的效率和可靠性。

Abstract: This paper proposes a fully dynamic Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) method for rebalancing dockless bike-sharing systems, overcoming the limitations of periodic, system-wide interventions. We model the service through a graph-based simulator and cast rebalancing as a Markov decision process. A DRL agent routes a single truck in real time, executing localized pick-up, drop-off, and charging actions guided by spatiotemporal criticality scores. Experiments on real-world data show significant reductions in availability failures with a minimal fleet size, while limiting spatial inequality and mobility deserts. Our approach demonstrates the value of learning-based rebalancing for efficient and reliable shared micromobility.

</details>


### [399] [NeuroTrain: Surveying Local Learning Rules for Spiking Neural Networks with an Open Benchmarking Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15058)
*Alessio Caviglia,Filippo Marostica,Roberta Bardini,Alessandro Savino,Stefano Di Carlo*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种细粒度的脉冲神经网络（SNN）训练算法分类法，涵盖了代理梯度反向传播、局部/三因子学习规则、生物启发可塑性机制、ANN-to-SNN转换及非标准优化策略，并开源了基于snnTorch的统一可扩展框架NeuroTrain，用于标准化基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SNN训练算法日益增多且高度碎片化，缺乏统一的细粒度分类体系来系统化组织这些方法并厘清它们之间的概念关系。

Method: 提出一个综合性的SNN训练算法分类体系，覆盖五大类方法；分析每类方法的计算原理、学习信号和局部性；开发开源框架NeuroTrain实现代表性算法并进行统一基准测试。

Result: 建立了统一的分类法，发布了NeuroTrain开源框架，实现了跨数据集、架构和训练范式的一致 benchmarking。

Conclusion: 该工作整合了碎片化的文献，提供了可复用的基准测试框架，识别了SNN训练中的共性模式与开放挑战，指出了可扩展高效SNN训练的未来方向。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of spiking neural networks (SNNs) has led to a proliferation of training algorithms that differ widely in biological inspiration, computational structure, and hardware suitability. Despite this progress, the field lacks a unified, fine-grained taxonomy that systematically organizes these approaches and clarifies their conceptual relationships. This survey provides a comprehensive taxonomy of SNN training algorithms, spanning surrogate-gradient backpropagation, local and three-factor learning rules, biologically inspired plasticity mechanisms, ANN-to-SNN conversion pipelines, and non-standard optimization strategies. We analyze each class in terms of its computational principles, learning signals, and locality properties. To support reproducible research, we release NeuroTrain, an open-source snnTorch-based framework that implements a representative set of these algorithms within a unified, modular, and extendable framework, enabling consistent benchmarking across datasets, architectures, and training regimes. By consolidating fragmented literature and providing a reusable benchmarking framework, this survey identifies common patterns, highlights open challenges, and outlines promising directions for future work on scalable, efficient SNN training.

</details>


### [400] [PyCSP3-Scheduling: A Scheduling Extension for PyCSP3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14559)
*Sohaib Afifi*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 8.0

TL;DR: PyCSP$^3$ Scheduling 是一个扩展库，为 PyCSP$^3$ 添加了调度领域抽象（如区间变量、序列变量、资源函数等），通过 53 个专用约束和 27 个表达式编译为底层标准约束，保持建模与求解的分离。实验表明在 17 个模型家族的 261 对实例上，编译前后最优目标完全一致，但运行时性能因分解开销在不同家族上有显著差异（最高加速 5.8 倍，部分退化）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PyCSP$^3$ 缺乏对调度建模的原生支持（如区间变量、序列变量、资源函数），用户只能通过底层整数变量和手动通道约束来编码调度问题，开发效率低且易出错。

Method: 设计并实现 PyCSP$^3$ Scheduling 库，提供 53 个专用约束和 27 个表达式作为调度抽象接口，再通过编译方式将这些高层调度结构自动降级为标准 PyCSP$^3$/XCSP$^3$ 约束，保持建模与求解的完全分离。

Result: 在 17 个模型家族 261 对实例（各跑 5 次）上，编译前后所有 72 个双重可证明最优对的目标完全一致，近一半家族（8/17）的结构保持不变；运行时性能因家族而异，部分获得最高 5.8 倍加速，部分因编译分解开销出现退化。

Conclusion: PyCSP$^3$ Scheduling 成功以新增调度抽象的方式提升了调度问题建模的生产力，同时保证了建模与求解分离的核心理念；但编译分解的开斧需在性能和易用性之间进一步权衡优化。

Abstract: PyCSP$^3$ provides a productive way to build constraint models for solving combinatorial constrained problems and export them to XCSP$^3$, preserving a complete separation between modeling and solving. However, it lacks native support for scheduling abstractions such as interval variables, sequence variables, and resource functions. As a result, scheduling models must be encoded with low-level integer variables and manual channeling constraints, even though PyCSP$^3$ already provides global constraints like NoOverlap and Cumulative on integer arrays. We present PyCSP$^3$ Scheduling, a library that adds scheduling abstractions to PyCSP$^3$ through 53 dedicated constraints and 27 expressions, and compiles them down to standard PyCSP$^3$/XCSP$^3$ constraints, maintaining the modeling/solving separation that underpins the PyCSP$^3$ ecosystem. On 261 paired instances across 17 model families (5 runs each), both formulations produce identical objectives on all 72 doubly-proved optimal pairs and nearly half of the families (8/17) remain structurally unchanged after compilation; however, runtime performance diverges across families, with clear gains on some (up to 5.8x) and regressions on others due to the overhead of compilation decompositions. Code and benchmarks are available at: https://github.com/sohaibafifi/pycsp3-scheduling

</details>


### [401] [Agreement, Diversity, and Polarization Indices for Approval Elections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14983)
*Piotr Faliszewski,Jitka Mertlová,Krzysztof Sornat,Stanisław Szufa,Tomasz Wąs*

Main category: cs.GT

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文研究批准选举中用于衡量一致性、多样性和两极分化的指数，提出多种新指数并分析其性质，用于绘制选举图谱和比较真实选举数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有选举指数缺乏对"饱和效应"的归一化处理，导致不同规模选举间的比较失真，需要提出新的指数来更公平地衡量选举特征。

Method: 提出多个归一化指数（考虑饱和效应），分析其数学性质，并在Pabulib、Preflib等真实选举数据集上进行应用验证。

Result: 构建了新的批准选举图谱，揭示了不同真实选举数据集之间的相似性与差异性。

Conclusion: 所提指数能有效归一化饱和效应，为选举分析提供了更公平的比较工具。

Abstract: An index is a function that given an election outputs a value between 0 and 1, indicating the extent to which this election has a particular feature. We seek indices that capture agreement, diversity, and polarization among voters in approval elections, and that are normalized with respect to saturation. By the latter we mean that if two elections differ by the fraction of candidates approved by an average voter, but otherwise are of similar nature, then they should have similar index values. We propose several indices, analyze their properties, and use them to (a) derive a new map of approval elections, and (b) show similarities and differences between various real-life elections from Pabulib, Preflib and other sources.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [402] [Self-Pruned Key-Value Attention: Learning When to Write by Predicting Future Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14037)
*Gergely Szilvasy,Manuel Faysse,Maria Lomeli,Matthijs Douze,Pierre-Emmanuel Mazaré,Loïc Cabannes,Wen-tau Yih,Hervé Jégou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: SP-KV 通过训练一个轻量级效用预测器，动态评估每个键值对的未来效用，结合局部窗口机制实现 KV 缓存的自适应稀疏化，在保持性能的前提下将缓存大小压缩 3-10 倍，并揭示出可用于指导混合注意力架构设计的层/头特异性稀疏模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现代 transformer 架构中，随着序列长度增加，KV 缓存的内存占用和带宽成为文本生成效率的主要瓶颈，现有固定压缩比的方法无法自适应不同输入，因此需要一种动态、细粒度的 KV 缓存缩减机制。

Method: 提出 Self-Pruned Key-Value Attention (SP-KV)：1) 训练一个轻量级效用预测器为每个 KV 对打分；2) 近期 KV 始终通过局部窗口保留；3) 历史 KV 仅当预测效用超过阈值时才写入缓存并参与全局注意力；4) 与 LLM 端到端联合训练，仅使用下一个 token 预测损失。

Result: SP-KV 实现动态稀疏化，通常将 KV 缓存大小压缩 3-10 倍（长序列压缩比更高），大幅提升内存效率和解码速度，同时在验证损失和下游任务性能上几乎没有退化。此外，该方法揭示了结构化的层和头部特异性稀疏模式。

Conclusion: SP-KV 不仅是一种有效的 KV 缓存缩减机制，其揭示的稀疏模式还能指导设计更高效的混合局部-全局注意力架构，为 transformer 推理效率优化提供了新思路。

Abstract: Under modern test-time compute and agentic paradigms, language models process ever-longer sequences. Efficient text generation with transformer architectures is increasingly constrained by the Key-Value cache memory footprint and bandwidth. To address this limitation, we introduce Self-Pruned Key-Value Attention (SP-KV), a mechanism designed to predict future KV utility in order to reduce the size of the long-term KV cache. This strategy operates at a fine granularity: a lightweight utility predictor scores each key-value pair, and while recent KVs are always available via a local window, older pairs are written in the cache and used in global attention only if their predicted utility surpasses a given threshold. The LLM and the utility predictor are trained jointly end-to-end exclusively through next-token prediction loss, and are adapted from pretrained LLM checkpoints.
  Rather than enforcing a fixed compression ratio, SP-KV performs dynamic sparsification: the mechanism adapts to the input and typically reduces the KV cache size by a factor of $3$ to $10\times$, longer sequences often being more compressible. This leads to vast improvements in memory usage and decoding speed, with little to no degradation of validation loss nor performance on a broad set of downstream tasks. Beyond serving as an effective KV-cache reduction mechanism, our method reveals structured layer- and head-specific sparsity patterns that we can use to guide the design of hybrid local-global attention architectures.

</details>


### [403] [LLMs Know When They Know, but Do Not Act on It: A Metacognitive Harness for Test-time Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14186)
*Qi Cao,Yufan Wang,Peijia Qin,Shuhao Zhang,Pengtao Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于元认知理论的推理控制框架（Metacognitive Harness），通过让LLM在解题前后分别报告"预感"（FOK）和"后验判断"（JOL）信号，并将其作为显式控制接口来指导是否信任、重试或聚合答案，从而在不更新参数的情况下显著提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽然展现出一定的自我监控能力（如自信度估计），但这些信号通常只在隔离场景下被测量或激发，并未被用来实际控制推理过程。本文希望探索LLM是否具备潜在的元认知能力，并将其转化为有效的测试时控制手段。

Method: 受Nelson-Narens认知心理学理论启发，提出元认知控制框架：1）解题前模型报告"预感"（FOK）信号；2）每次解题尝试后报告"学习判断"（JOL）信号；3）将这些信号作为显式控制接口，决定何时信任当前答案、何时用元认知反馈进行重试、何时将多次尝试结果交给最终聚合器。

Result: 在文本、代码和多模态推理基准上，该方法在不更新参数的情况下显著提升了固定的Claude Sonnet-4.6模型性能。pooled准确率从48.3提升至56.9，在HLE-Verified、LiveCodeBench v6和R-Bench-V三个主要设定上超越了最强的公开排行榜条目。

Conclusion: 强LLM可能已经具备有用的元认知能力，但需要一个显式的控制框架来在推理过程中加以利用。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often expose useful signals of self-monitoring: before solving a problem, they can estimate whether they are likely to succeed, and after solving it, they can judge whether their answer is likely to be correct. However, these signals are typically measured or elicited in isolation, rather than used to control inference. In this work, we ask whether LLMs possess latent metacognitive ability that can be turned into effective test-time control. Inspired by the Nelson--Narens theory from cognitive psychology, we propose a metacognitive harness that separates monitoring from reasoning. For each problem, the model first reports a pre-solve feeling-of-knowing (FOK) signal; after each solve attempt, it reports a post-solve judgment-of-learning (JOL) signal. Rather than treating these signals as passive confidence estimates, the harness turns them into an explicit control interface for reasoning: it decides when to trust the current solution, when to retry with compact metacognitive feedback, and when to pass multiple attempts to a final aggregator. Across text, code, and multimodal reasoning benchmarks, our harness substantially improves a fixed Claude Sonnet-4.6 base model without parameter updates or benchmark-specific fine-tuning. On the evaluated public benchmark snapshots, it raises pooled accuracy from 48.3 to 56.9 and exceeds the strongest listed leaderboard entries on the three primary evaluation settings: HLE-Verified, LiveCodeBench v6, and R-Bench-V. These results suggest that strong LLMs may already possess useful metacognitive ability, but require an explicit control harness to act on it during reasoning.

</details>


### [404] [Test-Time Learning with an Evolving Library](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14477)
*Weijia Xu,Alessandro Sordoni,Chandan Singh,Zelalem Gero,Michel Galley,Xingdi Yuan,Jianfeng Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: EvoLib 是一种让 LLM 在测试时通过共享知识库积累和进化知识（无需参数更新或外部监督）的框架，在数学推理、代码生成和智能体任务上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的 LLM 推理方法在跨问题实例间缺乏知识积累和复用机制，每个问题独立处理，无法从历史经验中持续学习改进。

Method: 维护一个共享的知识抽象库（模块化技能+反思性见解），从模型自身推理轨迹中自动提取；引入加权和整合机制，联合优化即时效用与长期价值，使实例级抽象逐步进化为通用可复用的知识。

Result: 在数学推理、代码生成和多轮智能体环境等基准上，EvoLib 显著优于顶级测试时扩展和学习方法（无需真实反馈）。

Conclusion: 测试时知识积累与进化（而非参数更新）是提升 LLM 推理能力的有效范式，尤其在没有外部监督的场景下具有重要价值。

Abstract: We introduce EvoLib, a test-time learning framework that enables large language models to accumulate, reuse, and evolve knowledge across problem instances without parameter updates or external supervision. Instead of adapting model parameters, our approach maintains a shared library of knowledge abstractions, including modular skills and reflective insights, automatically extracted from the model's own inference trajectories. To support continual improvement, we introduce a principled weighting and consolidation mechanism that jointly optimizes for immediate utility and long-term value. This allows simple, instance-specific abstractions to evolve into more general and reusable ones over time. Across challenging benchmarks in mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multi-turn agentic environments, EvoLib improves substantially over the top test-time scaling and learning methods without ground-truth feedback.

</details>


### [405] [TFGN: Task-Free, Replay-Free Continual Pre-Training Without Catastrophic Forgetting at LLM Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15053)
*Anurup Ganguli*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为TFGN的架构覆盖层，通过输入条件化的参数高效更新，在不使用重放缓冲区、任务标签或正则化惩罚的情况下，解决了大语言模型在异构文本域上持续预训练时的灾难性遗忘问题。在6个异构领域、3种模型规模（约398M~9B）上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的持续预训练方法依赖重放缓冲区、任务标识符或正则化惩罚，这些方法在LLM规模下扩展性差，且仅在句子级别的分类任务上验证。亟需一种无需这些依赖的架构方案来解决LLM在异构文本域上的灾难性遗忘问题。

Method: 提出TFGN架构覆盖层：1) 核心是Read/Write分解——前向传播保持全密集计算，跨域参数更新被结构化以不写入先验领域子空间；2) 产生输入条件化的参数高效更新，其余Transformer保持不变；3) 扩展A：闭环元控制层（减少遗忘81%）；4) 扩展B：算子级计划向量（99.96%余弦保真度重塑前向行为）。

Result: 在LLaMA 3.1 8B Retrofit上实现后向迁移-0.007，HellaSwag保持率约0.506/0.504/0.510，域对间L2正交梯度分离≥99.59%；无需重放、任务ID或Fisher惩罚。正向迁移显著：LLaMA-8B Retrofit上仅通过Python训练使JavaScript困惑度下降26.8%，GPT-2 Medium From-Scratch下降62.0%。

Conclusion: TFGN是首个同时实现以下目标的架构：在LLM规模下关闭灾难性遗忘、实现闭环自主学习的元控制器、携带算子级潜在规划器。该方法为异构领域的持续预训练提供了无需重放/任务标签的可扩展解决方案。

Abstract: Continually pre-training a large language model on heterogeneous text domains, without replay or task labels, has remained an unsolved architectural problem at LLM scale. Existing methods rely on replay buffers, task identifiers, regularization penalties that scale poorly, or sentence-classification-scale evaluation.
  We introduce TFGN, an architectural overlay for transformer language models that produces input-conditioned, parameter-efficient updates while leaving the rest of the transformer unchanged. On six heterogeneous text domains (Prose, Python, Math, Biomedical, Chinese, JavaScript) at 1B tokens per phase across three model scales (~398M, ~739M, ~9B) and two regimes (From-Scratch and Retrofit), TFGN achieves backward transfer of -0.007 at LLaMA 3.1 8B Retrofit, HellaSwag retention 0.506/0.504/0.510, and >=99.59% L2-orthogonal gradient separation between domain pairs - with no replay, no task IDs, no Fisher penalty.
  The same matrices show positive cross-domain forward transfer: held-out JavaScript PPL drops 26.8% at LLaMA-8B Retrofit and 62.0% at GPT-2 Medium From-Scratch purely from Python training. Two extensions on the same substrate close further open problems. A closed-loop meta-control layer (Extension A) reduces forgetting by an additional 81% at ~398M, mapping onto the System A and System M roles of Dupoux et al. (arXiv:2603.15381). An operator-level plan vector (Extension B) reshapes forward-pass behavior at 99.96% cosine fidelity over 30 source->target pairs.
  The architectural insight is a Read/Write decomposition: the forward pass is fully dense, while cross-domain parameter updates are structured so prior-domain subspaces are not written to. To our knowledge, TFGN is the first architecture that simultaneously closes catastrophic forgetting at LLM scale, realizes a closed-loop autonomous-learning meta-controller, and carries an operator-level latent planner.

</details>


### [406] [When Answers Stray from Questions: Hallucination Detection via Question-Answer Orthogonal Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14449)
*Siyang Yao,Erhu Feng,Yubin Xia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文提出QAOD框架，通过对答案表示进行问题-答案正交分解，去除与问题相关的方向成分，从而抑制领域条件变化，实现高效且鲁棒的大模型幻觉检测。QAOD设计了联合探针（最大化域内判别性）和正交探针（保留域无关事实信号用于跨域泛化），在域内检测和跨域泛化上均达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑盒一致性检测方法虽有效但需重复推理，白盒探针方法高效却将答案表示孤立处理，导致领域迁移时性能急剧下降。需要一种既能高效运行又能抵抗分布偏移的幻觉检测方法。

Method: 提出QAOD框架：(1) 将答案表示投影到与问题正交的方向，抑制领域条件变化；(2) 通过多样性惩罚的Fisher评分选择层，通过Fisher重要性选择判别性神经元；(3) 设计两种互补探针策略：联合探针（正交分量+问题上下文）最大化域内判别性，正交探针（仅用正交分量）保留域无关事实信号用于跨域迁移。

Result: QAOD的联合探针在所有评估的模型-数据集对中取得最佳域内AUROC；正交探针在跨域OOD迁移中表现最强，在BioASQ上超越最佳白盒基线21%，且生成成本不到其25%。

Conclusion: 通过问题-答案正交分解，QAOD在单次前向传播中同时实现了高效的域内幻觉检测和鲁棒的跨域泛化，验证了分离问题相关与事实相关信号的有效性。

Abstract: Hallucination detection in large language models (LLMs) requires balancing accu racy, efficiency, and robustness to distribution shift. Black-box consistency methods are effective but demand repeated inference; single-pass white-box probes are effi cient yet treat answer representations in isolation, often degrading sharply under domain shift. We propose QAOD (Question-Answer Orthogonal Decomposition), a single-pass framework that projects away the question-aligned direction from the answer representation to obtain a question-orthogonal component that suppresses domain-conditioned variation. To identify informative signals, QAOD further selects layers via diversity-penalized Fisher scoring and discriminative neurons via Fisher importance. To address both in-domain detection and cross-domain generalization, we design two complementary probing strategies: pairing the or thogonal component with question context yields a joint probe that maximizes in-domain discriminability, while using the orthogonal component alone preserves domain-agnostic factuality signals for robust transfer. QAOD's joint probe achieves the best in-domain AUROC across all evaluated model-dataset pairs, while the orthogonal-only probe delivers the strongest OOD transfer, surpassing the best white-box baseline by up to 21% on BioASQ at under 25% of generation cost.

</details>


### [407] [XFP: Quality-Targeted Adaptive Codebook Quantization with Sparse Outlier Separation for LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14844)
*Thomas Witt*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: XFP是一种动态权重量化器，通过反向工作流（用户设定余弦相似度质量阈值，自动确定码本大小、离群值预算和打包方式），实现LLM高效推理。V2模式在Qwen3.5-122B-A10B上达138 tok/s，比Marlin INT4快49%；H-Process使Qwen3.5-397B-A17B在2×96GB内存下以~3.4有效比特运行，达100.9 tok/s，同时超越INT4+MoE剪枝。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM权重量化方法依赖Hessian矩阵、校准数据或手动选择比特宽度，流程繁琐且缺乏灵活性。需要一种自动、无需校准数据、能动态适配不同层和模型结构的量化方法。

Method: 提出XFP框架：(1) 用户设定余弦相似度质量阈值（注意力/共享专家严格、路由专家宽松）；(2) 自动确定码本大小、离群值预算和打包方式；(3) 权值分解为稀疏fp16离群残差+密集子字节索引张量；(4) V2为逐通道Lloyd量化，V2a为共享L=32码本库；(5) H-Process通过双阈值搜索找到“恰好适合内存”的运行点。

Result: V2模式：Qwen3.5-122B-A10B在RTX PRO 6000上达138 tok/s（TP=2），GSM8K准确率94.49%，比Marlin INT4快49%（TP=1）。H-Process：Qwen3.5-397B-A17B在2×96GB下达100.9 tok/s（~3.4有效比特），GSM8K准确率66.72%，全面超越INT4+路由专家剪枝。

Conclusion: XFP证明了“质量驱动、自动配置”的量化思路的有效性，无需手动调参和校准数据即可实现高吞吐、低比特的LLM推理，且H-Process提供了一种系统化的内存受限部署方案。

Abstract: We introduce XFP, a dynamic weight quantizer for LLM inference that inverts the conventional workflow: the operator specifies reconstruction quality floors on per-channel cosine similarity (one strict floor for attention and shared experts, one lazy floor for routed-expert MoE); XFP determines codebook size, outlier budget, and packing per layer automatically -- no Hessian, no calibration data, no manual bit-width selection. Each weight matrix is decomposed into a sparse fp16 outlier residual and a dense sub-byte index tensor into a per-group learned codebook. Two storage modes share one auto-select frontend and one fused decode kernel: V2 (per-channel Lloyd) and V2a (shared library of L=32 codebooks per layer). On Qwen3.5-122B-A10B under V2, XFP reaches 138 tok/s single-stream decode on workstation hardware (RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell, TP=2) at 94.49% GSM8K strict-match (3 seeds, n=3957), and is 49% faster than Marlin INT4 at TP=1. For models that do not fit in the target memory envelope, we present the H-Process: a quality-driven iteration over the two cosine thresholds that finds the operating point at which the model just fits while still producing sensible output. Three constraints define its search space: the operator-set thresholds, an OOM boundary at quantize-on-load, and a garbage boundary in generation (cosine similarity steers; benches verify). On Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (512 routed experts/layer), the H-Process fits the full expert population into 2x96 GB at ~3.4 effective bits and delivers 100.9 tok/s long-output decode at 66.72% GSM8K strict-match on the full 1319-problem set (single seed at submission; multi-seed evaluation in progress), exceeding INT4 with routed-expert pruning on memory, throughput, and accuracy simultaneously.

</details>


### [408] [An Interpretable Latency Model for Speculative Decoding in LLM Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15051)
*Linghao Kong,Megan Flynn,Michael Peng,Nir Shavit,Mark Kurtz,Alexandre Marques*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个简单且可解释的延迟模型，用于分析推测解码（SD）在大模型生产级服务系统中的行为。通过Little's Law推断有效批处理大小，并将每请求的延迟分解为与负载无关和负载相关的部分。基于vLLM的大量测量验证了模型准确性，解释了SD加速比随服务器负载增加而下降的原因，并分析了草案长度、接受率、验证器-草案器大小等参数在不同负载条件下的影响，最后扩展到了混合专家模型（MoE）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作主要在隔离或固定批处理设置下研究推测解码的加速效果，但生产服务系统中请求负载随时间变化，有效批处理大小由系统动态决定而非直接可控，这使得SD在实际部署中的行为缺乏理解。作者希望填补这一空白，为SD在生产系统中的配置和优化提供理论指导。

Method: 基于排队论中的Little's Law，将请求率映射到有效批处理大小；将每请求延迟分解为负载无关部分（prefill、drafting、verification的基础耗时）和负载相关部分（批处理引起的排队延迟）。在vLLM系统上进行了广泛的测量验证，覆盖不同模型大小、请求率、草案长度、接受概率等参数。

Result: 模型能够准确描述实际观察到的延迟；解释了SD加速比随服务器负载增加而下降的现象（高负载下批处理效应使得验证瓶颈凸显）；定量刻画了草案长度、接受率和模型大小在不同负载条件下对延迟的影响；框架可扩展至MoE模型，其中稀疏专家激活改变了不同负载下的有效服务成本。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了一个结构化的框架来理解SD在生产LLM服务系统中的行为，为部署系统中SD的配置（如草案长度选择）提供了理论依据，并指出在高负载场景下SD的收益会显著减弱，需要根据实际负载条件进行权衡。

Abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a smaller draft model to propose multiple tokens that are verified by a larger target model in parallel. While prior work demonstrates substantial speedups in isolated or fixed-batch settings, the behavior of SD in production serving systems remains poorly understood: request load varies over time, and effective batch size emerges from the serving system rather than being directly controlled or observed. In this work, we develop a simple and interpretable latency model for SD in LLM serving. We infer effective batch size from request rate using Little's Law and decompose per-request demand into load-independent and load-dependent components for prefill, drafting, and verification. We validate our model using extensive measurements from vLLM across verifier and drafter model sizes, prefill and decode lengths, request rates, draft lengths, and acceptance probabilities. The model accurately describes observed latency, explains why speedups often diminish as server load increases, and characterizes how draft length, acceptance rate, and verifier-drafter size shape latency across serving conditions, with implications for configuring SD in deployed systems. We further show how the framework extends to mixture of experts models, where sparse expert activation changes the effective service costs across load regimes. Together, our results provide a structured framework for understanding SD in real LLM serving systems.

</details>


### [409] [Learning from Language Feedback via Variational Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15113)
*Yang Li,Erik Nijkamp,Semih Yavuz,Shafiq Rayhan Joty*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 提出变分策略蒸馏（VPD）框架，通过协同演化学生和教师策略，将语言反馈形式化为变分EM问题，解决RLVR中稀疏奖励的探索瓶颈，在科学推理和代码生成任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR在复杂推理任务中面临稀疏奖励导致的探索瓶颈；现有on-policy自蒸馏方法依赖固定的被动教师，当学生策略提升后教师零样本评估能力停滞，无法持续提供有效指导。

Method: 将语言反馈学习形式化为变分期望最大化（EM）问题：E步中通过自适应信任域更新主动精炼教师策略，将文本反馈转化为动态改进的目标token分布；M步中学生在其on-policy rollout中内化该密集分布指导。教师和学生策略协同演化。

Result: 在科学推理和代码生成任务上，VPD一致优于标准RLVR和现有自蒸馏基线。在严格数学推理和冷启动场景下的压力测试揭示了反馈驱动自蒸馏与纯环境驱动RL之间的基本界限。

Conclusion: 通过让教师策略随学生策略协同进化，VPD克服了被动蒸馏的局限，持续从语言反馈中提取可操作信号，显著提升稀疏奖励下的探索效率。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) suffers from sparse outcome signals, creating severe exploration bottlenecks on complex reasoning tasks. Recent on-policy self-distillation methods attempt to address this by utilizing language feedback to generate dense, token-level supervision. However, these approaches rely on a fixed, passive teacher to interpret the feedback. As the student policy improves, the teacher's zero-shot assessment capabilities plateau, ultimately halting further learning. To overcome this, we propose Variational Policy Distillation (VPD), a framework that formalizes learning from language feedback as a Variational Expectation-Maximization (EM) problem. VPD co-evolves both policies: in the E-step, the teacher is actively refined on trajectory outcomes via an adaptive trust-region update, translating textual feedback into a dynamically improved target token distribution. In the M-step, the student internalizes this dense distributional guidance on its own on-policy rollouts. By continuously improving the teacher's ability to extract actionable signals from textual critique, VPD overcomes the limitations of passive distillation. Evaluated across diverse sources of diagnostic feedback on scientific reasoning and code generation tasks, VPD consistently outperforms both standard RLVR and existing self-distillation baselines. Finally, by stress-testing our framework on rigid mathematical reasoning and cold-start regimes, we illuminate the fundamental bounds of feedback-driven self-distillation compared to pure environment-driven RL.

</details>


### [410] [How to Scale Mixture-of-Experts: From muP to the Maximally Scale-Stable Parameterization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14200)
*Leena Chennuru Vankadara,Moritz Haas,Luke Hayward,Sebastian Bordt,Alessandro Breccia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了MoE架构中超参数（网络宽度、专家宽度、专家数量、稀疏度、深度）的缩放规律，提出了三种缩放机制，并开发了动态平均场理论框架进行分析。针对SGD和Adam优化器，推导了满足μP和最大尺度稳定性（MSSP）的参数化方案，实验证明MSSP能恢复学习率迁移和随规模单调提升的特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管MoE架构在大型语言模型中取得了显著经验成功，但缺乏对超参数如何随网络规模缩放以实现稳定性和最优性能的理论理解。

Method: 提出了三种缩放机制，开发了动态平均场理论（DMFT）描述MoE的训练动力学，推导了满足μP和最大尺度稳定性（MSSP）的参数化方案，并进行了实验验证。

Result: 1) 推导了SGD和Adam下满足μP的唯一参数化方案；2) 发现μP不能可靠地实现随规模的单调提升或学习率迁移；3) 提出了最大尺度稳定性（MSSP）原则，并推导了相应的参数化方案；4) 实验验证MSSP能恢复学习率迁移和单调性能提升。

Conclusion: 结合现有深度缩放理论，本文为MoE架构提供了完整的缩放方案，覆盖宽度、深度、专家宽度和专家数量等维度。

Abstract: Recent frontier large language models predominantly rely on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures. Despite empirical progress, there is still no principled understanding of how hyperparameters should scale with network width $N$, expert width $N_e$, number of experts $M$, sparsity $K$, and depth $L$ to ensure both stability and optimal performance at scale. We take a principled step toward resolving this gap by analyzing three different scaling regimes: (I) co-scaling $N\asymp N_e$, (II) co-scaling $N\asymp M\asymp K$, and (III) full proportional scaling of $N, N_e, M$, and $K$. For each regime, we develop a novel Dynamical Mean Field Theory (DMFT) description of the limiting training dynamics of MoEs that provides a formal foundation for our analysis. Within this framework, we derive the unique parameterization for SGD and Adam satisfying all maximal-update ($μ$) desiderata. We then show that the resulting $μ$P prescription does not reliably induce monotonic improvement with scale or robust learning-rate transfer. We trace these pathologies to scale-dependent observables in the aggregation dynamics, which motivates a refined set of desiderata that we term maximal scale stability. Guided by this principle, we derive a Maximally Scale-Stable Parameterization (MSSP) for both SGD and Adam in all three scaling regimes, and characterize the corresponding limiting dynamics - qualitatively distinct from the $μ$P limit - through a separate DMFT analysis. Experiments verify that MSSP robustly recovers learning rate transfer and monotonic improvement with scale across regimes. Combined with existing depth-scaling theory, these results provide a complete scaling prescription for MoE architectures as a function of width, depth, expert width, and number of experts.

</details>


### [411] [Resolving Action Bottleneck: Agentic Reinforcement Learning Informed by Token-Level Energy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14558)
*Langzhou He,Junyou Zhu,Yue Zhou,Zhengyao Gu,Junhua Liu,Wei-Chieh Huang,Henry Peng Zou,David Wipf,Philip S. Yu,Qitian Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ActFocus方法，通过重新加权token梯度解决强化学习训练LLM时均匀信用分配导致的问题。研究发现训练信号集中在动作token（行动瓶颈），因此对推理token降权、对高不确定性动作token升权，显著优于PPO和GRPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有策略梯度方法（PPO、GRPO）对轨迹中每个token分配相同的信用，导致训练信号错误分配。作者从能量模型角度证明，训练信号集中在动作token上（行动瓶颈），而推理token贡献甚微，需要更精准的信用分配机制。

Method: 提出ActFocus：1) 对推理token的梯度进行降权；2) 基于能量模型的 redistribution 机制，增加高不确定性动作token的权重。该方法简单高效，无需额外运行时或内存开销。

Result: 在四个环境中，ActFocus相比PPO和GRPO分别取得高达65.2和63.7个百分点的最终收益提升，且无额外计算成本。

Conclusion: 均匀信用分配是现有LLM强化学习方法的关键缺陷，针对动作token进行梯度重加权是一种极简且有效的改进方向。

Abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning trains large language models using multi-turn trajectories that interleave long reasoning traces with short environment-facing actions. Common policy-gradient methods, such as PPO and GRPO, treat each token in a trajectory equally, leading to uniform credit assignment. In this paper, we critically demonstrate that such uniform credit assignment largely misallocates token-level training signals. From an energy-based modeling perspective, we show that token-level training signals, quantified by their correlations with reward variance of different rollouts sampled from a given prompt, concentrate sharply on action tokens rather than reasoning tokens, even though action tokens account for only a small fraction of the trajectory. We refer to this phenomenon as the Action Bottleneck. Motivated by this observation, we propose an embarrassingly simple token reweighting approach, ActFocus, that downweights gradients on reasoning tokens, along with an additional energy-based redistribution mechanism that further increases the weights on action tokens with higher uncertainty. Across four environments and different model sizes, ActFocus consistently outperforms PPO and GRPO, yielding final-step gains of up to 65.2 and 63.7 percentage points, respectively, without any additional runtime or memory cost.

</details>


### [412] [Beyond What to Select: A Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-Volume Scheduling for Efficient Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14773)
*Suorong Yang,Hanqi Zhu,Hai Gan,Fangjian Su,Guang Li,Furao Shen,Soujanya Poria*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 提出PODS框架，通过振荡式数据体积调度（在低比例正则化阶段和高比例恢复阶段之间交替）来优化数据选择中的效率-泛化权衡，无需设计新的样本评分指标，可与现有选择方法兼容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法虽然动态调整样本身份，但数据体积（selection ratio）在整个训练过程中是静态固定的。作者从优化视角发现，选择比例会引入隐式正则化效应，低比例放大正则化但损失数据覆盖，高比例保留优化保真度但正则化不足。现有方法无法自适应调节这一权衡。

Method: 提出PODS（Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-volume Scheduling）框架，作为一种轻量级模块，动态调度训练过程中选择多少数据。在目标选择比例下，PODS交替执行低比例正则化阶段（利用选择诱导的正则化）和高比例恢复阶段（维持优化稳定性），实现对正则化强度的周期性调节。

Result: 在多个数据集、架构和任务上验证：ImageNet-1k训练成本降低50%且准确率提升；LLM指令微调加速2倍以上且无性能下降。

Conclusion: 数据选择中的体积调度（而非仅样本选择标准）是一个被忽视但重要的优化维度；PODS以即插即用方式为现有选择方法增加了自适应调节能力，在效率与泛化之间取得更好平衡。

Abstract: Data selection accelerates training by identifying representative training data while preserving model performance. However, existing methods mainly focus on designing sample-importance criteria, i.e., deciding what to select, while typically fixing the selected data volume as the target ratio throughout training. Thus, they are often dynamic in sample identity but static in data volume. In this work, we revisit data selection from an optimization perspective and show that selected-data training induces an implicit regularization effect modulated by the instantaneous selection ratio. This reveals a key trade-off: lower ratios amplify selection-induced regularization, whereas higher ratios preserve data coverage and optimization fidelity. Motivated by this insight, we propose PODS, a Plug-and-play Oscillatory Data-volume Scheduling framework. Rather than introducing another sample-scoring metric, PODS serves as a lightweight module that dynamically schedules how much data to select over training. Under the target selection ratio, PODS alternates between low-ratio regularization phases and high-ratio recovery phases to exploit selection-induced regularization without sacrificing optimization stability. With its lightweight, ratio-level, and task-agnostic design, PODS is compatible with existing static and dynamic selection methods and broadly applicable across training paradigms. Experiments across various datasets, architectures, and tasks show that PODS consistently improves the efficiency-generalization trade-off, e.g., reducing ImageNet-1k training cost by 50% with improved accuracy and accelerating LLM instruction tuning by over 2x without performance degradation.

</details>


### [413] [InfoSFT: Learn More and Forget Less with Information-Aware Token Weighting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14967)
*Mahdi Sabbaghi,George Pappas,Adel Javanmard,Hamed Hassani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: InfoSFT提出了一种基于信息论加权的监督微调方法，通过集中学习信号于中等置信度的token（既不过于熟悉也不过于不稳定），在数学、代码和思维链任务上提升了泛化能力，同时更好地保留了预训练能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SFT对所有样本均匀拟合，包括那些在基模型下似然较低的样本，这会导致对特定样本的过拟合和已有能力的退化；现有方法通过过滤或降低低似然数据的权重来缓解，但往往会抑制基模型尚未学习的新行为。

Method: 提出InfoSFT，一种基于信息论原理的加权方案，为SFT损失函数中的每个token分配权重，聚焦于"最大信息量、中等置信度"的token，仅需一行修改标准token级损失函数即可实现。

Result: 在数学、代码和思维链等任务上，使用多种模型系列，InfoSFT相比标准SFT和基于似然加权的基线方法表现出更优的泛化性能，同时更好地保留了模型已有的能力。

Conclusion: InfoSFT提供了一种简单而有效的改进SFT的方法，通过信息论加权重塑学习信号分布，在学到新行为与保持已有能力之间取得了更好的平衡。

Abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) provides the standard approach for teaching LLMs new behaviors from offline expert demonstrations. However, standard SFT uniformly fits all samples -- including those with low likelihood under the base model -- which can disproportionately drive training updates toward overfitting specific samples rather than learning the target behavior. Moreover, adapting to these unlikely samples induces substantial policy shifts that degrade prior capabilities. Existing methods mitigate this by filtering, regenerating, or down-weighting low-likelihood data. In doing so, they often suppress precisely the novel behaviors the base model has yet to learn.
  We propose InfoSFT, a principled weighting scheme for the SFT objective that concentrates learning signals on maximally informative, medium-confidence tokens -- those neither overly familiar to the base model nor too unlikely to cause instability. Requiring only a one-line modification to the standard token-wise loss, InfoSFT demonstrably improves generalization over vanilla SFT and likelihood-weighted baselines across math, code, and chain-of-thought tasks with diverse model families, while better preserving pre-existing capabilities.

</details>


### [414] [EnergyLens: Predictive Energy-Aware Exploration for Multi-GPU LLM Inference Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14249)
*Zhiye Song,Kyungmi Lee,Eun Kyung Lee,Xin Zhang,Tamar Eilam,Anantha P. Chandrakasan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: EnergyLens 是一个面向大语言模型推理的端到端能量感知框架，通过 einsum 接口、负载均衡感知的 MoE 建模和通信能量模型，在多 GPU 配置下以 9-13% 的误差预测预填充和解码能量消耗，揭示了最高 52.9 倍的能耗差异，并能自动识别 Pareto 最优的重叠配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么需要生产级代码和昂贵的性能分析，要么无法准确捕捉多 GPU 能量行为，导致从业者在优化优先级决策和部署配置选择上缺乏有效工具。

Method: 提出 einsum 接口捕获 LLM 规格（融合、并行化、计算通信重叠），结合负载不均衡感知的 MoE 建模和基于经验的多 GPU 通信能量模型。

Result: 在 Llama3 和 Qwen3-MoE 上验证，多 GPU 预填充和解码能量 MAPE 为 9.25%-13.19%；揭示不同配置间预填充效率能量差异达 1.47 倍，解码效率差异达 52.9 倍；正确识别 Pareto 最优的重叠配置。

Conclusion: EnergyLens 有效解决了 LLM 推理能量预测和优化决策问题，为可持续性和数据中心运营提供了实用工具，计算-通信重叠难以凭直觉优化但可被框架自动识别。

Abstract: We present EnergyLens, an end-to-end framework for energy-aware large language model (LLM) inference optimization. As LLMs scale, predicting and reducing their energy footprint has become critical for sustainability and datacenter operations, yet existing approaches either require production-level code and expensive profiling or fail to accurately capture multi-GPU energy behavior. As a result, practitioners lack tools for deciding which optimizations to prioritize and for selecting among existing deployment configurations when exhaustive profiling is impractical. EnergyLens addresses this gap with an intuitive einsum-based interface that captures LLM specifications including fusion, parallelism, and compute-communication overlap, combined with load-imbalance-aware MoE modeling and an empirically driven communication energy model for multi-GPU settings. We validate EnergyLens on Llama3 and Qwen3-MoE across tensor-parallel and expert-parallel configurations, achieving mean absolute percentage errors (MAPEs) between 9.25% and 13.19% for multi-GPU prefill and decode energy, and 12.97% across SM allocations for Megatron-style overlap. Our energy-driven exploration reveals up to 1.47x and 52.9x energy variation across configurations in prefill and decode efficiency and motivates distributed serving. We further show that compute-communication overlap is difficult to optimize with intuition alone, but EnergyLens correctly identifies Pareto-optimal overlap configurations.

</details>


### [415] [Selective Safety Steering via Value-Filtered Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14746)
*Bat-Sheva Einbinder,Hen Davidov,Yee Whye Teh,Yarin Gal,Yaniv Romano*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于值过滤的解码方法，在测试时通过安全价值标准筛选token，减少不必要的干预（即对本来安全的生成进行修改），同时提升不安全响应的安全性，并通过单个阈值参数控制误干预概率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解码时安全干预方法会不必要地修改本已安全的生成，损害模型的有用性、流畅性和风格。本文旨在减少这种不必要的干预，同时有效提升安全性。

Method: 提出Value-Filtered Decoding，基于值函数的安全价值标准过滤token，并给出错误干预概率的理论界，通过单一阈值参数控制安全性与干预率的权衡。

Result: 在多个数据集和实验上，该方法相比现有基线实现了更好的安全性与有用性、相似性之间的权衡。

Conclusion: 本文的方法能有效减少不必要的安全干预，在保持模型原有能力的同时提升安全性，提供了可控的安全-有用性权衡。

Abstract: While large language models (LLMs) are trained to align with human values, their generations may still violate safety constraints. A growing line of work addresses this problem by modifying the model's sampling policy at decoding time using a safety reward. However, existing decoding-time steering methods often intervene unnecessarily, modifying generations that would have been safe under the base model. Such unnecessary interventions are undesirable, as they can distort key properties of the base model such as helpfulness, fluency, style, and coherence. We propose a new test-time steering method designed to reduce such unnecessary interventions while improving the safety of unsafe responses. Our approach filters tokens using a value-based safety criterion and provides an explicit bound on the probability of false interventions. A single threshold hyperparameter controls this bound, allowing practitioners to trade off higher rates of unnecessary intervention for better output safety. Across multiple datasets and experiments, we show that our value-filtered decoding method outperforms existing baselines, achieving better trade-offs between safety, helpfulness, and similarity to the base model.

</details>


### [416] [Forgetting That Sticks: Quantization-Permanent Unlearning via Circuit Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15138)
*Saisab Sadhu,Pratinav Seth,Vinay Kumar Sankarapu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文发现标准的大模型遗忘方法在量化（4-bit）后会系统性失效，原因是梯度更新幅度远小于量化粒度；提出了MANSU方法，通过因果电路归因、零空间投影和对角Fisher保持约束，首次实现遗忘后量化不反弹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大模型遗忘评估仅在满精度下进行，但实际部署时模型都会被量化。近期研究表明4-bit量化会逆转遗忘效果，本文旨在系统性分析这一现象的根本原因并提出解决方案。

Method: 提出MANSU方法：(1) 因果电路归因定位最小遗忘子图；(2) 电路受限的零空间投影结合对角Fisher保持约束；(3) 逐参数幅度下限保证量化后幸存。同时提出CAD指标，用于区分结构擦除与行为抑制。

Result: 多模型家族和多个危害基准上，MANSU是首个同时满足四个性质（有意义遗忘、保持保留、非正PTQ差距、结构擦除）的方法，而梯度方法在压缩后遗忘恢复高达+0.05准确率。

Conclusion: 梯度遗忘方法存在系统性双失败：量化下遗忘失效或行为不变。MANSU通过机械论对齐的零空间遗忘从根本上解决了这一问题，CAD可验证结构擦除而非行为抑制。

Abstract: Standard unlearning evaluations measure behavioral suppression in full precision, immediately after training, despite every deployed language model being quantized first. Recent work has shown that 4-bit post-training quantization can reverse machine unlearning; we show this is not a tuning artefact but a systematic dual failure: gradient-based methods that achieve meaningful forgetting lose it under compression, while methods that survive quantization barely change the model. Both failures trace to the same root cause: across all baselines, per-parameter updates lie 47-828x below the NF4 quantization bin width; updates diffused across billions of parameters cannot clear quantization bin boundaries, a consequence we formalize as a sparsity-permanence tradeoff. We present MANSU (Mechanistic-Aligned Null-Space Unlearning), which resolves both modes by combining causal circuit attribution to isolate the minimal forget-set subgraph, circuit-restricted null-space projection with a diagonal-Fisher retain bound, and a per-parameter magnitude floor guaranteeing quantization survival by construction. We additionally introduce Circuit Attribution Divergence (CAD), a mechanistic verification metric distinguishing structural erasure from behavioral suppression, a distinction existing metrics cannot make. Across multiple model families and hazard benchmarks, MANSU is the first method to jointly satisfy all four properties with margin on each (meaningful forgetting, retain preservation, non-positive PTQ gap, and structural erasure), while gradient-based baselines recover up to +0.05 accuracy under compression.

</details>


### [417] [Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15155)
*Zhengxi Lu,Zhiyuan Yao,Zhuowen Han,Zi-Han Wang,Jinyang Wu,Qi Gu,Xunliang Cai,Weiming Lu,Jun Xiao,Yueting Zhuang,Yongliang Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: SDAR是一种将OPSD作为门控辅助目标、以RL为主优化框架的强化学习方法，通过sigmoid门控机制区分教师正负信号，在多轮智能体任务（ALFWorld、WebShop、Search-QA）上显著优于GRPO等基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL在LLM智能体后训练中仅提供轨迹级粗粒度奖励信号，OPSD虽引入密集token级指导但在多轮场景下不稳定，且技能条件下的特权引导需要不对称处理教师的负面拒绝（可能来自技能检索或利用不完美）。

Method: 将OPSD作为门控辅助目标，RL保持为主优化骨干；将去耦的token级信号映射到sigmoid门控，对教师认可的正差距token加强蒸馏，对教师负面拒绝软性衰减。

Result: 在Qwen2.5/Qwen3系列上，ALFWorld提升9.4%，Search-QA提升7.0%，WebShop-Acc提升10.2%，避免朴素的GRPO+OPSD的不稳定性，且跨模型规模一致优于混合RL-OPSD基线。

Conclusion: SDAR通过门控机制有效结合RL与OPSD的优势，解决了多轮智能体场景下OPSD的不稳定问题，验证了该方法在不同模型规模和任务上的有效性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a central paradigm for post-training LLM agents, yet its trajectory-level reward signal provides only coarse supervision for long-horizon interaction. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) complements RL by introducing dense token-level guidance from a teacher branch augmented with privileged context. However, transferring OPSD to multi-turn agents proves problematic: compounding multi-turn instability destabilizes supervision, while skill-conditioned privileged guidance requires asymmetric treatment for negative teacher rejections may arise from imperfect skills retrieval or utilization. We introduce SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning), which treats OPSD as a gated auxiliary objective while keeping RL as the primary optimization backbone. SDAR maps detached token-level signals into a sigmoid gate, strengthening distillation on teacher-endorsed positive-gap tokens and softly attenuating negative teacher rejections. Across the Qwen2.5 and Qwen3 families on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-QA, SDAR substantially improves over GRPO (+9.4% on ALFWorld, +7.0% on Search-QA, +10.2% on WebShop-Acc), avoids the instability of naive GRPO+OPSD, and consistently outperforms hybrid RL--OPSD baselines across model scales.

</details>


### [418] [Mechanistic Interpretability of EEG Foundation Models via Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13930)
*William Lehn-Schiøler,Magnus Ruud Kjær,Rahul Thapa,Magnus Guldberg Pedersen,Anton Storgaard Mosquera,Nick Williams,Radu Gatej,Tue Lehn-Schiøler,Sándor Beniczky,Sadasivan Puthusserypady,James Zou,Lars Kai Hansen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文对三种不同的EEG Transformer基础模型（SleepFM、REVE、LaBraM）应用TopK稀疏自编码器，提取稀疏特征字典并将其映射到临床分类体系，通过概念引导揭示模型内部表征中的选择性可引导、编码但纠缠、以及未编码三种操作状态，最终通过频谱解码器将潜在操作转化为可解释的生理频率特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG基础模型在临床上表现优异，但其内部计算机制不透明，阻碍了临床信任。作者希望打开这些模型的"黑箱"，理解其内部表征的结构和缺陷。

Method: 1) 在三种架构不同的EEG Transformer（SleepFM, REVE, LaBraM）上应用TopK稀疏自编码器；2) 将提取的稀疏特征映射到临床分类体系（异常、年龄、性别、用药）；3) 提出"目标vs离靶探针区域"指标量化引导选择性；4) 使用频谱解码器将潜在操作映射回幅度谱。

Result: 发现了三种操作状态（选择性可引导、编码但纠缠、非编码）；揭示了"破坏球"干预（全局性能崩溃）和临床纠缠（如年龄-病理混杂）等关键表征失败；成功将操作映射为可解释的频率特征（如病理性慢波抑制和α波恢复）。

Conclusion: 该框架能够系统性地诊断EEG基础模型的内部表征缺陷，并为模型干预提供生理上可解释的频率特征映射，有助于提升临床信任度。

Abstract: EEG foundation models achieve state-of-the-art clinical performance, yet the internal computations driving their predictions remain opaque: a barrier to clinical trust. We apply TopK Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) across three architecturally distinct EEG transformers: SleepFM, REVE, and LaBraM to extract sparse feature dictionaries from their embeddings. By grounding these features in a clinical taxonomy (abnormality, age, sex, and medication), we benchmark monosemanticity and entanglement across architectures. A single hyperparameter procedure, driven by an intrinsic dictionary health audit, transfers robustly across all three architectures. Via concept steering, we introduce a "target vs. off-target" probe area metric to quantify steering selectivity and reveal three operational regimes: selectively steerable, encoded but entangled, and non-encoded. This framework exposes critical representational failures: "wrecking-ball" interventions that collapse global model performance, and clinical entanglements, such as age-pathology confounding, where it is impossible to suppress one concept without corrupting the other. Finally, a spectral decoder maps these interventions back to the amplitude spectrum, translating latent manipulations into physiologically interpretable frequency signatures, such as pathological slow-wave suppression and $α$-band restoration.

</details>


### [419] [Beyond Mode-Seeking RL: Trajectory-Balance Post-Training for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13935)
*Saba Ahmadi,Prasanna Parthasarathi,Yufei Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出TraFL方法，通过轨迹平衡目标解决扩散语言模型在奖励驱动后训练中的“轨迹锁定”问题，在数学推理和代码生成任务上持续优于基线和现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散语言模型的后训练方法大多采用最大化奖励的目标，但会导致"轨迹锁定"——模型将概率质量过度集中在少数去噪路径上，减少了对其他正确解的覆盖，影响多次采样时的多样性。

Method: 提出TraFL（Trajectory Flow baLancing），设计了一个轨迹平衡目标，让策略朝着以奖励为倾斜的目标分布（锚定于冻结的参考模型）训练。具体包括：扩散兼容的序列级替代目标、可学习的提示相关归一化项。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准上，TraFL是唯一在每个基准-长度设置下都优于基础模型的方法，且优势随采样预算增加而保持。在Minerva Math上保持优于基础模型，在LiveCodeBench的所有难度划分上都是最强方法。

Conclusion: TraFL有效解决了轨迹锁定问题，证明了轨迹平衡目标在扩散语言模型后训练中的有效性，能同时提升性能和解的多样性。

Abstract: Diffusion language models are a promising alternative to autoregressive models, yet post-training methods for them largely adapt reward-maximizing objectives. We identify a central failure mode in this setting we call trajectory locking: sampled reward-driven updates over-concentrate probability mass onto a narrow set of denoising paths, reducing coverage of alternative correct solutions under repeated sampling. To address this, we propose TraFL (Trajectory Flow baLancing), a trajectory-balance objective that trains the policy toward a reward-tilted target distribution anchored to a frozen reference model. We make this practical for diffusion language models with a diffusion-compatible sequence-level surrogate and a learned prompt-dependent normalization. Across mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks, TraFL is the only evaluated post-training method that improves over the base model in every benchmark-length setting, with gains that persist as the sampling budget increases. The improvements transfer to held-out evaluations: TraFL stays above the base model on Minerva Math and is the strongest method on every LiveCodeBench difficulty split.

</details>


### [420] [Towards the Next Frontier of LLMs, Training on Private Data: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for Federated Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13936)
*Daniel M. Jimenez-Gutierrez,Enrique Zuazua,Georgios Kellaris,Joaquin del Rio,Oleksii Sliusarenko,Xabi Uribe-Etxebarria*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于联邦学习的框架（基于Sherpa.ai平台），使多个机构能够在不共享私有数据的情况下联合微调大语言模型。在医疗和金融领域的四个QA和分类数据集上，使用LoRA、QLoRA和IA3三种PEFT策略进行实验，结果表明联邦微调性能接近集中式训练，优于单机构独立学习，且QLoRA和IA3在绿色AI方面表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM的成功主要依赖公开数据，但大量有价值的数据分布在各个机构中且受隐私和法规限制无法共享。如何利用这些分散的、非IID的私有数据来提升LLM的领域能力是一个关键挑战。

Method: 基于Sherpa.ai联邦学习平台构建联邦微调框架，各节点在本地私有数据上使用PEFT策略（LoRA、QLoRA、IA3）微调共享LLM，仅交换模型参数更新而非原始数据。在医疗（MedQA、MedMCQA）和金融（FPB、FiQA-SA）四个数据集上进行跨域基准测试。

Result: 联邦微调性能接近集中式训练，显著优于单机构独立学习。QLoRA和IA3在保持较低精度损失的情况下提升了训练效率，符合绿色AI理念。

Conclusion: 联邦PEFT是适应LLM处理不可共享私有数据的可行方法，能够在保护隐私的前提下实现跨机构协作学习，在医疗和金融等高度监管领域具有重要应用前景。

Abstract: The recent success of large language models (LLMs) has been largely driven by vast public datasets. However, the next frontier for LLM development lies beyond public data. Much of the world's most valuable information is private, especially in highly regulated sectors such as healthcare and finance, where data include patient histories or customer communications. Unlocking this data could represent a major leap forward, enabling LLMs with deeper domain expertise and stronger real-world utility. Yet, these data cannot be shared because they are distributed across institutions and constrained by privacy, regulatory, and organizational barriers. Moreover, institutional datasets are typically non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID), differing across sites in population characteristics, data modalities, documentation patterns, and task-specific label distributions.
  In this paper, we demonstrate a practical approach to unlocking private and distributed institutional data for LLM adaptation through federated collaboration across data silos. Built on the Sherpa.ai Federated Learning platform, our framework enables nodes to jointly fine-tune a shared LLM without exchanging private data. We evaluate this approach through a cross-domain benchmark in healthcare and finance, using four closed-ended question answering and classification datasets: MedQA, MedMCQA, FPB, and FiQA-SA. We compare three parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) strategies-LoRA, QLoRA, and IA3-across pretrained backbones under non-IID settings reflecting institutional data heterogeneity. Our results show that federated fine-tuning performs close to centralized training and outperforms isolated single-institution learning. From a Green AI perspective, QLoRA and IA3 improve efficiency with limited accuracy degradation, supporting federated PEFT as a viable approach for adapting LLMs where data cannot be shared.

</details>


### [421] [EvolveMem:Self-Evolving Memory Architecture via AutoResearch for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13941)
*Jiaqi Liu,Xinyu Ye,Peng Xia,Zeyu Zheng,Cihang Xie,Mingyu Ding,Huaxiu Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: EvolveMem 是一种自进化记忆架构，通过 LLM 驱动的诊断模块对检索配置（评分函数、融合策略、答案生成策略等）进行闭环优化，在 LoCoMo 和 MemBench 上分别超越最强基线 25.7% 和 18.9%，且进化策略可跨基准迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体的长期记忆系统仅更新存储内容，而检索机制（评分函数、融合策略、答案生成策略等）在部署后冻结不变。论文认为真正的自适应记忆需要存储知识和检索机制共同进化。

Method: 提出 EvolveMem 架构，核心是 LLM 驱动的诊断模块：每个进化轮次读取问答失败日志，识别根因，提出配置调整建议；守卫元分析器应用调整并提供自动回退（regression）和停滞探索（stagnation）保护机制，形成闭环自进化。

Result: LoCoMo 上比最强基线高 25.7%（比最小基线高 78.0%），MemBench 上比最强基线高 18.9%。进化配置跨基准正向迁移，表明学到了通用检索原理而非数据集特化的启发式规则。

Conclusion: 该工作验证了记忆系统在存储和检索机制两个层面上共同进化的必要性，且 LLM 驱动的自诊断-自调整范式可以替代人工调参，发现原本动作空间中不存在的有效配置维度。

Abstract: Long-term memory is essential for LLM agents that operate across multiple sessions, yet existing memory systems treat retrieval infrastructure as fixed: stored content evolves while scoring functions, fusion strategies, and answer-generation policies remain frozen at deployment. We argue that truly adaptive memory requires co-evolution at two levels: the stored knowledge and the retrieval mechanism that queries it. We present EvolveMem, a self-evolving memory architecture that exposes its full retrieval configuration as a structured action space optimized by an LLM-powered diagnosis module. In each evolution round, the module reads per-question failure logs, identifies root causes, and proposes targeted configuration adjustments; a guarded meta-analyzer applies them with automatic revert-on-regression and explore-on-stagnation safeguards. This closed-loop self-evolution realizes an AutoResearch process: the system autonomously conducts iterative research cycles on its own architecture, replacing manual configuration tuning. Starting from a minimal baseline, the process converges autonomously, discovering effective retrieval strategies including entirely new configuration dimensions not present in the original action space. On LoCoMo, EvolveMem outperforms the strongest baseline by 25.7% relative and achieves a 78.0% relative improvement over the minimal baseline. On MemBench, EvolveMem exceeds the strongest baseline by 18.9% relative. Evolved configurations transfer across benchmarks with positive rather than catastrophic transfer, indicating that the self-evolution process captures universal retrieval principles rather than benchmark-specific heuristics. Code is available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/SimpleMem.

</details>


### [422] [R2R2: Robust Representation for Intensive Experience Reuse via Redundancy Reduction in Self-Predictive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14026)
*Sanghyeob Song,Donghyeok Lee,Jinsik Kim,Sungroh Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出R2R2正则化方法，通过冗余减少实现鲁棒表示，解决自我预测学习（SPL）在高更新-数据比（UTD）下的表征级过拟合问题，在连续控制任务上提升TD7约22%，并增强SimbaV2-SPL达到新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据稀疏场景（如真实机器人）中强化学习需频繁数据复用，导致过拟合。现有工作主要关注critic偏差，而SPL在高UTD下的表征级不稳定性未被充分探索。

Method: 提出R2R2（鲁棒表示通过冗余减少），在SPL框架内引入非中心化的正则化目标，理论上证明标准零中心化与SPL谱特性冲突，并设计非中心化目标替代。

Result: 在11个连续控制任务上，UTD=20时TD7提升约22%；集成到SimbaV2-SPL（本身已达SOTA）后获得额外增益。

Conclusion: R2R2有效缓解SPL在高UTD下的表征过拟合，与现有方法正交，可进一步提升当前最优算法性能。

Abstract: For reinforcement learning in data-scarce domains like real-world robotics, intensive data reuse enhances efficiency but induces overfitting. While prior works focus on critic bias, representation-level instability in Self-Predictive Learning (SPL) under high Update-to-Data (UTD) regimes remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose Robust Representation via Redundancy Reduction (R2R2), a regularization method within SPL. We theoretically identify that standard zero-centering conflicts with SPL's spectral properties and design a non-centered objective accordingly. We verify R2R2 on SPL-native algorithms like TD7. Furthermore, to demonstrate its orthogonality to prior advancements, we extend the state-of-the-art SimbaV2, which originally lacks SPL, by integrating a tailored SPL module, termed SimbaV2-SPL. Experiments across 11 continuous control tasks confirm that R2R2 effectively mitigates overfitting; specifically, at a UTD ratio of 20, it improves TD7 by ~22% and provides additional gains on top of SimbaV2-SPL, which itself establishes a new state-of-the-art. The code can be found at: https://github.com/songsang7/R2R2

</details>


### [423] [Rethinking Layer Relevance in Large Language Models Beyond Cosine Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14075)
*Cristian Hinostroza,Rodrigo Toro Icarte,Christ Devia,Andres Carvallo De Ferari,Eugenio Herrera-Berg,Denis Parra,Jorge F Silva*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文证明余弦相似度是评估大语言模型层重要性的不良指标，提出用层移除后准确率下降值作为更稳健的度量标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释性研究广泛使用余弦相似度来衡量模型层的重要性，但该指标是否真正反映层对模型性能的关键程度尚未被充分验证。作者旨在揭示余弦相似度的局限性，并提出更可靠的替代方案。

Method: 通过理论分析证明余弦相似度可能任意低而层仍至关重要；在多种LLM上进行实验，对比余弦相似度与层移除后性能下降的相关性；提出直接使用准确率下降作为层重要性度量。

Result: 余弦相似度与层移除导致的实际性能下降之间相关性弱或中等，余弦相似度会误导对Transformer内部机制的理解；层移除后准确率下降虽计算成本高，但能更准确反映层重要性。

Conclusion: 应超越余弦相似度来评估层相关性，直接度量性能下降是更可靠的替代方案，这对模型剪枝和轻量化有重要意义。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have revolutionized natural language processing. Understanding their internal mechanisms is crucial for developing more interpretable and optimized architectures. Mechanistic interpretability has led to the development of various methods for assessing layer relevance, with cosine similarity being a widely used tool in the field. On this work, we demonstrate that cosine similarity is a poor proxy for the actual performance degradation caused by layer removal. Our theoretical analysis shows that a layer can exhibit an arbitrarily low cosine similarity score while still being crucial to the model's performance. On the other hand, empirical evidence from a range of LLMs confirms that the correlation between cosine similarity and actual performance degradation is often weak or moderate, leading to misleading interpretations of a transformer's internal mechanisms. We propose a more robust metric for assessing layer relevance: the actual drop in model accuracy resulting from the removal of a layer. Even though it is a computationally costly metric, this approach offers a more accurate picture of layer importance, allowing for more informed pruning strategies and lightweight models. Our findings have significant implications for the development of interpretable LLMs and highlight the need to move beyond cosine similarity in assessing layer relevance.

</details>


### [424] [PreFT: Prefill-only finetuning for efficient inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14217)
*Andrew Lanpouthakoun,Aryaman Arora,Zhengxuan Wu,Dhruv Pai,Ben Keigwin,Dan Jurafsky,Christopher Potts*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PreFT（Prefill-only Finetuning），一种仅对预填充阶段应用适配器（如LoRA、ReFT）的个性化服务方法，相比传统PEFT方法在服务多适配器时吞吐量提升显著（512适配器时达1.9倍），同时保持接近的性能表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PEFT方法虽能高效个性化LLM，但在服务多用户适配器时，decode阶段的吞吐量远低于prefill阶段，导致整体服务效率低下。现有优化方法仍无法从根本上解决这一吞吐量瓶颈。

Method: PreFT仅在prefill阶段应用适配器，decode阶段丢弃适配器。基于vLLM引擎实现了prefill-only的LoRA和ReFT，并通过增大rank补偿性能损失（对吞吐量影响极小）。

Result: 服务512个适配器时，PreFT吞吐量是传统PEFT的1.9倍；SFT任务中可通过增大rank弥补性能差距；RL任务中PreFT性能与标准PEFT持平。

Conclusion: PreFT验证了仅在prefill阶段适配LLM是一种比现有PEFT更优的精度-吞吐量权衡方案，适合大规模个性化服务场景。

Abstract: Large language models can now be personalised efficiently at scale using parameter efficient finetuning methods (PEFTs), but serving user-specific PEFTs harms throughput, even with specialised kernels and memory management techniques. This is because, theoretically and empirically, a mismatch exists between prefill (processing a large number of tokens at once) and decode (generating a single token autoregressively): the latter has far lower throughput when serving multiple adapters. Rather than optimising performance relative to parameter count, for efficient multi-adapter serving, we instead ought to optimise performance relative to serving throughput. We therefore propose PreFT (Prefill-only Finetuning), wherein we only apply the adapter to prefill tokens and discard it afterwards. PreFT significantly increases throughput with minimal effect on performance. We develop and release an efficient implementation of two prefill-only PEFTs, LoRA and ReFT, on the vLLM inference engine. We first show that serving multi-user PreFTs is more efficient than traditional PEFTs ($1.9\times$ the throughput when serving $512$ adapters on Llama 3.1 70B). Then, we compare the performance of prefill-only vs. all-token adapters on a variety of supervised finetuning and reinforcement learning tasks with LMs at varying scales. On SFT, we observe that the evaluation loss of PreFTs is higher than PEFTs, but can be compensated by increasing rank with nearly no reduction in throughput. On RL, we consistently find that PreFTs approach parity with standard PEFTs. Together, this work validates prefill-only adaptation of LLMs as a more favourable accuracy-throughput tradeoff than existing PEFTs for personalised serving.

</details>


### [425] [Diagnosing Training Inference Mismatch in LLM Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14220)
*Tianle Zhong,Neiwen Ling,Yifan Pi,Zijun Wei,Tianshu Yu,Geoffrey Fox,Peng Wu,Xiao Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文揭示了大型语言模型强化学习系统中，由于 rollout 生成与策略优化阶段实现差异导致的训练-推理不匹配（TIM）问题，证明即使是微小的 token 级数值差异也能独立引发训练崩溃，并提出一系列缓解措施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM RL 系统中 rollout 生成与策略优化阶段的实现差异会导致同一序列在不同阶段产生不同的 token 概率，这种不匹配难以被检测且与 off-policy drift 等问题纠缠在一起，亟需系统性地隔离和分析 TIM 的影响。

Method: 设计了一个零不匹配的诊断环境（VeXact）来隔离 TIM，通过控制实验观察 token 级数值差异对训练稳定性的独立影响，并分析 TIM 如何改变有效的优化问题。

Result: 发现微小的 token 级数值不一致可以独立地导致训练崩溃；TIM 改变了有效优化问题的结构；提出了一套可缓解 TIM 的补救措施。

Conclusion: TIM 并非无害的数值噪声，而是一种系统级扰动，应被视为分析 LLM RL 稳定性的首要因素。

Abstract: Modern LLM RL systems separate rollout generation from policy optimization. These two stages are expected to produce token probabilities that match exactly. However, implementation differences can make them assign different values to the same sequence under the same model weights, inducing Training-Inference Mismatch (TIM). TIM is difficult to inspect because it is entangled with off-policy drift and common stabilization mechanisms. In this work, we isolate TIM in a zero-mismatch diagnostic setting (VeXact), and show that small token-level numerical disagreements can independently cause training collapse. We further show that TIM changes the effective optimization problem, and identify a set of remedies that could mitigate TIM. Our results suggest that TIM is not benign numerical noise, but a systems-level perturbation that should be treated as a first-order factor in analyzing LLM RL stability.

</details>


### [426] [Dynamics of the Transformer Residual Stream: Coupling Spectral Geometry to Network Topology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14258)
*Jesseba Fernando,Grigori Guitchounts*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文通过对三个生产级LLM进行完整的雅可比矩阵特征分解，发现训练在深度方向上安装了单调的谱梯度（从非正常、旋转主导的浅层到近乎对称的深层），以及一个累积的低秩瓶颈。这些谱几何特性是学习得到的而非架构固有的，并且图社区的拓扑位置可以预测雅可比矩阵对其是放大还是抑制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM能力强大，但其计算如何通过各层传播仍不明确。已有工作将深度视为离散时间、残差流视为动力系统，但之前分析依赖标量摘要或近似线性化，未能揭示训练后LLM的完整谱几何结构。

Method: 对三个生产级LLM进行完整的雅可比矩阵特征分解，分析深度方向的谱梯度、低秩瓶颈与非正常性，并通过图社区拓扑分析预测雅可比矩阵的放大/抑制行为。

Result: 训练在LLM深度方向上建立了单调谱梯度（从非正常、旋转主导到近乎对称）；存在累积低秩瓶颈将扰动压缩到残差流少数有效维度；这些特性是学习而来而非架构固有；图社区的拓扑位置可预测雅可比矩阵的放大/抑制，耦合符号由局部算子类型决定。

Conclusion: LLM中存在一种学习到的谱几何结构，将扰动传播与压缩链接到网络的功能拓扑，这为理解LLM内部计算机制提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Large language models are remarkably capable, yet how computation propagates through their layers remains poorly understood. A growing line of work treats depth as discrete time and the residual stream as a dynamical system, where each layer's nonlinear update has a local linear description. However, previous analyses have relied on scalar summaries or approximate linearizations, leaving the full spectral geometry of trained LLMs unknown. We perform full Jacobian eigendecomposition across three production--scale LLMs and show that training installs a monotonic spectral gradient through depth -- from non-normal, rotation-dominated early layers to near--symmetric late layers -- together with a cumulative low-rank bottleneck that funnels perturbations into a small fraction of the residual stream's effective dimensions. Our experiments reveal that this gradient and the dimensional collapse are learned rather than architectural, and is largely dissolved when structured non-normality is removed. We further show that the topological positioning of graph communities predicts whether the Jacobian amplifies or suppresses them, with the sign of the coupling determined by the local operator type, a relationship absent at initialization. These results map a learned spectral geometry in LLMs that links perturbation propagation and compression to the network's functional topology.

</details>


### [427] [Beyond Binary: Reframing GUI Critique as Continuous Semantic Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14311)
*Yuchen Sun,Pei Fu,Shaojie Zhang,Anan Du,Xiuwen Xi,Ruoceng Zhang,Zhenbo Luo,Jian Luan,Chongyang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出BBCritic，将GUI批评模型从二元分类范式转变为基于功能等价假设的度量学习范式，通过两阶段对比学习恢复动作空间的层次化结构，并构建了首个细粒度排序基准BBBench。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GUI批评模型采用二元分类（有效/无效），导致无效但看似合理的动作与有效动作的得分高度混淆。作者将其归因为两个结构缺陷：Affordance Collapse（层次化动作空间被压缩为0/1标签）和Noise Sensitivity（二元目标过拟合噪声决策边界）。

Method: 提出BBCritic，基于Functional Equivalence Hypothesis，通过两阶段对比学习将指令与动作对齐到共享的Affordance Space中，恢复被二元监督压平的层次化结构。同时构建BBBench基准，包含密集动作空间和四级层次分类体系。

Result: BBCritic-3B无需额外标注，在细粒度排序评估上超越7B参数的SOTA二元模型；在跨平台、跨任务上展现出强零样本迁移能力。

Conclusion: GUI批评本质上是一个度量学习问题而非分类问题，BBCritic的范式转换为GUI智能体测试时扩展提供了更有效的评分基础。

Abstract: Test-Time Scaling (TTS), which samples multiple candidate actions and ranks them via a Critic Model, has emerged as a promising paradigm for generalist GUI agents. Its efficacy thus hinges on the critic's fine-grained ranking ability. However, existing GUI critic models uniformly adopt binary classification. Our motivational analysis of these models exposes a severe entanglement: scores for valid actions and plausible-but-invalid distractors become indistinguishable. We attribute this failure to two structural defects: Affordance Collapse--the hierarchical affordance space is compressed into 0/1 labels; and Noise Sensitivity--binary objectives overfit to noisy decision boundaries. To resolve this, we introduce BBCritic (Beyond-Binary Critic), a paradigm shift grounded in the Functional Equivalence Hypothesis. Through two-stage contrastive learning, BBCritic aligns instructions and actions in a shared Affordance Space, recovering the hierarchical structure that binary supervision flattens. We also present BBBench (Beyond-Binary Bench), the first GUI critic benchmark that pairs a dense action space with a hierarchical four-level taxonomy, enabling fine-grained ranking evaluation. Experimental results show that BBCritic-3B, trained without any extra annotation, outperforms 7B-parameter SOTA binary models. It demonstrates strong zero-shot transferability across platforms and tasks, supporting our methodological view: GUI critique is fundamentally a metric-learning problem, not a classification one.

</details>


### [428] [Exemplar Partitioning for Mechanistic Interpretability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14347)
*Jessica Rumbelow*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 Exemplar Partitioning (EP)，一种无监督方法，通过 Voronoi 划分构建 LLM 激活空间的解释性字典，相比稀疏自编码器（SAE）节省约 1000 倍 token，且字典可直接跨层、跨模型、跨训练检查点比较。在 Gemma-2-2B 上，EP 区域可解释、支持因果干预，并达到与 SAE 相当的检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释性工具（如 SAE）计算成本高、字典大小需预设、且不同模型/层的字典不可直接比较。作者希望提出一种更高效、无监督、且具有跨模型可比性的特征字典构建方法。

Method: EP 基于流式激活向量的 leader-clustering，在距离阈值内构建 Voronoi 划分。每个区域由一个观测到的 exemplar 锚定，作为成员判断标准。字典大小由激活几何结构自动决定，无需预设。

Result: 在 Gemma-2-2B 上：1) EP 区域可解释且支持因果干预（消融 exemplar 可消除拒绝回答行为）；2) 基础与指令微调模型字典的交叉匹配可分离微调保留与引入的方向；3) ~20% EP 区域与 SAE 特征在 F1>0.5 上匹配；4) EP one-hot 探针在 ℓ0=1 时保持 ~97% 原始激活探针精度；5) 在 AxBench 上 EP 达到 0.881 AUROC，超出 GemmaScope SAE 0.126，接近 SAE-A 的 0.911，计算量减少约 1000 倍。

Conclusion: EP 是一种高效、可解释、可直接比较的字典构建方法，在计算成本显著降低的同时保持与 SAE 相当的性能，为 LLM 可解释性提供了新的工具。
