*Léo Grinsztajn,Klemens Flöge,Oscar Key,Felix Birkel,Philipp Jund,Brendan Roof,Mihir Manium,Shi Bin,Hoo,Magnus Bühler,Anurag Garg,Dominik Safaric,Jake Robertson,Benjamin Jäger,Simone Alessi,Adrian Hayler,Vladyslav Moroshan,Lennart Purucker,Philipp Singer,Alan Arazi,Julien Siems,Jan Hendrik Metzen,Georg Grab,Nick Erickson,Siyuan Guo,Eliott Kalfon,Simon Bing,David Salinas,Clara Cornu,Lilly Charlotte Wehrhahn,Diana Kriuchkova,Kursat Kaya,Lydia Sidhoum,Marie Salmon,Jerry Chen,Madelon Hulsebos,Yann LeCun,Samuel Müller,Bernhard Schölkopf,Sauraj Gambhir,Noah Hollmann,Frank Hutter*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: TabPFN-3是一个用于表格数据的预训练基础模型，通过纯合成数据预训练，在百万级行数据上取得SOTA性能，比之前版本快20倍，支持测试时计算扩展，并在时序、关系型和表格-文本数据上都有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表格数据支撑着科学和工业中大多数高价值预测问题，但现有方法在扩展到大规模数据集（如百万行）时面临训练和推理时间长的瓶颈。TabPFN-3旨在将基础模型的能力扩展到更大规模的表格数据，并提升多模态（时序、关系型、文本）表格数据的处理能力。

Method: 1) 纯合成数据预训练（基于先验分布）；2) 引入行分块（row-chunking）和减少KV缓存以扩展到百万行数据；3) 引入测试时计算扩展（Test-time compute scaling）；4) 针对时序数据提供专业检查点TabPFN-TS-3；5) 加速SHAP值计算（最高120倍）。

Result: 1) TabArena基准测试上显著超越所有调优和集成基线；2) 百万行/200特征数据集上击败8小时调优的梯度提升树基线；3) TabPFN-3-Plus(Thinking)在TabArena上超越非TabPFN模型200+ Elo，最大数据子集上达420 Elo；4) 比AutoGluon 1.5 extreme快10倍且性能更优；5) RelBenchV1上达到关系数据SOTA；6) TabSTAR上达到表格-文本数据SOTA；7) 比TabPFN-2.5快20倍。

Conclusion: TabPFN-3通过纯合成数据预训练和创新的工程优化，成功将表格基础模型扩展到百万级数据规模，同时大幅提升速度和性能，验证了表格数据领域基础模型范式的有效性，并为测试时计算扩展在表格任务中的应用开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Tabular data underpins most high-value prediction problems in science and industry, and TabPFN has driven the foundation model revolution for this modality. Designed with feedback from our users, TabPFN-3 builds on this foundation to scale state-of-the-art performance to datasets with 1M training rows and substantially reduce training and inference time. Pretrained exclusively on synthetic data from our prior, TabPFN-3 dramatically pushes the frontier of tabular prediction and brings substantial gains on time series, relational, and tabular-text data. On the standard tabular benchmark TabArena, a forward pass of TabPFN-3 outperforms all other models, including tuned and ensembled baselines, by a significant margin, and pareto-dominates the speed/performance frontier. On more diverse datasets, TabPFN-3 ranks first on datasets with many classes, and beats 8-hour-tuned gradient-boosted-tree baselines on datasets up to 1M training rows and 200 features. TabPFN-3 introduces test-time compute scaling to tabular foundation models. Our API offering TabPFN-3-Plus (Thinking) exploits this to beat all non-TabPFN models by over 200 Elo on TabArena, rising to 420 Elo on the largest data subset, and outperforms AutoGluon 1.5 extreme while being 10x faster, without using LLMs, real data, internet search or any other model besides TabPFN. TabPFN-3 extends the capabilities of our models, enabling SOTA prediction on relational data (new SOTA foundation model on RelBenchV1) and tabular-text data (SOTA on TabSTAR via TabPFN-3-Plus); and improves existing integrations: a specialized checkpoint, TabPFN-TS-3, ranks 2nd on the time-series benchmark fev-bench, and SHAP-value computation is up to 120x faster. TabPFN-3 achieves this performance while being up to 20x faster than TabPFN-2.5. In addition, a reduced KV cache and row-chunking scale to 1M rows on one H100 with fast inference speed.

</details>


### [467] [Reliability-Gated Source Anchoring for Continual Test-Time Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14063)
*Vikash Singh,Debargha Ganguly,Weicong Chen,Sabyasachi Sahoo,Sreehari Sankar,Biyao Zhang,Mohsen Harir,Shouren Wang,Osama Zafar,Christian Gagné,Vipin Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RMemSafe，一种基于置信度门控的持续测试时自适应（CTTA）方法，通过检测冻结源模型预测熵的高低，动态减弱或移除源锚定约束，从而避免源模型失效时的"盲目锚定"问题，在CCC-Hard等极端域偏移场景下显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CTTA方法在源模型因域偏移而性能急剧下降（如CCC-Hard上ResNet-50仅1.3%准确率）时，仍以固定强度使用源锚定，导致"盲目锚定"（blind anchoring）失效。作者希望设计一种能感知源模型可靠性并动态调整锚定强度的机制。

Method: 基于ROID框架，引入熵门控机制：利用冻结源模型输出的归一化预测熵作为可靠性指标。当熵高（源接近均匀分布）时，门控关闭，移除所有显式源耦合项（源锚定、一致性滤波），目标退化为无源回退损失（ROID基础损失+边际校准）；当熵低时正常使用源锚定。结合ASR（自适应采样策略）使用。

Result: 在9个匹配分割的持续腐蚀单元中，RMemSafe+ASR在8个上取得最低错误率，在全部9个上是最优的基于重置的方法。相比ROID+ASR，ResNet-50提升1.05个百分点，ViT-B/16提升0.48个百分点。源退化扫描实验中，性能下降斜率比ROID+ASR平缓1.13倍，符合优雅衰减预期。

Conclusion: 熵门控能有效检测高熵源崩塌（而非自信错误），动态调整源锚定强度，实现更鲁棒的持续测试时自适应。该方法在极端域偏移下显著优于现有源锚定CTTA方法。

Abstract: Continual test-time adaptation (CTTA) updates a pretrained model online on an unlabeled, non-stationary stream while anchoring it to a frozen source checkpoint. This anchor is useful only when the source remains reliable. On CCC-Hard, however, a ResNet-50 source falls to approximately $1.3\%$ top-$1$ accuracy, while existing source-anchored CTTA methods continue applying the same anchor strength. We call this failure mode blind anchoring and propose RMemSafe, a reliability-gated extension of ROID that uses the frozen source's normalized predictive entropy to attenuate all explicit source-coupled uses in the objective. When the source posterior approaches uniformity, the gate closes: the source anchor and agreement filter vanish, and the objective reduces to a source-agnostic fallback comprising ROID's base losses plus marginal calibration. Combined with ASR, RMemSafe achieves the lowest error on $8$ of $9$ matched-split continual-corruption cells and is the best reset-based method on all $9$, improving ROID+ASR by $1.05$~pp on ResNet-50 and $0.48$~pp on ViT-B/16. A controlled source-degradation sweep shows a $1.13{\times}$ shallower harm slope than ROID+ASR, consistent with the graceful-decay prediction. The entropy gate detects high-entropy source collapse, not confidently wrong low-entropy sources; this scope is explicitly evaluated and discussed.

</details>


### [468] [AudioMosaic: Contrastive Masked Audio Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14231)
*Hanxun Huang,Qizhou Wang,Xingjun Ma,Cihang Xie,Christopher Leckie,Sarah Erfani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: AudioMosaic是一种基于对比学习的音频自监督编码器，通过结构化时频掩码构建正样本对，高效利用大batch训练，在多个音频基准上达到SOTA，并能提升音频-语言模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频自监督学习主要依赖生成式重构目标，对比学习方法因数据增强设计困难和需要大batch size而探索不足。作者希望探索对比学习在音频SSL中的潜力。

Method: 提出AudioMosaic，在预训练时对频谱图块应用结构化时频掩码来构建正样本对，降低内存消耗并支持高效的大batch训练，从而克服对比学习在音频领域的瓶颈。

Result: 在多个标准音频基准上，AudioMosaic在linear probing和fine-tuning下均达到SOTA；将AudioMosaic集成到音频-语言模型中也能提升下游任务性能。

Conclusion: 对比学习方法AudioMosaic在音频SSL中有效且高效，学习到的表征更具判别性，泛化能力强，为音频对比学习提供了可行的新范式。

Abstract: Audio self-supervised learning (SSL) aims to learn general-purpose representations from large-scale unlabeled audio data. While recent advances have been driven mainly by generative reconstruction objectives, contrastive approaches remain less explored, partly due to the difficulty of designing effective audio augmentations and the large batch sizes required for contrastive pre-training. We introduce \textbf{AudioMosaic}, a contrastive learning-based audio encoder for general audio understanding. During pre-training, AudioMosaic constructs positive pairs by applying structured time-frequency masking to spectrogram patches, which reduces memory usage and enables efficient large-batch training. Compared with generative approaches, the AudioMosaic encoder learns more discriminative utterance-level representations that demonstrate strong transferability across datasets, domains, and acoustic conditions. Extensive experiments show that AudioMosaic achieves state-of-the-art performance on several standard audio benchmarks under both linear probing and fine-tuning. We further show that integrating the pretrained AudioMosaic encoder into audio-language models improves performance on audio-language tasks. The code is publicly available in our \href{https://github.com/HanxunH/AudioMosaic}{GitHub repository}.

</details>


### [469] [Active Learners as Efficient PRP Rerankers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14236)
*Jeremías Figueiredo Paschmann,Juan Kaplan,Francisco Nattero Santiago Mauricio Barron Bucolo,Juan Wisznia,Luciano del Corro*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将成对排序提示（PRP）重新定义为基于噪声成对比较的主动学习问题，引入随机方向预言机来消除位置偏见，从而在调用受限场景下提升NDCG@10性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PRP方法使用排序算法聚合LLM的成对偏好判断，但LLM输出存在噪声、顺序敏感性和非传递性，排序假设不匹配；同时截断排序以节省调用预算无法可靠获得top-K结果。

Method: 将PRP重新建模为噪声成对比较下的主动学习问题，用主动排序器替代传统排序算法；提出随机方向预言机，每个成对比较只调用一次LLM，将系统性的位置偏见转化为零均值噪声，实现无偏聚合排序。

Result: 在调用受限场景下，主动排序器作为即插即用替代品，显著提升了NDCG@10指标。

Conclusion: 将PRP重排序视为主动学习问题比传统排序算法更适合LLM的噪声特性，随机方向预言机有效降低了调用成本并消除了位置偏见。

Abstract: Pairwise Ranking Prompting (PRP) elicits pairwise preference judgments from an LLM, which are then aggregated into a ranking, usually via classical sorting algorithms. However, judgments are noisy, order-sensitive, and sometimes intransitive, so sorting assumptions do not match the setting. Because sorting aims to recover a full permutation, truncating it to meet a call budget does not produce a dependable top-K. We thus reframe PRP reranking as active learning from noisy pairwise comparisons and show that active rankers are drop-in replacements that improve NDCG@10 per call in the call-constrained regime. Our noise-robust framework also introduces a randomized-direction oracle that uses a single LLM call per pair. This approach converts systematic position bias into zero-mean noise, enabling unbiased aggregate ranking without the cost of bidirectional calls.

</details>


### [470] [MetaMoE: Diversity-Aware Proxy Selection for Privacy-Preserving Mixture-of-Experts Unification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14289)
*Weisen Jiang,Shuhao Chen,Sinno Jialin Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: MetaMoE 是一种隐私保护的 MoE 框架，利用公共代理数据将分散在客户端的领域专化专家统一为单个 MoE 模型，通过多样性感知的代理选择和上下文感知路由，在无需共享私有数据的情况下提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 MoE 模型假设训练数据可集中访问，但现实场景中数据因隐私限制分布在多个客户端无法共享，亟需一种无需数据共享的统一 MoE 训练方法。

Method: 1) 多样性感知代理选择：从公共数据中选取与客户端域相关且多样的样本，近似私有数据分布，监督路由器学习；2) 利用代理数据对齐专家训练，改善统一时的专家协调；3) 上下文感知路由器提升异构输入的专家选择能力。

Result: 在计算机视觉和自然语言处理基准上，MetaMoE 一致优于现有的隐私保护 MoE 统一方法。

Conclusion: 通过公共代理数据作为桥梁，MetaMoE 实现了有效且隐私安全的 MoE 专家统一，为分布式私有数据场景下的 MoE 应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity by combining specialized experts, but most existing approaches assume centralized access to training data. In practice, data are distributed across clients and cannot be shared due to privacy constraints, making unified MoE training challenging. We propose MetaMoE, a privacy-preserving framework that unifies independently trained, domain-specialized experts into a single MoE using public proxy data as surrogates for inaccessible private data. Central to MetaMoE is diversity-aware proxy selection, which selects client-domain-relevant and diverse samples from public data to effectively approximate private data distributions and supervise router learning. These proxies are further used to align expert training, improving expert coordination at unification time, while a context-aware router enhances expert selection across heterogeneous inputs. Experiments on computer vision and natural language processing benchmarks demonstrate that MetaMoE consistently outperforms recent privacy-preserving MoE unification methods. Code is available at https://github.com/ws-jiang/MetaMoE.

</details>


### [471] [Lang2MLIP: End-to-End Language-to-Machine Learning Interatomic Potential Development with Autonomous Agentic Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14527)
*Wenwen Li,Yuki Orimo,Nontawat Charoenphakdee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 提出Lang2MLIP，一个基于多智能体LLM的框架，将机器学习原子间势能（MLIP）的开发建模为序贯决策问题，自动选择合适动作来改进模型，无需预定义流水线，降低非专家使用门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发复杂材料系统的MLIP需要原子模拟、机器学习和工作流设计等多方面专业知识，且现有自动化流程固定、依赖领域专家，缺乏对异质材料系统的适应性，非专家难以使用。

Method: 构建多智能体框架Lang2MLIP，将MLIP开发转化为LLM求解的序贯决策问题：决策智能体在每个步骤观察当前数据集、模型、评估结果和执行日志，自动选择合适动作（如数据采集、模型训练、参数调优等）来改进模型，支持自我纠正。

Result: 在固体电解质界面（SEI）多组分多界面系统上进行了评估，结果表明基于LLM的多智能体系统在自动化MLIP开发方面具有潜力。

Conclusion: LLM驱动的多智能体系统是自动化MLIP开发、降低其使用门槛的有前景方向。

Abstract: Developing machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for complex materials systems remains challenging because it requires expertise in atomistic simulations, machine learning, and workflow design, as well as iterative active learning procedures. Existing automated pipelines typically assume a fixed sequence of stages or depend on domain experts, which limits their adaptability to heterogeneous materials systems where the optimal curriculum is not known in advance. To lower the barrier to developing MLIPs for non-experts, we propose Lang2MLIP, a multi-agent framework that takes natural-language input and formulates end-to-end MLIP development as a sequential decision-making problem solved by large language models (LLMs). At each step, a decision-making agent observes the current dataset, model, evaluation results, and execution log, and then automatically selects an appropriate action to improve the model. This removes the need for a predefined pipeline and enables the agent to self-correct by revisiting earlier subsystems when new failures arise. We evaluate this approach on a solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) system with multiple components and interfaces. These results suggest that LLM-based multi-agent systems are a promising direction for automating MLIP development and making it more accessible to non-experts.

</details>


### [472] [Reinforcement Learning for Tool-Calling Agents in Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14126)
*Marius S. Knorr,Robert Müller,Jan P. Bremer,Nils Schweingruber*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习后训练的多轮CodeAct智能体，用于在FHIR医疗数据图上进行结构化推理，将准确率从50%提升至77%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FHIR是医疗数据互操作的主流标准，但基于LLM的智能体在FHIR图上进行多步推理、过滤和聚合时，常选错资源类型或违反遍历约束，亟需提升推理准确性。

Method: 将FHIR上的推理建模为可查询结构化图上的序列决策问题，实现多轮CodeAct智能体，并使用强化学习（RL）进行后训练，LLM Judge提供基于执行结果的奖励信号。

Result: 在FHIR-AgentBench上，使用更小且更便宜的Qwen3-8B模型，将答案正确率从50%（o4-mini）提升至77%。

Conclusion: RL后训练结合自定义环境和工具，能有效提升LLM智能体在结构化临床图上的多轮推理能力，并保证数据完整性约束。

Abstract: Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR) is the dominant standard for interoperable exchange of healthcare data. In FHIR, electronic health records form a directed graph of resources. Answering clinically meaningful questions over FHIR requires agents to perform multi-step reasoning, filtering, and aggregation across multiple resource types. Prior work shows that even tool-augmented LLM agents (retrieval, code execution, multi-turn planning) often select the wrong resources or violate traversal constraints. We study this problem in the context of FHIR-AgentBench, a benchmark for realistic question answering over real-world hospital data, and frame reasoning on FHIR as a sequential decision-making problem over a queryable structured graph. We implement a multi-turn CodeAct agent and post-train it with reinforcement learning using a custom harness and tools. A LLM Judge provides execution-grounded rewards. Compared to prompt-based, closed-model baselines, RL post-training improves performance while enforcing data-integrity constraints. Empirically, our approach improves answer correctness from 50% (o4-mini) to 77% on FHIR-AgentBench using a smaller and cheaper Qwen3-8B model. We present an end-to-end post-training pipeline (environment building, harness construction, model training and custom evaluation) that reliably improves multi-turn reasoning over structured clinical graphs.

</details>


### [473] [Paraphrasing Attack Resilience of Various AI-Generated Text Detection Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14240)
*Andrii Shportko,Inessa Verbitsky*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文探讨了机器生成文本检测方法在面对 paraphrasing 攻击时的鲁棒性，发现包含 Binoculars 的集成方法性能最强但受攻击时性能下降也最显著，揭示了 AI 文本检测中性能与鲁棒性之间的权衡关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着 LLM 大规模涌现，抄袭和虚假信息传播问题日益严重，同时 AI 检测绕过工具也在发展，迫切需要可靠的机器生成文本检测方法。

Method: 分别评估了微调 RoBERTa、Binoculars、文本特征分析三种方法及其通过随机森林分类器集成的表现，并测试了它们在 paraphrasing 攻击下的鲁棒性。

Result: Binoculars 集成方法在无攻击时表现最强，但在 paraphrasing 攻击下性能损失也最大，呈现明显的性能与鲁棒性之间的权衡（dichotomy）。

Conclusion: 当前 SOTA 检测技术的可靠性认知需要重新审视，因为高性能往往伴随着对攻击的脆弱性。

Abstract: The recent large-scale emergence of LLMs has left an open space for dealing with their consequences, such as plagiarism or the spread of false information on the Internet. Coupling this with the rise of AI detector bypassing tools, reliable machine-generated text detection is in increasingly high demand. We investigate the paraphrasing attack resilience of various machine-generated text detection methods, evaluating three approaches: fine-tuned RoBERTa, Binoculars, and text feature analysis, along with their ensembles using Random Forest classifiers. We discovered that Binoculars-inclusive ensembles yield the strongest results, but they also suffer the most significant losses during attacks. In this paper, we present the dichotomy of performance versus resilience in the world of AI text detection, which complicates the current perception of reliability among state-of-the-art techniques.

</details>


### [474] [Language-Induced Priors for Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14301)
*Qiyuan Chen,Jiayu Zhou,Raed Al Kontar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出语言诱导先验（LIP）框架，利用大语言模型从领域文本描述中提取先验知识，解决冷启动域适应中源域选择困难的问题，理论保证与实验验证均表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 域适应在冷启动时面临根本性悖论：目标数据稀缺时，统计方法无法区分相关源域与无关源域，常导致负迁移。现有方法忽略了目标域的专家文本描述这一可用资源。

Method: 提出概率框架Language-Induced Prior (LIP)，利用预训练LLM将语义描述转化为选择模型；将LIP集成到EM算法中识别源域相关性；理论证明估计器在正确先验下匹配冷启动MSE，且无论LIP质量如何均渐进一致。

Result: 在描述性任务（高斯估计）、预测性任务（C-MAPSS数据集）和规范性任务（MuJoCo hopper）上验证了框架有效性。

Conclusion: LIP框架能有效利用LLM的先验知识指导冷启动域适应中的源域选择，并在数据充足时自动修正先验偏差，兼具理论保障与实践效果。

Abstract: Domain adaptation faces a fundamental paradox in the cold-start regime. When target data is scarce, statistical methods fail to distinguish relevant source domains from irrelevant ones, which often leads to negative transfer. In this paper, we address this challenge by leveraging expert textual descriptions of the target domain, a resource that is often available but overlooked. We propose a probabilistic framework that translates these semantic descriptions into a choice model, namely a Language-Induced Prior (LIP), that learns the preferences from a pretrained Large Language Model (LLM). The LIP is then integrated into an Expectation-Maximization algorithm to identify source relevance. Methodologically, this framework is compatible with any parametric model where a likelihood is available. It allows the LIP to guide the selection of sources when target signals are weak, while gradually refining these choices as samples accumulate. Theoretically, we prove that the estimator roughly matches an oracle cold-start MSE under a correct prior, while remaining asymptotically consistent regardless of the quality of the LIP. Empirically, we validated the framework on a descriptive (Gaussian estimation), a predictive (C-MAPSS dataset), and a prescriptive task (MuJoCo hopper).

</details>


### [475] [MahaVar: OOD Detection via Class-wise Mahalanobis Distance Variance under Neural Collapse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14413)
*Donghwan Kim,Hyunsoo Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MahaVar，一种基于类间马氏距离方差（Neural Collapse理论支撑）的OOD检测方法，在CIFAR-100和ImageNet上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOD检测方法在区分ID和OOD样本时存在不足，作者观察到ID样本的类间马氏距离具有显著的"尖峰最小值"结构（方差高），而OOD样本方差低，于是希望利用这一差异设计更好的OOD检测器。

Method: 提出MahaVar，在马氏距离基础上增加类间距离方差项作为OOD评分；理论层面利用Neural Collapse的松弛假设解释了ID样本为何会表现出高层间方差。

Result: 在OpenOOD v1.5基准上，MahaVar在CIFAR-100和ImageNet上达到SOTA，在所有基准上相比基于马氏距离的方法在AUROC和FPR@95上均有持续提升。

Conclusion: 马氏距离的类间方差是一个简单有效的OOD信号，Neural Collapse为其提供了理论基础，MahaVar是即插即用（post-hoc）的实用方法。

Abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical component for ensuring the reliability of deep neural networks in safety-critical applications. In this work, we present a key empirical observation: for in-distribution (ID) samples, class-wise Mahalanobis distances exhibit a pronounced sharp minimum structure, where the distance to the nearest class is small while distances to all other classes remain large, resulting in high variance across classes. In contrast, OOD samples tend to exhibit a less pronounced sharp minimum structure, producing comparatively lower variance across classes. We further provide a theoretical analysis grounding this observation in Neural Collapse geometry: under relaxed Neural Collapse assumptions on within-class compactness and inter-class separation, ID samples are shown to structurally exhibit high class-wise distance variance, offering a theoretical basis for its use as an OOD score. Motivated by this observation and its theoretical backing, we propose MahaVar, a simple and effective post-hoc OOD detector that augments the Mahalanobis distance with a class-wise distance variance term. Following the OpenOOD v1.5 benchmark protocol, MahaVar achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, with consistent improvements in both AUROC and FPR@95 over existing Mahalanobis-based methods across all benchmarks.

</details>


### [476] [Exploring Geographic Relative Space in Large Language Models through Activation Patching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14535)
*Stef De Sabbata,Rahul Baiju,Stefano Mizzaro,Kevin Roitero*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文探讨了如何使用激活修补（activation patching）这一机械可解释性工具，研究大语言模型如何处理相对地理空间信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在地理学中的广泛应用引发了对这些工具内部工作机制理解不足的安全担忧，因此需要从可解释性角度探究LLM如何处理地理空间信息。

Method: 使用激活修补（activation patching）这一机械可解释性方法，分析LLM在处理相对地理空间时的内部表征和机制。

Result: 揭示了LLM在处理相对地理空间时的一些内部工作机制。

Conclusion: 通过机械可解释性方法增进了对LLM地理空间处理能力的理解，对安全整合LLM进入地理学应用具有启示意义。

Abstract: The increased use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in geography raises substantial questions about the safety of integrating these tools across a wide range of processes and analyses, given our very limited understanding of their inner workings. In this extended abstract, we examine how LLMs process relative geographic space using activation patching, an emerging tool for mechanistic interpretability.

</details>


### [477] [NeuroAtlas: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Clinical EEG and Brain-Computer Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14698)
*Konstantinos Kontras,Trui Osselaer,Stylianos G. Mouslech,Angeliki-Ilektra Karaiskou,Guido Gagliardi,Thomas Strypsteen,Mohammad Hossein Badiei,Anku Rani,Maarten Vanmarcke,Miguel Bhagubai,Chanakya Ekbote,Jaedong Hwang,Christos Chatzichristos,Paul Pu Liang,Maarten De Vos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文构建了最大的脑电图(EEG)基准测试NeuroAtlas（42个数据集、26万小时），系统评估了EEG基础模型和时间序列基础模型，发现：EEG专用模型并未持续优于通用时间序列模型；标准ML指标不足以评估临床效用；模型排名和性能在领域内差异显著。当前模型尚未实现统一的EEG模型这一承诺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG领域的基础模型评估存在碎片化问题：不同研究使用不同数据集、不同的EEG预处理方式和不同的评估指标，导致难以判断EEG基础模型的实际效果，尤其模糊了临床相关性。

Method: 构建了包含42个数据集、26万小时EEG数据的最大基准NeuroAtlas，覆盖临床EEG（癫痫、睡眠医学、脑龄估计）和脑机接口；引入定制的临床评估指标（如事件级决策质量、睡眠图特征、脑龄差距）；系统对比EEG专用FM与通用时间序列FM及监督基线。

Result: 1) EEG专用FM并未一致优于通用时间序列FM；2) 标准ML指标不足以评估临床效用；3) 模型排名和性能在领域内差异大；4) 预训练模型表现大体相当，仅有少数存在狭窄优势。

Conclusion: 当前的预训练模型尚未实现开箱即用的统一EEG模型这一目标，NeuroAtlas揭示了这一差距，并为下一代统一EEG基础模型提供了数据集和评估指标。

Abstract: Foundation models (FMs) promise to extract unified representations that generalize across downstream tasks. They have emerged across fields, including electroencephalography (EEG), but it is less clear how effective they are in this particular field. Published evaluations differ in datasets, in the EEG-specific preprocessing that might influence reported results, and in the reported metrics, frequently obscuring the clinical relevance in EEG. We introduce NeuroAtlas, the largest EEG benchmark to date: 42 datasets and 260k hours covering clinical EEG (epilepsy, sleep medicine, brain age estimation) and brain-computer interfaces, and include multiple datasets per task along with bespoke clinical evaluation metrics. Besides evaluating EEG-FMs with respect to supervised baselines, we present results from generic time-series FMs. We report three findings. First, EEG-specific FMs do not consistently outperform time-series FMs, which have neither EEG-focused architectures nor been pretrained on EEG. Second, standard machine learning metrics are insufficient to assess clinical utility: thus, we thoroughly evaluate more appropriate measures such as the quality of event-level decision-making, hypnogram-derived features, and the brain-age gap in the domains of epilepsy, sleep, and brain age, respectively. Third, model rankings and performance can vary substantially within domains. We conclude that pretrained models perform largely on par, with only narrow advantages for a few, and that current models do not yet deliver on the promise of an out-of-the-box unified EEG model. NeuroAtlas exposes this gap and provides the datasets and metrics for the next generation of unified EEG FMs.

</details>


### [478] [Understanding Imbalanced Forgetting in Rehearsal-Based Class-Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14785)
*Alberto Tamajo,Srinandan Dasmahapatra,Rahman Attar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了基于回放的类增量学习（CIL）中存在的不平衡遗忘现象，从最后一层梯度相互作用的角度提出了三种系数来预测哪些旧类会更容易被遗忘，其中自诱导干扰系数是最强预测因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管回放（rehearsal）被广泛用于缓解灾难性遗忘，但近期研究发现不同类别的遗忘程度存在严重不平衡，而这一现象尚未被充分理解。本文旨在揭示其成因并建立预测机制。

Method: 从梯度层面的干扰分析出发，构建了三种最后一层系数（包括自诱导干扰系数和新类干扰系数等），用于捕捉增量步骤中对每个旧类造成干扰的梯度级来源。通过系数预测遗忘排名，并结合控制实验验证因果关系。

Result: 三种系数能够可靠地预测旧类在增量步骤结束时的遗忘排名。其中自诱导干扰系数是最强的预测因子，且新类干扰系数会影响自诱导干扰系数。

Conclusion: 本研究为CIL中不平衡遗忘现象提供了机制层面的解释，并指出通过减少各类别在已识别干扰源上的差异，有望缓解不平衡遗忘问题。

Abstract: Neural networks suffer from catastrophic forgetting in class-incremental learning (CIL) settings. Rehearsal$\unicode{x2013}$replaying a subset of past samples$\unicode{x2013}$is a well-established mitigation strategy. However, recent results suggest that, despite balanced rehearsal allocation, some classes are forgotten substantially more than others. Despite its relevance, this imbalanced forgetting phenomenon remains underexplored. This work shows that imbalanced forgetting arises systematically and severely in rehearsal-based CIL and investigates it extensively. Specifically, we construct, from a principled analysis, three last-layer coefficients that capture different gradient-level sources of interference affecting each past class during an incremental step. We then demonstrate that, together, they reliably predict how past classes will rank in terms of forgetting at the end of that step. While predictive performance alone does not establish causality, these results support the interpretation of the coefficients as a plausible mechanistic account linking last-layer gradient-level interactions during training to class-level forgetting outcomes. Notably, one coefficient$\unicode{x2013}$capturing self-induced interference$\unicode{x2013}$emerges as the strongest predictor, with controlled experiments providing evidence consistent with this coefficient being influenced by the new-class interference coefficient. Overall, our findings provide valuable insights and suggest promising directions for mitigating imbalanced forgetting by reducing class-wise disparities in the identified sources of interference.

</details>


### [479] [In-Context Learning for Data-Driven Censored Inventory Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14840)
*Sohom Mukherjee,Anh-Duy Pham,Richard Pibernik,Yunbei Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ICGPS框架，结合离线预训练生成模型与在线上下文自回归生成，解决决策依赖删失的库存控制问题（重复报童问题），理论上证明了贝叶斯遗憾界，实验上验证了对先验误配和分布偏移的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于参数化汤普森采样的方法在先验误配下表现脆弱，而离线插补方法难以迁移到在线学习场景。本文希望利用生成模型的预测能力，将离线学习与在线决策有效结合。

Method: 提出ICGPS（上下文生成式后验采样），核心思路是：离线元训练生成模型，在线部署时通过上下文自回归生成来补全潜在需求的删失部分，然后基于补全后的完整数据采取最优行动（oracle action）。理论分析通过"补全程"框架连接离线预测偏差与在线遗憾。

Result: 理论上证明了贝叶斯遗憾界：ICGPS的遗憾受TS基准遗憾加上补全偏差的平方根乘以√T的惩罚项；在重复报童问题上实现了次线性贝叶斯遗憾。实验上，ChronosFlow-ICGPS匹配了正确设定的TS，优于短视和UCB基线，对先验误配和分布偏移鲁棒，在真实数据集上表现良好。

Conclusion: 本文展示了预训练生成模型在运筹决策中的潜力，提供了一种"离线预测质量可控在线性能"的理论保证，为将大模型应用于结构化决策问题提供了新范式。

Abstract: We study inventory control with decision-dependent censoring, focusing on the censored or repeated newsvendor (R-NV), where each order quantity determines whether demand is fully observed or censored by sales. Existing approaches based on parametric Thompson sampling (TS) can be brittle under prior mismatch, while offline imputation methods need not transfer to online learning. Motivated by the predictive view of decision making, we combine these ideas by taking oracle actions on learned completions of latent demand. We propose in-context generative posterior sampling (ICGPS), which uses modern generative models that are meta-trained offline and deployed online by in-context autoregressive generation. Theoretically, we show that the Bayesian regret of ICGPS with a learned completion kernel is bounded by the Bayesian regret of a TS benchmark with the ideal completion kernel plus a deployment penalty scaling as $\sqrt{T}$ times the square root of the completion mismatch. This yields a plug-in template for operational problems with known TS regret bounds. For R-NV, we derive sublinear Bayesian regret by reducing censored feedback to bandit convex optimization feedback. We also show that, under reasonable coverage and stability assumptions, the online completion mismatch is controlled by the offline censored predictive mismatch, so offline predictive quality transfers to online performance. Practically, we instantiate ICGPS with ChronosFlow, which combines a frozen time-series transformer backbone with a trainable conditional normalizing-flow head for fast censoring-consistent sampling. In benchmark experiments, ChronosFlow-ICGPS matches correctly specified TS, outperforms myopic and UCB-style baselines, and is robust to prior mismatch and distribution shift. ChronosFlow-ICGPS also performs well for the real-world SuperStore dataset, especially under heavy censoring.

</details>


### [480] [Second-Order Actor-Critic Methods for Discounted MDPs via Policy Hessian Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14982)
*Sanjeev Manivannan,Shuban V*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于双时间尺度演员-评论家框架的二阶优化策略梯度方法，通过利用海森-向量积实现计算高效的曲率感知更新，解决了传统一阶方法收敛慢而二阶方法计算复杂的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统策略梯度方法使用一阶更新，收敛速度有限；而二阶优化能利用曲率信息加速收敛，但其在强化学习中的应用受限于海森矩阵估计的高计算复杂度。本文旨在弥合这一差距。

Method: 在双时间尺度演员-评论家框架下（评论家更新更快），证明动作值函数在演员更新时可视为局部恒定（准静态），从而使二阶近似合理。在此基础上，利用海森-向量积实现计算高效的二阶演员更新。

Result: 提出了一种计算高效且稳定的二阶演员-评论家方法，适用于折扣奖励强化学习设定。

Conclusion: 双时间尺度框架使二阶曲率感知更新在演员-评论家中变得可行且稳定，HVP技术的引入保证了计算效率。

Abstract: We address the discounted reward setting in reinforcement learning (RL). To mitigate the value approximation challenges in policy gradient methods, actor-critic approaches have been developed and are known to converge to stationary points under suitable assumptions. However, these methods rely on first-order updates. In contrast, second-order optimization provides principled curvature-aware updates that are proven to accelerate convergence, but its application in RL is limited by the computational complexity of Hessian estimation. In this work, we analyze second-order approximations for the actor update that leverage the full curvature information of the objective as much as possible. A stable approximation requires treating the action-value function as locally constant with respect to policy parameters, which does not generally hold in policy gradient methods. We show that this approximation becomes well-justified under a two-timescale actor-critic framework, where the critic evolves on a faster timescale and can be treated as quasi-stationary during actor updates. Building on this insight, we formulate a second-order actor-critic method for the discounted reward setting that leverages Hessian-vector product (HVP) computations, resulting in a computationally efficient and stable second-order update.

</details>


### [481] [Causal Foundation Models with Continuous Treatments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15133)
*Christopher Stith,Medha Barath,Vahid Balazadeh,Jesse C. Cresswell,Rahul G. Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个用于连续干预场景的因果基础模型，通过元学习在无需微调的情况下跨各种未见任务预测因果效应，采用Transformer和上下文学习来近似贝叶斯后验推断，在个体治疗反应曲线重建任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续干预场景中的因果推断（如药物剂量-反应关系）在多个领域至关重要，但远不如二元干预场景被充分探索，缺乏能够跨任务泛化的基础模型。

Method: 1) 设计了一个新的连续治疗变量的数据生成过程先验，构建丰富的因果训练语料库；2) 训练Transformer仅从观测数据重建个体治疗反应曲线，利用上下文学习来摊销昂贵的贝叶斯后验推断。

Result: 在个体治疗反应曲线重建任务上，该方法超越了专门针对这些任务训练的因果模型，达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: 证明了在连续治疗设置下训练因果基础模型的可行性，通过元学习实现了零样本跨任务泛化，为因果推断领域提供了一种新的范式。

Abstract: Causal inference, estimating causal effects from observational data, is a fundamental tool in many disciplines. Of particular importance across a variety of domains is the continuous treatment setting, where the variable of intervention has a continuous range. This setting is far less explored and represents a substantial shift from the binary treatment setting, with models needing to represent effects across a continuum of treatment values. In this paper, we present the first causal foundation model for the continuous treatment setting. Our model meta-learns the ability to predict causal effects across a wide variety of unseen tasks without additional training or fine-tuning. First, we design a novel prior over data-generating processes with continuous treatment variables in order to generate a rich causal training corpus. We then train a transformer to reconstruct individual treatment-response curves given only observational data, leveraging in-context learning to amortize expensive Bayesian posterior inference. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on individual treatment-response curve reconstruction tasks compared to causal models which are trained specifically for those tasks.

</details>


### [482] [On the Burden of Achieving Fairness in Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14260)
*Ziang Gao,Pengqi Liu,Archer Yi Yang,Mouloud Belbahri,Jesse C. Cresswell,Masoud Asgharian*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文研究保形预测中单阈值校准导致群体覆盖扭曲的问题，揭示了两种公平性定义之间存在根本性矛盾，并量化了分别处理群体与混合处理群体之间的代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统保形预测使用单一阈值校准，忽略了不同群体之间分数分布的异质性，导致群体层面的覆盖质量不均。作者希望从理论上理解这一现象的根源，并为公平性校准选择提供理论指导。

Method: 理论推导：推导了守恒律和下界，证明混合校准会带来不可消除的群体覆盖扭曲；证明Equalized Coverage和Equalized Set Size两种公平性定义存在张力；量化了分别/混合处理群体策略之间的成本。实验验证：在合成数据和真实数据上验证有限样本下的双向权衡。

Result: 混合校准无法消除群体异质性带来的覆盖扭曲，只会决定扭曲体现在覆盖维度还是集合大小维度；两种公平性定义之间存在本质矛盾，无法同时满足。

Conclusion: 校准选择不是在好坏之间做选择，而是在覆盖偏差和集合大小偏差之间做权衡，为公平性导向的保形预测校准提供了理论分析框架。

Abstract: Conformal prediction is often calibrated with a single pooled threshold, but this can hide cross-group heterogeneity in score distributions and distort group-wise coverage. We study this phenomenon through the population score distributions underlying split conformal calibration. First, we derive a conservation law and lower bound showing that pooled calibration incurs irreducible group-wise coverage distortion at a scale set by cross-group quantile heterogeneity. Second, we demonstrate that the two leading fairness definitions for conformal prediction, Equalized Coverage and Equalized Set Size, are fundamentally in tension. Third, we quantify the cost of moving between policies which treat groups separately or pool them. Experiments on synthetic and real data confirm the same bidirectional trade-off after finite-sample calibration. Our results show that, for the policy families studied here, calibration choice does not remove cross-group heterogeneity; it determines whether the resulting distortion appears in the coverage or size dimension, providing a principled lens for analyzing fairness-oriented calibration choices in practice.

</details>


### [483] [Training-Free Generative Sampling via Moment-Matched Score Smoothing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14276)
*Zhenyu Yao,Daniel Paulin*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MM-SOLD，一种无需训练的交互式粒子采样方法，通过在采样轨迹中强制匹配目标分布的经验矩来实现快速鲁棒的采样，在2D分布和潜空间图像生成任务上取得了与神经扩散模型竞争的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽然有效，但训练神经扩散模型的计算成本很高。作者旨在设计一种无需训练的采样方法，利用得分匹配的平滑偏差来捕捉低维数据几何结构，从而降低计算开销。

Method: 提出MM-SOLD（矩匹配得分平滑过阻尼朗之万动力学），一种基于交互式粒子的无训练采样器。通过在采样轨迹中强制匹配目标分布的经验矩，在大粒子极限下证明粒子密度收敛到确定性极限，其单粒子稳态边际是经指数倾斜的得分平滑扩散目标的Gibbs-Boltzmann密度。

Result: 在2D分布和潜空间图像生成实验中，MM-SOLD在CPU上实现了快速、鲁棒、无训练的采样，样本保真度和多样性可与神经扩散基线模型竞争。

Conclusion: 训练自由的矩匹配方法可以有效替代计算昂贵的神经扩散训练，在保持样本质量的同时大幅降低计算成本。

Abstract: Diffusion models generate samples by denoising along the score of a perturbed target distribution. In practice, one trains a neural diffusion model, which is computationally expensive. Recent work suggests that score matching implicitly smooths the empirical score, and that this smoothing bias promotes generalization by capturing low-dimensional data geometry. We propose moment-matched score-smoothed overdamped Langevin dynamics (MM-SOLD), a training-free interacting particle sampler that enforces the target moments throughout the sampling trajectory. We prove that, in the large-particle limit, the empirical particle density converges to a deterministic limit whose one-particle stationary marginal is a Gibbs--Boltzmann density obtained by exponentially tilting a naive score-smoothed diffusion target. The mean and covariance of this distribution agree with the empirical moments of the training data. Experiments on 2D distributions and latent-space image generation show that MM-SOLD enables fast, robust, training-free sampling on CPUs, with sample fidelity and diversity competitive with neural diffusion baselines.

</details>


### [484] [A Unified Geometric Framework for Weighted Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13943)
*Raphael Vock,Edouard Duchesnay,Benoit Dufumier*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文通过将加权InfoNCE目标函数解释为距离几何问题，揭示了对比学习中的几何结构。研究发现：SupCon在平衡分类下恢复经典正则单纯形几何，但类别不平衡会破坏对称性；Soft SupCon无论类别是否平衡都保持正则单纯形；连续标签设置下，y-Aware CL存在几何不一致性，而欧几里得-欧几里得加权或X-CLR则能获得唯一最优嵌入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对比学习广泛应用于表示学习，但其嵌入空间的几何结构尚未被充分理解。本文旨在从距离几何的视角统一理解不同对比学习目标的几何特性。

Method: 将加权InfoNCE目标函数重新解释为距离几何问题（DGP），通过理论分析刻画了多种监督和弱监督对比学习目标的最优嵌入几何结构。

Result: 1) SupCon在平衡分类下得到正则单纯形，但类别不平衡导致非均匀类间相似度；2) Soft SupCon无论类别平衡与否都保持正则单纯形；3) y-Aware CL在连续标签下除非标签位于超球面否则无法达到熵最优；4) 欧几里得-欧几里得加权和X-CLR可得到唯一最优嵌入。

Conclusion: 加权方案的选择决定了对比学习目标是否几何可实现、退化或不一致，这为设计对比学习目标函数提供了理论指导框架。

Abstract: Contrastive learning (CL) aims to preserve relational structure between samples by learning representations that reflect a similarity graph. Yet, the geometry of the resulting embeddings remains poorly understood. Here we show that weighted InfoNCE objectives can be interpreted as Distance Geometry Problems, where the weighting scheme specifies the target geometry to be realized by the representation. This viewpoint yields exact characterizations of the optimal embeddings for several supervised and weakly supervised objectives. In supervised classification, both SupCon and Soft SupCon (a dense relaxation of it where pairs from distinct classes have small non-zero similarity) collapse samples within each class to a single prototype. However, while balanced SupCon recovers the classical regular simplex geometry, class imbalance breaks this symmetry: SupCon induces non-uniform inter-class similarities depending on class sizes, whereas Soft SupCon preserves a regular simplex geometry regardless of class imbalance. In continuous-label settings, our framework reveals a different failure mode: y-Aware CL generally cannot attain its entropic optimum unless the labels lie on a hypersphere, exposing a mismatch between Euclidean label weights and spherical latent similarity. By contrast, geometrically consistent choices such as Euclidean-Euclidean weighting or X-CLR admit unique optimal embeddings. Our results show that the choice of weighting scheme determines whether contrastive learning is geometrically realizable, degenerate, or inconsistent, providing a principled framework for designing contrastive objectives.

</details>


### [485] [Matrix-Space Reinforcement Learning for Reusing Local Transition Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14304)
*Zuyuan Zhang,Carlee Joe-Wong,Tian Lan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 提出Matrix-Space RL (MSRL)，通过正半定矩阵描述符聚合轨迹段的一阶和二阶转移统计量，实现组合泛化，在有限预算目标AUC上达到0.73，优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法复用于技能或预测模型时忽略了丰富的局部转移几何结构和动力学信息，难以有效识别先前轨迹中对新任务有用的部分，从而实现组合泛化。

Method: 将轨迹段通过正半定矩阵描述符（聚合一阶和二阶转移统计量）表示为几何抽象，支持在抽象矩阵空间中进行代数组合，并通过障碍滤波拒绝不合理组合，可即插即用于无模型和基于模型的方法。

Result: MSRL在有限预算目标AUC达到0.73，优于从头训练MSRL (0.65)、TD-MPC-PT+FT (0.63)和TD-MPC (0.57)。

Conclusion: 证明了该描述符在坐标规范下良定义、对诱导的低阶可加信号类完备、在有效段组合下可加、且在可容许的可加描述符中最小充分，通过条件价值函数实现源任务到新任务的引导学习。

Abstract: Compositional generalization in sequential decision-making requires identifying which parts of prior rollouts remain useful for new tasks. Existing methods reuse skills or predictive models, but often overlook rich local transition geometry and dynamics. We propose Matrix-Space Reinforcement Learning (MSRL), a geometric abstraction that represents trajectory segments through positive semidefinite matrix descriptors aggregating first- and second-order statistics of lifted one-step transitions. These descriptors expose shared hidden structure, support algebraic composition in an abstract matrix space, and reveal opportunities for transfer. We prove that the descriptor is well defined up to coordinate gauge, complete for the induced low-order additive signal class, additive under valid segment composition, and minimally sufficient among admissible additive descriptors. We further show that conditioning value functions on the trajectory-segment matrix yields a first-order smooth approximation of action values, enabling source-learned matrix-to-value mappings to bootstrap learning in new tasks. MSRL is plug-in compatible with standard model-free and model-based methods, while obstruction filtering rejects implausible compositions. Empirically, MSRL achieves the best average finite-budget target AUC of 0.73, outperforming MSRL from scratch (0.65), TD-MPC-PT+FT (0.63), and TD-MPC (0.57).

</details>


### [486] [GeoViSTA: Geospatial Vision-Tabular Transformer for Multimodal Environment Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14406)
*Yuhao Liu,Sadeer Al-Kindi,Ashok Veeraraghavan,Guha Balakrishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: GeoViSTA 是一种视觉-表格联合架构，通过交叉注意力机制融合遥感影像与结构化社会经济表格数据，利用自监督掩码自编码进行预训练，在疾病死亡率预测和火灾风险预测等下游任务中优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地理空间基础模型主要处理遥感影像，忽略了表格形式的结构化社会经济协变量，导致难以捕获完整的"总体环境"信息，制约了对复杂环境、社会和健康相关问题的推理能力。

Method: 提出 GeoViSTA 视觉-表格 Transformer 架构，包含双边交叉注意力机制在不同模态间交换空间和语义信息，以及地理感知注意力机制将连续图像块与不规则的人口普查区令牌对齐；采用自监督联合掩码自编码目标进行训练。

Result: 在疾病特异性死亡率预测和火灾危险频率预测等跨区域下游任务中，GeoViSTA 的统一嵌入表示在线性探测评估中优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 联合建模物理环境与结构化社会经济上下文可以产生高度可迁移的表示，用于整体地理空间推理。

Abstract: Large-scale pretraining on Earth observation imagery has yielded powerful representations of the natural and built environment. However, most existing geospatial foundation models do not directly model the structured socioeconomic covariates typically stored in tabular form. This modality gap limits their ability to capture the complete total environment, which is critical for reasoning about complex environmental, social, and health-related outcomes. In this work, we propose GeoViSTA (Geospatial Vision-Tabular Transformer), a vision-tabular architecture that learns unified geospatial embeddings from co-registered gridded imagery and tabular data. GeoViSTA utilizes bilateral cross-attention to exchange spatial and semantic information across modalities, guided by a geography-aware attention mechanism that aligns continuous image patches with irregular census-tract tokens. We train GeoViSTA with a self-supervised joint masked-autoencoding objective, forcing it to recover missing image patches and tabular rows using local spatial context and cross-modal cues. Empirically, GeoViSTA's unified embeddings improve linear probing performance on high-impact downstream tasks, outperforming baselines in predicting disease-specific mortality and fire hazard frequency across held-out regions. These results demonstrate that jointly modeling the physical environment alongside structured socioeconomic context yields highly transferable representations for holistic geospatial inference.

</details>


### [487] [Natural Synthesis: Outperforming Reactive Synthesis Tools with Large Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15131)
*Frederik Schmitt,Matthias Cosler,Niklas Metzger,Julian Siber,Vladimir Krsmanovic,Mohamed Ghanem,Bernd Finkbeiner*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种神经符号方法，将大型推理模型与模型检查器结合，通过符号反馈迭代修复Verilog实现，用于反应式综合问题。同时引入自然语言到形式规范的自动形式化步骤，建立了端到端的自然语言综合工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反应式综合面临两大挑战：算法复杂度高，且手工编写形式规范极其困难。本文旨在同时解决这两个问题，降低反应式综合的门槛。

Method: 1) 神经符号方法：耦合大型推理模型与模型检查器，通过声音符号反馈迭代修复Verilog实现；2) 自动形式化：将自然语言规范自动转换为形式规范，并构建了自然语言规范数据集用于评估。

Result: 该方法在年度综合竞赛中解决了比最佳专用工具更多的基准测试，并可扩展到参数化系统（已知不可判定问题）。在自然语言规范上的表现与从形式规范出发相当。

Conclusion: 自然语言综合作为端到端工作流是可行的，神经符号方法能有效解决传统反应式综合中的算法和规范两大难题。

Abstract: Reactive synthesis, the problem of automatically constructing a hardware circuit from a logical specification, is a long-standing challenge in formal verification. It is elusive for two reasons: It is algorithmically hard, and writing formal specifications by hand is notoriously difficult. In this paper, we tackle both sides of the problem. For the algorithmic side, we present a neuro-symbolic approach to reactive synthesis that couples large reasoning models with model checkers to iteratively repair a synthesized Verilog implementation via sound symbolic feedback. Our approach solves more benchmarks than the best dedicated tools in the annual synthesis competition and extends to constructing parameterized systems, a problem known to be undecidable. On the specification side, we introduce an autoformalization step that shifts the specification task from temporal logic to natural language by introducing a hand-authored dataset of natural-language specifications for evaluation. We demonstrate performance comparable to that of starting from formal specifications, establishing natural synthesis as a viable end-to-end workflow.

</details>


### [488] [Eradicating Negative Transfer in Multi-Physics Foundation Models via Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15179)
*Ellwil Sharma,Arastu Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 提出Shodh-MoE，一种稀疏激活的潜变量Transformer架构，通过Top-1软语义路由将不同物理场的局部潜变量块分配给专门化的专家子网络，解决多物理场共训练中的负迁移问题。在混合三维物理张量的两万步分布式预训练中，实现了路由自主域分叉（开放通道和孔隙介质域分别路由到不同专家），并在128³网格上达到~2.8×10⁻¹⁰的物理可验证速度散度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学机器学习向通用基础模型扩展时，遭遇负迁移瓶颈：不同偏微分方程机制（如宽带开放通道流体动力学和边界主导的多孔介质流）同时共训练会导致梯度冲突、优化不稳定和密集神经算子的可塑性损失，因为单一的密集参数路径无法同时兼容这些物理机制对频谱和几何的不兼容要求。

Method: 提出Shodh-MoE架构：(1) 采用物理信息自编码器将128³网格压缩为16³的潜变量表示，内含Helmholtz风格速度参数化以确保无散度速度流形；(2) Top-1软语义路由器将局部潜变量块动态分配给专家子网络，允许不同物理机制拥有专门参数路径，同时保留共享专家处理普适对称性。

Result: 在20,000步分布式预训练中，路由遥测显示自主域分叉：开放通道域验证token完全路由到专家0，多孔介质域token完全路由到专家1。两域同时收敛，潜变量验证MSE分别为2.46×10⁻⁵和9.76×10⁻⁶，解码物理MSE分别为2.48×10⁻⁶和1.76×10⁻⁶，速度散度达~2.8×10⁻¹⁰。

Conclusion: 稀疏专家路由是一种实用的架构机制，能够有效缓解通用神经算子中的多物理场干扰问题，为科学机器学习领域构建通用基础模型提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Scaling Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) toward universal foundation models is bottlenecked by negative transfer: the simultaneous co-training of disparate partial differential equation (PDE) regimes can induce gradient conflict, unstable optimization, and plasticity loss in dense neural operators. In particular, broadband open-channel fluid dynamics and boundary-dominated porous media flows impose incompatible spectral and geometric demands on a single dense parameter path. We introduce Shodh-MoE, a sparse-activated latent transformer architecture for multi-physics transport. Shodh-MoE operates on compressed 16^3 physical latents produced by a physics-informed autoencoder with an intra-tokenizer Helmholtz-style velocity parameterization, restricting decoded states to divergence-free velocity manifolds. The model guarantees exact mass conservation, achieving a physically verifiable velocity divergence of ~2.8 x 10^-10 (evaluated post-hoc in FP64) on 128^3 grids. A Top-1 soft-semantic router dynamically assigns localized latent patches to expert subnetworks, enabling specialized parameter paths for distinct physical mechanisms while preserving shared experts for universal symmetries. In a 20,000-step distributed pretraining run over mixed three-dimensional physical tensors, routing telemetry shows autonomous domain bifurcation: held-out validation tokens from the open-channel domain route exclusively to Expert 0, while porous-media tokens route exclusively to Expert 1. The model converges simultaneously across both regimes, achieving latent validation MSEs of 2.46 x 10^-5 and 9.76 x 10^-6, and decoded physical MSEs of 2.48 x 10^-6 and 1.76 x 10^-6. These results support sparse expert routing as a practical architectural mechanism for mitigating multi-physics interference in universal neural operators.

</details>


### [489] [A Survey on Data-Dependent Worst-Case Generalization Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13913)
*Hubert Leroux,Jean Marcus,Julien Roger*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了深度神经网络在过参数化条件下仍能良好泛化的理论解释工作，围绕PAC-Bayesian理论扩展到随机数据依赖假设集、用几何/拓扑描述符细化复杂度项、以及用稳定性假设替代信息论项这三个步骤，统一为一个模板不等式并进行对比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典学习理论中的一致收敛边界在深度网络过参数化场景下失效，无法解释为什么模型能泛化。本文旨在系统梳理近期工作，构建一个统一的泛化理论框架来弥合理论与实践的差距。

Method: 这是一篇综述论文，通过三个步骤组织相关研究：(1) 将PAC-Bayesian理论扩展到随机、数据依赖的假设集；(2) 用优化轨迹的几何与拓扑描述符（如分形维数、α加权寿命和、正幅度）细化复杂度项；(3) 用稳定性假设替代信息论项。最后统一为一个模板不等式并进行对比。

Result: 构建了统一的模板不等式，并在各方法之间进行了直接的对比分析，展示了不同泛化边界方法的优劣与联系。

Conclusion: 该综述为深度神经网络的泛化理论提供了系统性的组织框架，将分散的研究工作统一起来，为后续研究奠定了理论基础。

Abstract: Deep neural networks generalize well despite being heavily overparameterized, in apparent contradiction with classical learning theory based on uniform convergence over fixed hypothesis spaces. Uniform bounds over the entire parameter space are vacuous in this regime, and recent work has shown that non-vacuous guarantees can be recovered by restricting attention to the part of parameter space that the algorithm actually visits. This survey paper organizes this line of work around three steps: extending PAC-Bayesian theory to random, data-dependent hypothesis sets (arXiv:2404.17442); refining the complexity term with geometric and topological descriptors of the optimization trajectory, including fractal dimensions, alpha-weighted lifetime sums, and positive magnitude (arXiv:2006.09313, arXiv:2302.02766, arXiv:2407.08723); and replacing the resulting information-theoretic terms by stability assumptions (arXiv:2507.06775). We unify these contributions around a single template inequality and a head-to-head comparison of the resulting bounds.

</details>


### [490] [Collaborative Yet Personalized Policy Training: Single-Timescale Federated Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14423)
*Leo Muxing Wang,Pengkun Yang,Lili Su*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种联邦actor-critic框架，让智能体共享一个线性子空间表示但保持个性化策略组件，并在异构马尔可夫轨迹下证明了收敛速度与智能体数量K成线性加速比，实验显示在Hopper-v5任务上优于Single PPO和FedAvg PPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的actor-critic方法在面对环境异质性时，要么忽略异质性，要么放弃个性化而训练单一共享策略。实际场景中不同智能体面临不同转移核（环境异质性），但仍需协作学习，因此需要一种既能共享知识又能保持个性化的联邦训练方法。

Method: 提出联邦actor-critic框架：智能体共享一个公共线性子空间表示（通过投影子空间更新和QR分解保持正交性），同时维护个性化的局部策略（actor）和局部critic。采用单时间尺度更新、马尔可夫采样，在理论分析中发展了对投影子空间更新的扰动分析、条件混合论证以及马尔可夫采样与时间冻结策略之间函数评估差异的精细刻画。

Result: 理论结果：critic误差以$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/((1-\gamma)^4\sqrt{TK}))$收敛到零；策略梯度范数以$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/((1-\gamma)^6\sqrt{TK}))$收敛到零。两者均显示出对智能体数量K的线性加速。实验上，在Hopper-v5动作映射异构任务中，该框架优于Single PPO和FedAvg PPO，且共享主干具有下游迁移能力。

Conclusion: 本文证明了在异构马尔可夫轨迹下联邦actor-critic可以实现线性加速收敛，并通过理论分析和实验验证了共享子空间+个性化策略框架在异质环境中的有效性。

Abstract: Despite the popularity of the actor-critic method and the practical needs of collaborative policy training, existing works typically either overlook environmental heterogeneity or give up personalization altogether by training a single shared policy across all agents. We consider a federated actor-critic framework in which agents share a common linear subspace representation while maintaining personalized local policy components, and agents iteratively estimate the common subspace, local critic heads, and local policies (i.e., actors). Under canonical single-timescale updates with Markovian sampling, we establish finite-time convergence via a novel joint linear approximation framework. Specifically, we show that the critic error converges to zero at the rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/((1-γ)^4\sqrt{TK}))$, and the policy gradient norm converges to zero at the rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/((1-γ)^6\sqrt{TK}))$, where $T$ is the number of rounds, $K$ is the number of agents, and $γ\in (0,1)$ is the discount factor. These results demonstrate linear speedup with respect to the number of agents $K$, despite heterogeneous Markovian trajectories under distinct transition kernels and coupled learning dynamics. To address these challenges, we develop a new perturbation analysis for the projected subspace updates and QR decomposition steps, together with conditional mixing arguments for heterogeneous Markovian noise. Furthermore, to handle the additional complications induced by policy updates and temporal dependence, we establish fine-grained characterizations of the discrepancies between function evaluations under Markovian sampling and under temporally frozen policies. Experiments instantiate the framework within PPO on federated \texttt{Hopper-v5} action-map heterogeneity, showing gains over Single PPO and FedAvg PPO and downstream transfer from the learned shared trunk.

</details>


### [491] [Vision-Based Runtime Monitoring under Varying Specifications using Semantic Latent Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13923)
*Bardh Hoxha,Oliver Schön,Hideki Okamoto,Lars Lindemann,Georgios Fainekos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了在部分可观测性下，从视觉观测中认证运行时监控过去时间信号时态逻辑(ptSTL)的问题。提出了两种可重用监控器：语义基础监控器和滚动预测监控器，前者通过预测时序原子的鲁棒性得分向量实现一次性校准认证整个公式片段，后者通过预测当前谓词值并在线重建时序历史来实现。在行人交叉路口基准上，滚动监控器在短时域上更紧致，语义基础监控器在长时域上紧致度提升4倍，并在Waymo真实数据上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在视觉观测下对时态逻辑属性进行认证运行时监控的问题，要求监控器从图像中推断安全相关量并提供有限样本保证，同时具备可重用性（无需对每个公式重新训练）。

Method: 提出了两种可重用监控器：1) 语义基础监控器，预测时序原子鲁棒性得分向量，通过确定性解码器解析任一公式，单次共形校准即可认证整个片段；2) 滚动预测监控器，仅预测当前谓词值并在线重建时序历史，更易学习但长时域下保守性增加。理论证明了语义基础是单调1-Lipschitz可重用接口下的最小预测目标。

Result: 在行人交叉路口基准上，滚动监控器在短时域获得更紧致的认证界，语义基础监控器在长时域紧致度提升4倍。在Waymo真实驾驶数据上，两种监控器均经验性地满足共形覆盖保证。

Conclusion: 提出的可重用监控方法能够在部分可观测视觉条件下有效认证时态逻辑属性，语义基础和滚动两种策略在不同时域长度上各有优势，验证了方法的实用性和理论保证的有效性。

Abstract: We study certified runtime monitoring of past-time signal temporal logic (ptSTL) from visual observations under partial observability. The monitor must infer safety-relevant quantities from images and provide finite-sample guarantees, while being \emph{reusable}: once trained and calibrated, it should certify any formula in a target fragment without per-formula retraining. For fragments induced by a finite dictionary of temporal atoms, we prove that the \emph{semantic basis}, the vector of atom robustness scores, is the minimum prediction target within the class of monotone, 1-Lipschitz reusable interfaces: any formula is evaluated by a deterministic decoder derived from the parse tree, and a single conformal calibration pass certifies the entire fragment with no union bound. We also introduce a \emph{rolling prediction monitor} that predicts only current predicate values and reconstructs temporal history online; this is easier to learn but grows conservative at long horizons. On a pedestrian-crossroad benchmark, rolling achieves tighter certified bounds at short horizons while the semantic-basis monitor is up to 4-times tighter at long horizons. We validate the presented monitors on real-world Waymo driving data, where both monitors satisfy the conformal coverage guarantee empirically.

</details>


### [492] [Dywave: Event-Aligned Dynamic Tokenization for Heterogeneous IoT Sensing Signal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14014)
*Tomoyoshi Kimura,Denizhan Kara,Jinyang Li,Hongjue Zhao,Yigong Hu,Yizhuo Chen,Xiaomin Ouyang,Shengzhong Liu,Tarek Abdelzaher*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出Dywave动态分词框架，利用小波分解将IoT传感信号转化为紧凑输入表示，在5个数据集上比SOTA准确率提升最高12%，输入token长度减少最高75%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IoT传感信号具有非平稳、多尺度特性，标准分词技术难以有效处理，需要一种能对齐内在时间结构和物理事件的动态分词方法。

Method: 基于小波层次分解，识别语义时间边界，自适应压缩冗余区间，同时保持时序连贯性。

Result: 5个真实IoT数据集（活动识别、压力评估、物体检测）上准确率提升12%，token长度减少75%，对域偏移和变长序列更具鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Dywave通过动态分词有效提升了IoT传感信号在主流序列模型上的效率和性能，是一种实用的输入表示优化方案。

Abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) systems continuously collect heterogeneous sensing signals from ubiquitous sensors to support intelligent applications such as human activity analysis, emotion monitoring, and environmental perception. These signals are inherently non-stationary and multi-scale, posing unique challenges for standard tokenization techniques. This paper proposes Dywave, a dynamic tokenization framework for IoT sensing signals that constructs compact input representations aligned with intrinsic temporal structures and underlying physical events. Dywave leverages wavelet-based hierarchical decomposition, identifies meaningful temporal boundaries corresponding to underlying semantic events, and adaptively compresses redundant intervals while preserving temporal coherence. Extensive evaluations on five real-world IoT sensing datasets across activity recognition, stress assessment, and nearby object detection demonstrate that Dywave outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 12% in accuracy, while improving computational efficiency by reducing input token lengths by up to 75% across mainstream sequence models. Moreover, Dywave exhibits improved robustness to domain shifts and varying sequence lengths.

</details>


### [493] [SurF: A Generative Model for Multivariate Irregular Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14069)
*Mohammad R. Rezaei,Tejas Balaji,Rahul G. Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: SurF 利用时间重标定理（TRT）作为可学习的双射，将不规则采样的事件流映射为独立同分布的指数噪声，从而实现对异构事件序列数据的统一生成建模，并在多个基准上取得最优或可比结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不规则采样的事件流在生成建模中极具挑战：基于token化的方法无法处理跨数量级的时间间隔，而神经时序点过程受限于窗口级数值积分。现有方法难以在异构数据集上统一训练，缺乏面向异步事件流的 foundation model。

Method: (i) 基于时间重标定理（TRT）构建可学习的双射，将事件序列映射为i.i.d.单位速率指数噪声；(ii) 提出三种高效的累积强度参数化方法，可扩展至长序列；(iii) 使用基于Transformer的编码器实现多数据集预训练。

Result: 在6个真实世界基准中，SurF在Earthquake、Retweet和Taobao上取得最优时间RMSE；在严格留一法评估下，保留的检查点在5/6数据集上超越所有基线，在Amazon和Earthquake上击败所有基线。

Conclusion: SurF是向异步事件流 foundation model 迈出的初步一步，证明了基于时间重标定理的生成模型在异构事件序列上的统一训练是可行的。

Abstract: Irregularly sampled multivariate event streams remain a stubbornly difficult modality for generative modeling: tokenization-based approaches break down when inter-event intervals vary by orders of magnitude, and neural temporal point processes are bottlenecked by window-level numerical quadrature. We (i) propose SurF, a generative model that uses the Time Rescaling Theorem (TRT) as a learnable bijection between event sequences and i.i.d.\ unit-rate exponential noise, enabling a single model to be trained across heterogeneous event-stream datasets; (ii) three efficient parameterizations of the cumulative intensity that scale to long sequences; and (iii) a Transformer-based encoder for multi-dataset pretraining. On six real-world benchmarks, SurF achieves the best reported time RMSE on Earthquake, Retweet, and Taobao, and is within trial-level noise of the strongest specialist on the remaining three. Under a strict leave-one-out protocol, the held-out checkpoint beats every classical and neural-autoregressive baseline on 5/6 datasets and beats every baseline on Amazon and Earthquake, an initial step toward foundation models over asynchronous event streams.

</details>


### [494] [Architecture-Aware Explanation Auditing for Industrial Visual Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14255)
*Sibo Jia,Zihang Zhao,Kunrong Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于"原生读出假设"的架构感知解释审计协议，发现解释方法的忠实度受其与模型原生决策机制的结构距离约束。在WM-811K晶圆图数据集上，ViT-Tiny+Attention Rollout的Deletion AUC显著优于Swin-Tiny/ResNet18+CBAM/DenseNet121+Grad-CAM，但模型无关方法RISE超越所有原生方法，表明原生读出是兼容性原则而非最优性保证。忠实度排名是(模型, 解释器, 扰动算子)三元组的联合属性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业视觉检测中深度分类器的热力图解释可能视觉上合理但实际未能识别驱动模型决策的图像区域，现有方法缺乏对解释忠实度的系统性审计协议。

Method: 提出架构感知的解释审计协议，基于原生读出假设；采用三种子零填充扰动协议在WM-811K数据集上比较ViT-Tiny+Attention Rollout、Swin-Tiny/ResNet18+CBAM/DenseNet121+Grad-CAM等组合；使用模型无关控制方法RISE作为基线；进行模糊填充敏感性分析和MVTec AD边界条件研究。

Result: ViT-Tiny+Attention Rollout的Deletion AUC达0.211，显著优于其他组合（0.432-0.525）；RISE将所有架构压缩至AUC约0.1并超越所有原生方法；扰动基线改变会导致家族排序反转；MVTec AD上结果具有数据集/任务依赖性。

Conclusion: 解释通路应与模型架构基于读出结构协同设计，部署的热力图应附带定量忠实度指标；忠实度是(模型, 解释器, 扰动算子)三元组的联合属性，不存在普适最优组合。

Abstract: Industrial visual inspection systems increasingly rely on deep classifiers whose heatmap explanations may appear visually plausible while failing to identify the image regions that actually drive model decisions. This paper operationalizes an architecture-aware explanation audit protocol grounded in the native-readout hypothesis: the perturbation-based faithfulness of an explanation method is bounded by its structural distance from the model's native decision mechanism. On WM-811K wafer maps (9 classes, 172k images) under a three-seed zero-fill perturbation protocol, ViT-Tiny + Attention Rollout attains Deletion AUC 0.211 against 0.432-0.525 for Swin-Tiny / ResNet18+CBAM / DenseNet121 + Grad-CAM (abs(Cohen's d) > 1.1), despite lower classification accuracy. Swin-Tiny disentangles architecture family from readout structure: despite being a Transformer, its spatial feature-map hierarchy makes it Grad-CAM compatible, showing that the operative factor is readout structure rather than architecture family. A model-agnostic control (RISE) compresses all families to Deletion AUC about 0.1, indicating the gap arises from the explainer pathway; notably, RISE outperforms all native methods, so native readout is a compatibility principle rather than an optimality guarantee. A blur-fill sensitivity analysis shows that the family ordering reverses under a different perturbation baseline, reinforcing that faithfulness rankings are joint properties of (model, explainer, perturbation operator) triples. An exploratory boundary-condition study on MVTec AD (pretrained models) indicates that audit results are dataset/task dependent and identifies conditions requiring qualification. The protocol yields actionable guidance: explanation pathways should be co-designed with model architectures based on readout structure, and deployed heatmaps should be accompanied by quantitative faithfulness metrics.

</details>


### [495] [Data-Augmented Game Starts for Accelerating Self-Play Exploration in Imperfect Information Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14379)
*JB Lanier,Nathan Monette,Pierre Baldi,Roy Fox*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出数据增强游戏起点(DAGS)方法，通过从离线人类演示中采样中间状态来初始化强化学习数据收集，加速两人零和博弈中的策略梯度方法探索，在固定计算预算下实现更低的可利用度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模不完美信息博弈(如StarCraft、Dota)因稀疏奖励和长时域探索困难而难以求得近似均衡，现有方法计算开销过大。

Method: 提出DAGS策略：利用离线人类演示数据覆盖高水平策略，从中采样中间状态作为RL数据采集的起点；同时引入多任务观测标志来缓解状态分布偏移导致的均衡偏差。

Result: 在Kuhn Poker、Goofspiel等基准上，DAGS使正则化策略梯度方法在固定计算预算下实现了更低的exploitability；同时释放了更具探索挑战性的新基准环境。

Conclusion: DAGS能有效加速不完美信息博弈中的探索，但需注意分布偏移可能引入均衡偏差，多任务观测标志是有效的缓解手段。

Abstract: Finding approximate equilibria for large-scale imperfect-information competitive games such as StarCraft, Dota, and CounterStrike remains computationally infeasible due to sparse rewards and challenging exploration over long horizons. In this paper, we propose a multi-agent starting-state sampling strategy designed to substantially accelerate online exploration in regularized policy-gradient game methods for two-player zero-sum (2p0s) games. Motivated by an assumption that offline demonstrations from skilled humans can provide good coverage of high-level strategies relevant to equilibrium play, we propose the initialization of reinforcement learning data collection at intermediate states sampled from offline data to facilitate exploration of strategically relevant subgames. Referring to this method as Data-Augmented Game Starts (DAGS), we perform experiments using synthetic datasets and analytically tractable, long-horizon control variants of two-player Kuhn Poker, Goofspiel, and a counterexample game designed to penalize biased beliefs over hidden information. Under fixed computational budgets, DAGS enables regularized policy gradient methods to achieve lower exploitability in games with significantly more challenging exploration. We show that augmenting starting state distributions when solving imperfect information games can lead to biased equilibria, and we provide a straightforward mitigation to this in the form of multi-task observation flags. Finally, we release a new set of benchmark environments that drastically increase exploration challenges and state counts in existing OpenSpiel games while keeping exploitability measurements analytically tractable.

</details>


### [496] [REALM: Retrospective Encoder Alignment for LFP Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14867)
*Peicheng Wu,Zhenyu Bu,Runze Ma,Lin Du*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出REALM，一个回顾性知识蒸馏框架，将双向Mamba-2教师模型的表征知识迁移到因果学生模型中，实现基于局部场电位（LFP）的实时行为解码，在参数减少2倍、训练时间减少10倍的情况下超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尖峰信号的高采样频率导致高功耗和高带宽需求，成为高通量无线脑机接口的瓶颈。LFP虽具有稳定性好、能耗低等优势，但基于LFP的解码模型精度较差且多为非因果架构，无法用于实时部署。

Method: 1) 预训练双向Mamba-2教师模型（掩码自编码目标）；2) 通过表征对齐+任务监督的联合目标，将教师蒸馏到紧凑的因果学生模型中。

Result: REALM在行为解码任务上一致超越因果和非因果的LFP最优方法；参数减少2倍，训练时间减少10倍，且无需依赖尖峰信号。

Conclusion: 回顾性蒸馏有效弥合了离线与实时神经解码之间的差距，LFP模型可达到有竞争力的解码性能，为下一代无线植入式BCI提供了实用且可扩展的方案。

Abstract: Spike activity has been the dominant neural signal for behavior decoding due to its high spatial and temporal resolution. However, as brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) move toward high channel counts and wireless operation, the high sampling frequency of spike signals becomes a bottleneck due to high power and bandwidth requirements. Local field potentials (LFPs) represent a different spatial-temporal scale of brain activity compared to spikes, offering key advantages including improved long-term stability, reduced energy consumption, and lower bandwidth requirement. Despite these benefits, LFP-based decoding models typically show reduced accuracy and often rely on non-causal architectures that are unsuitable for real-time deployment. To address these challenges, we propose REALM: a retrospective distillation framework that enables causal LFP decoding. Inspired by offline-to-online distillation strategies in speech recognition, REALM transfers representational knowledge from a pretrained multi-session bidirectional LFP model to a causal version for real-time deployment. We first pretrain a bidirectional Mamba-2 teacher model using a masked autoencoding objective. We then distill this teacher model into a compact student model via a combined objective of representation alignment and task supervision. REALM consistently outperforms both causal and non-causal LFP-based SOTA methods for behavior decoding. Notably, our REALM improves decoding performance while achieving a $2\times$ reduction in parameter count and a $10\times$ reduction in training time. These results demonstrate that retrospective distillation effectively bridges the gap between offline and real-time neural decoding. REALM shows that LFP-only models can achieve competitive decoding performance without reliance on spike signals, offering a practical and scalable alternative for next-generation wireless implantable BCIs.

</details>


### [497] [TopoPrimer: The Missing Topological Context in Forecasting Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15035)
*Zara Zetlin,Kayhan Moharreri,Maria Safi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: TopoPrimer是一个将全局拓扑结构显式输入给任何预测模型的框架，通过持续同调和谱Sheaf坐标提取拓扑特征，在时间序列预测中显著提升准确率（MSE最高改善7.3%），并在季节性峰值和冷启动等困难场景下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型主要关注单个序列的时间依赖性和跨序列的模式，但忽略了序列群体（series population）之间潜在的全局拓扑结构信息。作者希望将这种拓扑结构作为显式输入来提升预测效果。

Method: 1) 使用持续同调（persistent homology）和谱Sheaf坐标（spectral sheaf coordinates）从序列群体中提取拓扑特征。2) 对这些特征进行预处理（一次计算，全局使用）。3) 对于全训练模型，将其作为token输入；对于预训练模型，采用轻量级适配器（adapter）方式注入。

Result: 1) 在Chronos和TimesFM上，TopoPrimer一致提升预测精度，ECL数据集上MSE提升7.3%。2) 拓扑带来的增益在zero-shot和fine-tuned模型中几乎相同，表明拓扑与逐序列训练信号互补。3) 季节性峰值场景中，基线模型退化高达50%，TopoPrimer仅退化10%。4) 冷启动场景下，MAE降低27%。

Conclusion: 拓扑结构信息与逐序列训练信号互补，能有效提升时间序列预测的准确性和鲁棒性，尤其在困难预测场景（季节性峰值、冷启动）中优势明显。

Abstract: We introduce TopoPrimer, a framework that makes the global topological structure of the series population an explicit input
  to any forecasting model. TopoPrimer improves accuracy across diverse domains, stabilizes forecasts under seasonal demand
  spikes, and closes the cold-start gap. Precomputed once per domain via persistent homology and spectral sheaf coordinates,
  TopoPrimer deploys per token for fully-trained models and as a lightweight adapter for pre-trained backbones. Of these two
  components, sheaf coordinates are the primary accuracy driver. Across four public benchmarks on Chronos and TimesFM,
  TopoPrimer consistently improves forecasting accuracy, with gains of up to 7.3% MSE on ECL. The topology advantage persists
  with near-identical magnitude across zero-shot and fine-tuned backbones, suggesting topology and per-series training
  capture complementary signals. The gains are most pronounced in difficult regimes. Under peak seasonal demand, classical
  and zero-shot models degrade by up to 50%, while TopoPrimer stays within 10%. At cold start with no item history,
  TopoPrimer reduces MAE by 27% over a topology-free baseline.

</details>


### [498] [Phylogenetic Tree Inference with Tropical Axial Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13894)
*Chris Teska,Kurt Pasque,Ruriko Yoshida,Baran Hashemi*

Main category: q-bio.PE

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种热带轴向注意力（Tropical Axial Attention）神经推理架构，用max-plus算子替代了传统的softmax点积注意力，从而引入与动态规划对齐的分段线性结构。该模型从多物种序列比对中学习成对距离，使用ℓ1和热带对称距离度量损失以及超度量违反惩罚进行训练，利用热带Grassmannian与系统发育树空间的同构关系进行系统发育推理。实验表明该模型在分布偏移下比基线模型更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的softmax注意力机制在处理具有树状几何结构的问题（如系统发育推理）时缺乏结构性归纳偏置，无法自然地建模树度量关系。作者希望通过引入热带几何中的max-plus算子，使注意力机制具备与动态规划对齐的代数结构，从而更好地服务于系统发育推理任务。

Method: 提出热带轴向注意力（Tropical Axial Attention），用max-plus算子替代softmax点积，形成分段线性结构；结合ℓ1损失、热带对称距离度量损失和超度量违反惩罚进行训练；利用热带Grassmannian与系统发育树空间的同构关系作为理论支撑。

Result: 在DS1-DS11真实数据集上（真实树未知），热带注意力模型学习到的距离矩阵比基线模型更接近其BME诱导的树度量，表明该模型在系统发育推理任务中表现更好，尤其在分布偏移时优势明显。

Conclusion: 热带注意力是一种有效的几何归纳偏置，适用于神经系统发育推理，特别在需要保持树度量一致性和面对分布偏移时具有优势。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce a Tropical Axial Attention neural reasoning architecture that replaces vanilla softmax dot-product attention with max-plus operators, inducing a piecewise-linear structure aligned with dynamic programming formulations. From multi-species sequence alignments, our model learns all possible pairwise distances and is trained using a combination of $\ell_1$ and tropical symmetric distance metric losses with an ultrametric violation penalty. We leverage the well known isomorphic relationship between the space of all phylogenetic trees with $n$ species and tropical Grassmannian to show that tropical attention provides a natural geometric framework for phylogenetic inference.
  On empirical $DS1-DS11$ alignments, where true trees are unknown, the tropical model produces distance matrices that are substantially closer to their BME-induced tree metrics than the baseline models. These results suggest that tropical attention is a useful geometric inductive bias for neural phylogenetic inference, especially under distribution shift and when tree-metric consistency is important.

</details>


### [499] [ForcingDAS: Unified and Robust Data Assimilation via Diffusion Forcing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14285)
*Yixuan Jia,Siyi Chen,Yida Pan,Xiao Li,Lianghe Shi,Chanyong Jung,Haijie Yuan,Ismail Alkhouri,Yue Cynthia Wu,Saiprasad Ravishankar,Jeffrey A Fessler,Qing Qu*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ForcingDAS，一种基于扩散强迫（Diffusion Forcing）的统一数据同化框架。它通过学习联合轨迹先验替代逐帧转移模型，捕获长时程依赖并减少误差累积；同时，同一模型可通过推理调度实现从滤波（实时预报）到平滑（回顾性再分析）的全谱系任务，无需重新训练。在2D Navier-Stokes、降水预报和全球大气状态估计上，单模型在多个任务上达到或超越了专门化的基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据同化方法存在两个问题：(1) 基于逐帧转移的滤波模型在非马尔可夫观测（如真实气象数据）下易积累长时程误差；(2) 学习型DA方法通常固定于单一模式（滤波或平滑），无法共享先验知识，导致不同应用场景需独立训练。因此需要一种统一且鲁棒的DA框架。

Method: 基于Diffusion Forcing构建，为每一帧分配独立的噪声等级，学习联合轨迹先验而非逐帧转移；推理时通过调度噪声等级来实现不同的同化模式（nowcasting、fixed-lag smoothing、batch reanalysis），无需重新训练。

Result: 在2D Navier-Stokes、降水预报和全球大气状态估计三个任务上，单模型在多个同化模式下均能与专门化方法竞争或超越，尤其在真实气象基准上提升最为显著。

Conclusion: ForcingDAS证明了通过联合轨迹先验和扩散强迫框架，可以统一滤波与平滑范式，解决非马尔可夫观测下的误差累积问题，为数据同化提供了一种灵活、高效的统一方案。

Abstract: Data assimilation (DA) estimates the state of an evolving dynamical system from noisy, partial observations, and is widely used in scientific simulation as well as weather and climate science. In practice, filtering methods rely on frame-to-frame transition models. However, these models are fragile when observations are non-Markovian (when they form only a partial slice of a higher-dimensional latent state as in real-world weather data): they tend to accumulate errors over long horizons. At the same time, learned DA methods typically commit to a single regime, either filtering (nowcasting, real-time forecasting) or smoothing (retrospective reanalysis), which splits what should be a shared prior across application-specific pipelines. To address both issues, we introduce ForcingDAS, a unified and robust DA framework. Built on Diffusion Forcing with an independent noise level assigned to each frame, ForcingDAS learns a joint-trajectory prior instead of frame-to-frame transitions. This allows it to capture long-horizon temporal dependencies and reduce error accumulation. In addition, the same trained model spans the full filtering to smoothing spectrum at inference time. Specifically, nowcasting, fixed-lag smoothing, and batch reanalysis are selected through the inference schedule alone, without retraining. We evaluate ForcingDAS on 2D Navier-Stokes vorticity, precipitation nowcasting, and global atmospheric state estimation. Across all settings, a single model is competitive with or outperforms both learned and classical baselines that are specialized for individual regimes, with the largest gains observed on real-world weather benchmarks.

</details>


### [500] [Angel or Demon: Investigating the Plasticity Interventions' Impact on Backdoor Threats in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14587)
*Oubo Ma,Ruixiao Lin,Yang Dai,Jiahao Chen,Chunyi Zhou,Linkang Du,Shouling Ji*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本论文系统研究了14,664种情况下，现代深度强化学习中必要的可塑性干预（如SAM等）对后门攻击的影响，发现大多数干预能缓解后门威胁，但SAM会通过梯度放大加剧威胁，并据此提出了SCC概念框架和后门检测指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后门攻击研究主要关注基础DRL场景，但现代DRL代理普遍集成了可塑性干预组件，这些干预对后门漏洞的影响尚未被系统性研究，存在实际部署风险。

Method: 通过大规模实证研究（14,664个案例），系统整合代表性可塑性干预和后门攻击场景，并进行病理学分析（包括梯度放大、激活通路中断、表示空间压缩等机制）。

Result: （1）除SAM外，大多数可塑性干预能缓解后门威胁；（2）SAM通过后门梯度放大加剧威胁；（3）缓解机制源于激活通路中断和表示空间压缩。

Conclusion: 提出了SCC概念框架用于解构干预与后门之间的机制交互，并发现异常损失景观锐度可作为DRL后门检测的关键指标。

Abstract: Extensive research has highlighted the severe threats posed by backdoor attacks to deep reinforcement learning (DRL). However, prior studies primarily focus on vanilla scenarios, while plasticity interventions have emerged as indispensable built-in components of modern DRL agents. Despite their effectiveness in mitigating plasticity loss, the impact of these interventions on DRL backdoor vulnerabilities remains underexplored, and this lack of systematic investigation poses risks in practical DRL deployments. To bridge this gap, we empirically study 14,664 cases integrating representative interventions and attack scenarios. We find that only one intervention (i.e., SAM) exacerbates backdoor threats, while other interventions mitigate them. Pathological analysis identifies that the exacerbation is attributed to backdoor gradient amplification, while the mitigation stems from activation pathway disruption and representation space compression. From these findings, we derive two novel insights: (1) a conceptual framework SCC for robust backdoor injection that deconstructs the mechanistic interplay between interventions and backdoors in DRL, and (2) abnormal loss landscape sharpness as a key indicator for DRL backdoor detection.

</details>


### [501] [Spontaneous symmetry breaking and Goldstone modes for deep information propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14685)
*Nabil Iqbal,T. Anderson Keller,Yue Song,Takeru Miyato,Max Welling*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度神经网络中连续对称性自发破缺产生的类似Goldstone模式的激发，这些自由度能够在前馈和循环网络中实现稳定的长距离信号传播，无需残差连接或归一化等架构稳定器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索深度神经网络中是否可以利用连续对称性（类似于物理系统中的Goldstone模式）来实现无需残差连接或归一化的稳定信息传播机制，从而改进网络的可训练性和长程建模能力。

Method: 理论分析结合实验验证：证明内部层具有连续对称等变性的深度神经网络可以支持类似Goldstone模式的自由度；在前馈网络和循环网络（RNN、GRU）中分别验证这种自由度对信号传播、可训练性和长序列建模性能的影响。

Result: 前馈网络中，这种机制改善了可训练性和层间表示多样性；循环网络中，该机制能有效传播信息跨越循环迭代，提升RNN和GRU在长序列建模任务上的性能。

Conclusion: 连续对称性破缺产生的Goldstone模式为深度网络提供了一种替代架构稳定器（如残差连接、归一化）的信号传播机制，为设计更高效的神经网络架构提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: In physical systems, whenever a continuous symmetry is spontaneously broken, the system possesses excitations called Goldstone modes, which allow coherent information propagation over long distances and times. In this work, we study deep neural networks whose internal layers are equivariant under a continuous symmetry and may therefore support analogous Goldstone-like degrees of freedom. We demonstrate, both analytically and empirically, that these degrees of freedom enable coherent signal propagation across depth and recurrent iterations, providing a mechanism for stable information flow without relying on architectural stabilizers such as residual connections or normalization. In feedforward networks, this results in improved trainability and representational diversity across layers. In recurrent settings, we demonstrate the same mechanism is valuable for long-term memory by propagating information over recurrent iterations, thereby improving performance of RNNs and GRUs on long-sequence modeling tasks.

</details>


### [502] [Critic-Driven Voronoi-Quantization for Distilling Deep RL Policies to Explainable Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14897)
*Senne Deproost,Denis Steckelmacher,Ann Nowé*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为"Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning"的模型无关方法，通过利用原始策略的critic价值网络，迭代地在价值不足的区域引入新的子策略，使用Voronoi量化器将状态空间划分为单元，每个单元分配一个线性函数，从而在保持可解释性的同时逼近黑箱控制策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于蒸馏的深度强化学习策略解释方法难以平衡性能与可解释性，且传统蒸馏忽略了动作价值等RL特有成分，因此需要一种能同时考虑性能和解释性的新方法。

Method: 提出Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning方法：利用原始策略的critic价值网络，迭代地在价值不足的区域引入新子策略；使用Voronoi量化器进行状态空间划分，通过最近邻查找为每个状态点分配线性函数，形成类似细胞图的结构。

Result: 在多个知名基准测试上验证了方法的有效性，证明了该蒸馏方法可以使用合理数量的线性函数逼近原始策略。

Conclusion: 该方法通过引入critic价值网络指导划分过程，在保持可解释性的同时有效逼近了黑箱策略，平衡了性能与可解释性的权衡。

Abstract: Despite many successful attempts at explaining Deep Reinforcement Learning policies using distillation, it remains difficult to balance the performance-interpretability trade-off and select a fitting surrogate model. In addition to this, traditional distillation only minimizes the distance between the behavior of the original and the surrogate policy while other RL-specific components such as action value are disregarded.
