To solve this, we introduce a new model-agnostic method called Critic-Driven Voronoi State Partitioning, which partitions a black box control policy into regions where a simple class of model can be optimized using gradient descent. By exploiting the critic value network of the original policy, we iteratively introduce new subpolicies in regions with insufficient value, standing in for a measure of policy complexity. The partitioning, a Voronoi quantizer, uses nearest neighbor lookups to assign a linear function to each point in the state space resulting in a cell-like diagram. We validate our approach on several well known benchmarks and proof that this distillation approaches the original policy using a reasonable sized set of linear functions.

</details>


### [503] [Rethinking Molecular OOD Generalization via Target-Aware Source Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13932)
*Zhuohao Lin,Kun Li,Jiameng Chen,Jiajun Yu,Duanhua Cao,Yizhen Zheng,Wenbin Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SCOPE-BENCH基准（基于理化描述符空间的簇级划分）和POMA框架（强化学习驱动的多源域适应），用于解决分子性质预测中的极端分布外泛化问题。实验表明现有3D模型误差飙升最高8倍，POMA平均MAE降低6.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有scaffold划分方法无法消除微观语义重叠，导致模型通过捷径学习高估外推能力；传统域适应在极端结构偏移下因盲目对齐引入拓扑噪声，产生负迁移。

Method: 1) SCOPE-BENCH：在显式理化描述符空间进行簇级划分，避免语义重叠；2) POMA：检索-组合-适应三阶段框架，用RL策略从指数级候选池中自适应选择最优源域子集，在宏观拓扑和微观药效团双尺度进行域适应。

Result: SOTA 3D分子模型在SCOPE-BENCH上误差飙升平均5.9倍（最高8倍）；POMA在不同骨干架构上平均MAE降低6.2%，最高达11.2%。

Conclusion: 现有分子OOD评估方法高估了模型能力，SCOPE-BENCH提供了更严格的基准；POMA通过RL引导的自适应多源迁移有效缓解极端OOD下的负迁移问题。

Abstract: Robust prediction of molecular properties under extreme out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios is a pivotal bottleneck in AI-driven drug discovery. Current scaffold-splitting protocols fail to obstruct microscopic semantic overlap, predisposing models to shortcut learning and overestimating their true extrapolation capability; meanwhile, conventional domain adaptation paradigms suffer under extreme structural shifts, as blindly aligning heterogeneous source libraries injects topological noise and triggers negative transfer. To address these two challenges, scaffold-cluster out-of-distribution performance evaluation benchmark (SCOPE-BENCH), a benchmark built on cluster-level partitioning in an explicit physicochemical descriptor space, is proposed alongside policy optimization for multi-source adaptation (POMA), a framework that formulates knowledge transfer as a retrieve-compose-adapt pipeline: labeled source scaffolds structurally close to the unlabeled target are first identified as proxy targets; a reinforcement learning policy then adaptively selects the optimal source subset from an exponentially large candidate pool; and dual-scale domain adaptation is finally performed at macroscopic topological and microscopic pharmacophore scales. Evaluations show that prediction errors of state-of-the-art 3D molecular models surge by up to 8.0x on SCOPE-BENCH with a mean of 5.9x, while POMA achieves up to an 11.2% reduction in mean absolute error with an average relative improvement of 6.2% across diverse backbone architectures. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Molecular-OOD-Code-73F6.

</details>


### [504] [WarmPrior: Straightening Flow-Matching Policies with Temporal Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13959)
*Sinjae Kang,Chanyoung Kim,Kaixin Wang,Li Zhao,Kimin Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出WarmPrior，一种基于近期动作历史的时间接地先验分布，替代标准高斯分布用于扩散/流匹配的机器人控制策略，在操作任务中提升了成功率，并改善了强化学习的样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式机器人控制策略（基于扩散模型和流匹配）均使用标准高斯分布作为源分布，但这一选择是否最优未被充分探索。本文旨在揭示源分布作为一个重要的设计维度，并提出更有效的先验形式。

Method: 提出WarmPrior，利用近期动作历史构建一个时间接地的高斯先验分布，替代标准高斯分布作为扩散/流匹配生成过程中的源分布。该方法可应用于行为克隆和先验空间强化学习。

Result: 在机器人操作任务上持续提升成功率，产生了显著更直的概率路径（类似于Rectified Flow中最优传输耦合的效果），在先验空间强化学习中同时提升了样本效率和最终性能。

Conclusion: 源分布是生成式机器人控制中一个重要但未被充分探索的设计轴，WarmPrior作为一种简单有效的改进，值得进一步研究。

Abstract: Generative policies based on diffusion and flow matching have become a dominant paradigm for visuomotor robotic control. We show that replacing the standard Gaussian source distribution with WarmPrior, a simple temporally grounded prior constructed from readily available recent action history, consistently improves success rates on robotic manipulation tasks. We trace this gain to markedly straighter probability paths, echoing the effect of optimal-transport couplings in Rectified Flow. Beyond standard behavior cloning, WarmPrior also reshapes the exploration distribution in prior-space reinforcement learning, improving both sample efficiency and final performance. Collectively, these results identify the source distribution as an important and underexplored design axis in generative robot control.

</details>


### [505] [Neural Fields for NV-Center Inverse Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13988)
*Zhixuan Zhao,Tao Zhong,Yixun Hu,Nathalie P. de Leon,Christine Allen-Blanchette*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文针对NV量子传感中的逆问题，提出了一种名为NeTMY的无摊销坐标神经场方法，通过可微正向模型、退火位置编码、多尺度优化、稀疏化门控和频谱保真损失等技术，解决了自由密度优化中的中心坍塌问题，在稀疏合成重建中取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学传感中的逆问题常因非线性、光谱耦合和物理敏感性失效。具体到NV色心量子传感，传统方法（人工正则化器或监督网络）在处理稀疏自旋源的磁噪声谱重建时表现不佳，自由密度优化存在中心坍塌问题。

Method: 提出NeTMY方法：1) 用张量幂和偶极算符替代标量/相干前向近似；2) 无摊销坐标神经场耦合可微NV正向模型；3) 退火位置编码与多尺度优化；4) 稀疏/门控机制；5) 频谱保真损失函数。

Result: 在修正算子生成的稀疏合成重建基准上，NeTMY在定位指标和分布指标上均达到最优。机制实验表明，NeTMY通过参数化平滑和重新分布梯度更新，有效缓解了中心坍塌病理现象。

Conclusion: NeTMY为NV量子传感提供了一种物理保真的神经逆问题求解方案，并将NV量子传感定位为物理忠实神经逆问题的有用测试平台。

Abstract: Inverse problems in scientific sensing are often solved with either hand-designed regularizers or supervised networks trained on simulated labels, yet both can fail when the forward model is nonlinear, spectrally coupled, and physically delicate. We study this issue for noise sensing based on nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond, where a quantum sensor measures magnetic-noise spectra generated by sparse spin sources. We show that replacing a common scalar/coherent forward approximation with a tensor power-summed dipolar operator changes the inverse landscape and exposes a center-collapse failure mode in free-density optimization. We propose NeTMY, an amortization-free coordinate neural field coupled to the differentiable NV forward model, with annealed positional encoding, multiscale optimization, sparsity/gating, and spectrum-fidelity losses. Across sparse synthetic reconstructions generated by the corrected operator, NeTMY achieves the best localization and distributional metrics in the tested benchmark. Mechanism experiments show that NeTMY does not directly execute the raw density-space gradient; its parameterization smooths and redistributes updates, mitigating the center-collapse pathology. These results position NV quantum sensing as a useful testbed for physics-faithful neural inverse problems.

</details>


### [506] [A Systematic Evaluation of Imbalance Handling Methods in Biomedical Binary Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14147)
*Jiandong Chen,Lingjie Su,Le Peng,Yash Travadi,Rui Zhang,Ju Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 系统研究了五种不平衡处理方法在生物医学二分类任务中的效果，发现其有效性依赖于模型复杂度和数据模态：对简单模型无显著提升，但对复杂模型（如BERT、DenseNet）效果明显，其中随机过采样、重加权和F1直接优化有效，而随机欠采样和SMOTE效果差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统性地探究不平衡处理方法在生物医学二分类中的实际效果，特别是模型复杂度与不同数据模态（表格、文本、图像）之间的交互作用。

Method: 在MIMIC-III（表格）、ADE-Corpus-V2（文本）和MURA（图像）三个数据集上，评估RUS、ROS、SMOTE、RW、DMO五种不平衡处理方法，对比从逻辑回归到BERT/DINOv2等不同复杂度模型的性能。

Result: (1) 简单模型不受IHM影响；(2) ROS和RW对复杂模型有效；(3) DMO对非结构化数据有效；(4) RUS和SMOTE持续降低性能，不推荐使用。

Conclusion: IHM的有效性依赖于模型复杂度和数据模态，推荐对高复杂度模型使用ROS、RW和DMO。

Abstract: Objective: The primary goal of this study was to systematically examine the impact of commonly used imbalance handling methods (IHMs) on predictive performance in biomedical binary classification, considering the interplay between model complexity and diverse data modalities.
  Material and Methods: We evaluated five representative IHMs: random undersampling (RUS), random oversampling (ROS), SMOTE, re-weighting (RW), and direct F1-score optimization (DMO), against a raw training (RAW) baseline. The evaluation encompassed three public biomedical datasets: MIMIC-III (tabular), ADE-Corpus-V2 (text), and MURA (image), spanning three common biomedical data modalities. To assess varying model complexity, we employed a range of architectures, from classical logistic regression and random forest to deep neural networks, including multilayer perceptron (MLP), BiLSTM, BERT, DenseNet, and DINOv2.
  Results: For simpler models such as logistic regression on tabular data, IHMs yielded no significant advantage over the RAW baseline, aligning with prior findings. However, clear benefits were observed for more complex models and unstructured data: (a) ROS and RW consistently enhanced the performance of powerful models; (b) direct F1-score optimization demonstrated utility primarily for unstructured text and image data; and (c) RUS and SMOTE consistently degraded performance and are therefore not recommended.
  Conclusion: The effectiveness of IHMs depends on both model complexity and data modality. Performance gains are most pronounced when leveraging appropriate IHMs, such as ROS, RW, and DMO, on high-complexity models.

</details>


### [507] [Uncovering Trajectory and Topological Signatures in Multimodal Pediatric Sleep Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14156)
*Scott Ye,Harlin Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究多模态掩码自编码器在儿科睡眠分析中的嵌入表示，发现通过PHATE几何特征、持久同源拓扑特征和EHR临床特征可以补充嵌入信息，使用简单线性/MLP模型在四个二元预测任务上提升了AUPRC（0.05→0.14到0.31→0.48不等），并改善了校准性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型在儿科睡眠分析中虽有潜力，但其多模态嵌入的潜在结构尚未被充分理解，论文旨在探索嵌入空间中隐藏的诊断信息。

Method: 使用多模态掩码自编码器处理30秒儿科PSG时段，提取嵌入后补充PHATE每时段坐标、全夜运动描述符、持久同源拓扑摘要和EHR特征，用线性模型和MLP进行二分类预测。

Result: 几何、拓扑和临床特征提供互补增益；晚期融合模型表现更好，AUPRC在去饱和度任务从0.26提升至0.34，EEG觉醒从0.31到0.48，低通气从0.09到0.22，呼吸暂停从0.05到0.14；全融合模型校准最佳。

Conclusion: 潜在几何/拓扑特征和EHR提供互补的可解释信号，能在极端不平衡条件下改善校准和鲁棒性。

Abstract: While generative models have shown promise in pediatric sleep analysis, the latent structure of their multimodal embeddings remains poorly understood. This work investigates session-wide diagnostic information contained in the sequences of 30-second pediatric PSG epochs embedded by a multimodal masked autoencoder. We test whether augmenting embeddings with PHATE-derived per-epoch coordinates and whole-night movement descriptors, persistent homology summaries of the embedding cloud, and EHR yields task-relevant signals. Simple linear and MLP models, chosen for interpretability rather than state-of-the-art performance, show that geometric, topological, and clinical features each provide complementary gains. For binary predictions, feature importance is task-dependent, and more expressive late-fusion models generally perform better, with AUPRC improving from 0.26 to 0.34 for desaturation, 0.31 to 0.48 for EEG arousal, 0.09 to 0.22 for hypopnea, and 0.05 to 0.14 for apnea. We also report Brier score and Expected Calibration Error, where the full fusion model yields the best calibration across all four binary tasks. Our study reveals that latent geometry/topology and EHR offer complementary, interpretable signals beyond embeddings, improving calibration and robustness under extreme imbalance.

</details>


### [508] [DT-Transformer: A Foundation Model for Disease Trajectory Prediction on a Real-world Health System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14227)
*Yunying Zhu,Andrew R Weckstein,Kueiyu Joshua Lin,Jie Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了DT-Transformer，一个在包含57.1M结构化EHR条目、覆盖170万患者和11家医院的大规模健康系统数据上训练的基础模型，用于疾病轨迹预测。模型在896种疾病类别的下一事件预测中，年龄和性别分层后的中位AUC达到0.871，所有类别AUC均超过0.5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有疾病轨迹预测模型主要存在两个问题：一是基于精心整理的研究队列训练的模型无法反映实际部署场景；二是基于单医院数据集训练的模型只能捕获患者轨迹的片段。因此，需要利用大规模多医院健康系统数据进行训练和验证，以更好反映真实临床复杂性。

Method: 构建DT-Transformer基础模型，在Mass General Brigham（MGB）系统的57.1M结构化EHR条目（覆盖170万患者、11家医院及广泛门诊网络）上进行训练，用于疾病轨迹的下一个事件预测。

Result: 在保留验证和前瞻性验证中均表现出强判别能力。在896种疾病类别的下一事件预测中，年龄和性别分层后的中位AUC达到0.871，所有类别AUC均超过0.5。

Conclusion: 健康系统级别的大规模训练是构建适用于真实临床预测的基础模型的有效路径。

Abstract: Accurate disease trajectory prediction is critical for early intervention, resource allocation, and improving long-term outcomes. While electronic health records (EHRs) provide a rich longitudinal view of patient health in clinical environments, models trained on curated research cohorts may not reflect routine deployment settings, and those trained on single-hospital datasets capture only fragments of each patient's trajectory. This highlights the importance of leveraging large, multi-hospital health systems for training and validation to better reflect real-world clinical complexity. In this work, we develop DT-Transformer, a foundation model trained on 57.1M structured EHR entries over 1.7M patients from Mass General Brigham (MGB), spanning 11 hospitals and a broad network of outpatient clinics. DT-Transformer achieves strong discrimination in both held-out and prospective validation settings. Next-event prediction achieves a median age- and sex-stratified AUC of 0.871 across 896 disease categories, with all categories exceeding AUC 0.5. These results support health system-scale training as a path toward foundation models suited to real-world clinical forecasting.

</details>


### [509] [Policy Optimization in Hybrid Discrete-Continuous Action Spaces via Mixed Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14297)
*Matias Alvo,Daniel Russo,Yash Kanoria*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出混合策略优化（HPO）方法，通过结合路径梯度和得分函数梯度的混合梯度估计器，解决离散-连续混合动作空间中的强化学习问题，在库存控制和切换线性二次型调节器问题上显著优于PPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准策略梯度方法在高维混合动作空间中面临严重的信用分配问题，而可微分模拟器在存在离散动作或非光滑动力学时会产生有偏梯度。需要一种既能利用可微分模拟器的优势，又能处理离散动作的混合方法。

Method: 提出HPO算法，通过混合梯度估计器结合路径梯度（通过可微分模拟器反向传播）和得分函数梯度，在保持无偏性的同时处理离散动作。还将具有动作不连续性的问题重新表述为混合形式以扩展适用性。

Result: 在库存控制和切换线性二次型调节器问题上，HPO大幅优于PPO，且性能差距随连续动作维度增加而扩大。混合梯度的交叉项在接近离散最优响应时可忽略，从而允许近似的去中心化更新并降低方差。

Conclusion: HPO通过混合梯度估计有效解决了混合动作空间中的信用分配问题，在相关任务上显著优于现有方法，且理论分析揭示了其近最优性下的方差减少特性。

Abstract: We study reinforcement learning in hybrid discrete-continuous action spaces, such as settings where the discrete component selects a regime (or index) and the continuous component optimizes within it -- a structure common in robotics, control, and operations problems. Standard model-free policy gradient methods rely on score-function (SF) estimators and suffer from severe credit-assignment issues in high-dimensional settings, leading to poor gradient quality. On the other hand, differentiable simulation largely sidesteps these issues by backpropagating through a simulator, but the presence of discrete actions or non-smooth dynamics yields biased or uninformative gradients. To address this, we propose Hybrid Policy Optimization (HPO), which backpropagates through the simulator wherever smoothness permits, using a mixed gradient estimator that combines pathwise and SF gradients while maintaining unbiasedness. We also show how problems with action discontinuities can be reformulated in hybrid form, further broadening its applicability. Empirically, HPO substantially outperforms PPO on inventory control and switched linear-quadratic regulator problems, with performance gaps increasing as the continuous action dimension grows. Finally, we characterize the structure of the mixed gradient, showing that its cross term -- which captures how continuous actions influence future discrete decisions -- becomes negligible near a discrete best response, thereby enabling approximate decentralized updates of the continuous and discrete components and reducing variance near optimality. All resources are available at github.com/MatiasAlvo/hybrid-rl.

</details>


### [510] [Woodelf++: A Fast and Unified Partial Dependence Plot Algorithm for Decision Tree Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14578)
*Ron Wettenstein,Alexander Nadel,Udi Boker*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Woodelf++，一个统一且高效的框架，用于在决策树集成模型上计算部分依赖图（PDP）、联合PDP、任意阶部分依赖交互值（Any-Order-PDIVs）以及全PDP等可解释性工具，相比现有方法实现了显著的复杂度改进（包括指数级加速），并在大规模数据集上验证了其效率优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PDP、Joint-PDP和PDIV等可解释性工具在实践中被广泛使用，但它们的高效计算面临挑战，尤其是任意阶交互值（Any-Order-PDIVs）的计算复杂度极高。现有方法在计算效率上存在瓶颈，无法很好地在大型数据集上实时应用。

Method: 基于Woodelf（用于高效计算SHAP的算法），通过推导伪布尔函数上的合适度量，Woodelf++将PDP（精确和近似）、Joint-PDP和Any-Order-PDIVs统一到一个框架中计算。还引入并高效计算了Full PDP，利用模型的分裂阈值捕捉所有可能特征值上的行为。实现为纯Python代码并支持GPU加速。

Result: 在400,000行数据集上，Woodelf++计算PDP和Joint-PDP比现有技术快6倍，比scikit-learn快五个数量级。对于Any-Order-PDIVs，Woodelf++在5分钟内完成所有交互值计算，而现有技术估计需要超过1,000,000年。

Conclusion: Woodelf++提供了一个统一、高效且可扩展的决策树集成模型可解释性工具计算框架，尤其在大数据量和任意阶交互计算场景下展示了压倒性的效率优势。

Abstract: Partial Dependence Plots (PDPs) visualize how changes in a single feature affect the average model prediction. They are widely used in practice to interpret decision tree ensembles and other machine learning models. Joint-PDPs extend this idea to pairs of features, revealing their combined effect. Partial Dependence Interaction Values (PDIVs) measure feature interactions. The Any-Order-PDIVs task computes these interactions for every feature subset across all rows of the dataset.
  We introduce Woodelf++, a unified and efficient approach for computing all these useful explainability tools on decision tree ensembles, building on Woodelf, an algorithm for efficient SHAP computation. By deriving suitable metrics over pseudo-Boolean functions, Woodelf++ can compute PDPs (exact and approximate), Joint-PDPs, and Any-Order-PDIVs in a unified framework. Our method delivers substantial complexity improvements over the state of the art, including an exponential gain for Any-Order-PDIVs. Additionally, we introduce and efficiently compute Full PDPs, which leverage the model's split thresholds to faithfully capture its behavior across all possible feature values.
  Woodelf++ is implemented in pure Python and supports GPU acceleration. On a dataset with 400,000 rows, Woodelf++ computes PDP and Joint-PDP up to 6x faster than the state of the art and up to five orders of magnitude faster than scikit-learn. For Any-Order-PDIVs, the gap is even larger: Woodelf++ computes all interaction values in 5 minutes, while the state of the art is estimated to require over 1,000,000 years.

</details>


### [511] [Fast Rates for Inverse Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14599)
*Andreas Schlaginhaufen,Maryam Kamgarpour*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了带熵正则化的最小-最大逆强化学习（Min-Max-IRL），在线性奖励函数类、有限时域MDP（Borel状态和动作空间）下，建立了结构和统计上的新结果。结构上证明最大似然估计（MLE）与Min-Max-IRL在总体层面等价；统计上证明轨迹级KL散度和参数误差以快速率O(1/n)衰减，且不要求探索假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 逆强化学习（IRL）旨在从专家轨迹中推断奖励函数，但现有工作在统计收敛速率和理论保证上仍有不足。本文希望建立Min-Max-IRL在一般Borel空间下的结构等价性（与MLE的关系）以及更优的统计收敛速率。

Method: 1) 从理论上证明MLE与Min-Max-IRL的等价性（总体层面及确定性动力学下的经验层面）；2) 利用伪自一致性（pseudo-self-concordance）性质分析Min-Max-IRL损失函数；3) 推导轨迹级KL散度和Hessian范数下平方参数误差的O(1/n)收敛速率；4) 将奖励可识别性结果推广到一般Borel空间，并推导软最优值函数对奖励参数的导数新结果。

Result: 1) 证明了MLE与Min-Max-IRL在总体层面的等价性；2) 轨迹级KL散度和Hessian范数下的平方参数误差均以O(1/n)的快速率衰减；3) 结果适用于模型误指定情况且无需探索假设；4) 奖励可识别性结果扩展至一般Borel空间。

Conclusion: 本文为Min-Max-IRL提供了更坚实的理论基础，包括与MLE的等价性以及最优的统计收敛速率，为逆强化学习在更一般环境下的应用提供了理论保障。

Abstract: We establish novel structural and statistical results for entropy-regularized min-max inverse reinforcement learning (Min-Max-IRL) with linear reward classes in finite-horizon MDPs with Borel state and action spaces. On the structural side, we show that maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) and Min-Max-IRL are equivalent at the population level, and at the empirical level under deterministic dynamics. On the statistical side, exploiting pseudo-self-concordance of the Min-Max-IRL loss, we prove that both the trajectory-level KL divergence and the squared parameter error in the Hessian norm decay at the fast rate $\mathcal{O}(n^{-1})$, where $n$ is the number of expert trajectories. Our guarantees apply under misspecification and require no exploration assumptions. We further extend reward-identifiability results to general Borel spaces and derive novel results on the derivatives of the soft-optimal value function with respect to reward parameters.

</details>


### [512] [AQKA: Active Quantum Kernel Acquisition Under a Shot Budget](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14672)
*Jian Xu,Chao Li,Delu Zeng,John Paisley,Qibin Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应量子核分配方法AQKA，通过非均匀分配测量shots（理论最优分配$s_{ij}^{\star} \propto |g_{ij}|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$），在预算受限的量子核学习中显著优于均匀分配方案，在真实量子硬件上获得+17~+32个百分点的提升，并提供了完整的预算区间分解与理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子核估计方法虽能通过子采样节省测量预算，但均在所选子集内均匀分配shots，忽略了不同条目对下游分类器的重要性差异。本文旨在填补这一空白，提出自适应shot分配策略以更高效利用有限测量预算。

Method: 1) 提出AQKA方法，基于闭形式的最优shot分配公式（对KRR：$s_{ij}^{\star} \propto |β_iα_j+β_jα_i|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$；对SVM：$s_{ij}^{\star} \propto |η_i^*η_j^*|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$）进行自适应分配；2) 给出完整的预算区间分解理论，明确不同预算下最优分配器的选择；3) 提出修正的稀疏感知Cauchy–Schwarz率及显式常数的plug-in遗憾界。

Result: 在预算受限场景下，AQKA在稀疏敏感KRR上比均匀分配提升8-25个百分点（N从225增至1000）；在ibm_pittsburgh（156量子位Heron）硬件核上提升26-32个百分点；在ibm_aachen（N=20）和ibm_berlin（N=30）上分别获得+17.0±4.8和+14.0±8.5个百分点的提升（5次种子实验，达3.5σ显著性）。

Conclusion: 自适应shot分配在量子核学习中是有效且必要的，AQKA在预算受限区间占据主导地位，不同预算区间存在明确的"赢家"分配策略。本文提供了首个多种子在线自适应shot分配的量子硬件实验验证。

Abstract: Estimating an $N \times N$ quantum kernel from circuit fidelities requires $Θ(N^2 S)$ measurement shots, the dominant bottleneck for deployment on near-term hardware. Existing budget-saving methods (Nyström-QKE, ShoFaR, kernel-target alignment) sub-sample \emph{which} entries to measure but allocate shots \emph{uniformly} within their chosen subset, ignoring how much each entry drives the downstream classifier. We close this gap with two contributions. \textbf{First, a complete regime decomposition} for shot-budgeted quantum kernel learning: a principled menu of when each allocator wins. Our method, \emph{AQKA}, dominates the budget-limited regime ($B \lesssim 16 n_{\mathrm{pairs}}$) on sparse-sensitivity KRR, with the gap \emph{growing} from $+8$ to $+25$ pts over uniform as $N$ scales $225{\to}1000$ and reaching $+26$--$32$ pts on an \texttt{ibm\_pittsburgh} (156-qubit Heron) hardware kernel; Nyström-QKE wins at saturating budgets on planted-sparse via low-rank reconstruction; ShoFaR is competitive only at extreme low budgets. \textbf{Second, a closed-form pair-level acquisition theory}: $s_{ij}^{\star} \propto |g_{ij}|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$ with explicit gradient $g_{ij}$ for KRR (Lemma~1, $|β_iα_j+β_jα_i|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$) and SVM via the envelope theorem ($|η_i^*η_j^*|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$); a \emph{corrected} sparsity-aware Cauchy--Schwarz rate $ρ\le 2m/N$ matching empirics (vs.\ the naive $m^2/N^2$); an explicit-constant plug-in regret bound (Theorem~2); and a tighter SVM ceiling $ρ^{\mathrm{SVM}} \le m_{\mathrm{sv}}^2/N^2$. We close with the first multi-seed live online adaptive shot allocation on quantum hardware: $+17.0 \pm 4.8$ pts at $N{=}20$ on \texttt{ibm\_aachen} ($3.5σ$, 5 seeds), with the advantage holding at $N{=}30$ at higher budget on \texttt{ibm\_berlin} ($+14.0 \pm 8.5$ pts, 5 seeds).

</details>


### [513] [Distance-Matrix Wasserstein Statistics for Scalable Gromov--Wasserstein Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14981)
*Ao Xu,Tieru Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出距离矩阵Wasserstein (DMW)距离，通过采样点对并比较其距离矩阵分布来放松并逼近Gromov-Wasserstein距离，同时提供了理论保证和可扩展的计算方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GW距离虽强大但计算复杂（非凸二次优化），难以大规模应用。本文旨在设计一种更易计算且能近似GW距离的替代度量。

Method: 提出DMW距离：从两个度量空间中各采样n个点，记录其成对距离矩阵，然后比较这些距离矩阵的Wasserstein距离。同时引入切片(sliced)和多尺度变体以提升计算效率。

Result: 理论上证明DMW是GW的下界松弛，并给出反向近似不等式；建立了有限样本界，其收敛速率取决于数据流形本征维度而非矩阵维度；实验验证了可扩展性和有效性。

Conclusion: DMW提供了一个可扩展、可解释的GW代理，适用于图分类、双样本检验等结构比较任务，且有理论保证。

Abstract: Gromov--Wasserstein (GW) distances compare graphs, shapes, and point clouds through internal distances, without requiring a common coordinate system. This invariance is powerful, but discrete GW is a nonconvex quadratic optimal transport problem and is difficult to estimate at scale. We propose \emph{Distance-Matrix Wasserstein} (DMW), a hierarchy of Wasserstein statistics comparing laws of random finite distance matrices. Rather than optimizing a global point-level alignment, DMW samples $n$ points from each space, records their pairwise distances, and transports the resulting matrix laws. We prove that DMW is a relaxation and lower bound of GW, and establish a reverse approximation inequality: the GW--DMW gap is controlled by the Wasserstein error of approximating each original measure with $n$ samples. Hence population DMW converges to GW as sampled subspaces become dense. We further give finite-sample bounds, including intrinsic-dimensional rates that depend on the data manifold rather than the ambient matrix dimension $\binom n2$. For scalable computation, we introduce sliced and multi-scale DMW; for $p=1$, the sliced multi-scale dissimilarity yields positive-definite exponential kernels. Experiments on synthetic metric spaces, scalability benchmarks, graph classification, and two-sample testing validate the theory and demonstrate an interpretable GW-style proxy for structural comparison.

</details>


### [514] [Ready from Day 1: Population-Aware Coordination for Large-Scale Constrained Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13900)
*Angel Wang,Dominique Perrault-Joncas,Alvaro Maggiar,Carson Eisenach,Dean Foster*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出"人口感知协调接口"——学习先验和对偶映射，通过紧凑的人口摘要条件化，让规划器在迭代循环中查询，实现大规模多智能体系统在共享资源约束下的高效协调，无需每周期重新训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模多智能体系统中，资源规划的可行性评估依赖于成本与利用率的响应映射，而该映射随人口组成动态变化，现有方法无法高效适应这种变化。

Method: 学习两种映射：先验映射（预测给定成本轨迹下的总利用率）和对偶映射（预测目标计划下的成本轨迹），两者都基于紧凑的人口摘要进行条件化，并支持Sim2Real迁移评估。

Result: 供应链容量控制案例中，人口感知方法相比基线降低16-19%预测误差和20-51%容量违规；2万智能体可协调50万智能体；模拟训练的映射在真实数据上达到11.1% MAPE（基线13-24%）。

Conclusion: 人口感知的协调接口能有效应对人口组成变化，支持从小样本到大群体的扩展，并具备Sim2Real可验证性，对大规模多智能体资源规划有显著改进。

Abstract: In large-scale multi-agent systems with shared resource constraints, an upstream planner must iteratively evaluate candidate resource plans -- assessing feasibility, aggregate response, and marginal cost -- before committing to one. Lagrangian relaxation separates local decisions through a broadcast cost signal, but the planner still needs the cost-to-utilization response map to explore plan space, and this map depends on population composition that changes across planning cycles. We propose \emph{population-aware coordination interfaces}: learned primal and dual maps, conditioned on compact population summaries, that the planner queries inside its iterative loop. The primal map predicts aggregate utilization under a proposed cost trajectory; the dual map predicts the cost trajectory for a target plan. By encoding response-relevant population structure, these maps remain reliable across evolving populations without per-cycle retraining, and support coordination of large populations from compact subsamples. We additionally cast Sim2Real transfer as a backtestable procedure, enabling evaluation before deployment. In a supply-chain capacity-control case study, population-aware interfaces reduce forecast error by 16--19\% and capacity violations by 20--51\% relative to population-unaware baselines under composition shift; 20K-agent cohorts support accurate coordination of 500K-agent populations; and simulator-trained primal maps achieve 11.1\% MAPE on real observations versus 13--24\% for baselines.

</details>


### [515] [Feature Visualization Recovers Known Cortical Selectivity from TRIBE v2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13904)
*Stuart Bladon,Brinnae Bent*

Main category: q-bio.NC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将特征可视化（梯度上升）作为脑编码模型的补充可解释性方法，应用于TRIBE v2与V-JEPA 2组合模型，成功恢复了从V1到V4的腹侧视觉层级结构，并在MT区域发现静态优化下的径向“冻结运动”条纹、FFA的面部特征以及PPA的直线模式，且FFA刺激激活强度约为真实人脸照片的4倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脑编码模型仅用预测准确率评估，虽能衡量拟合程度但无法判断模型是否内化了大脑的功能组织结构，缺乏可解释性。

Method: 对目标脑区ROI的预测激活进行梯度上升优化，生成最大化该区域响应的合成图像；使用TRIBE v2与V-JEPA 2（ViT-G, 40层）组合模型，在冻结状态下合成静态图像，覆盖腹侧和背侧视觉通路的七个脑区。

Result: 1) V1到V4的空间尺度和特征复杂度逐步增加，与腹侧通路层级一致；2) MT区域产生径向“冻结运动”条纹；3) FFA生成面部特征；4) PPA生成一致的直线模式；5) 优化后的FFA刺激激活强度约为真实人脸照片的4倍。

Conclusion: 特征可视化可作为脑编码模型的有效定性评估工具，简单、可微且适用于任何具有可微骨干网络的脑编码器。

Abstract: Brain encoder models predict cortical fMRI responses from the internal activations of pretrained vision and language networks, and are typically evaluated by held-out prediction accuracy. This is a useful signal for training but a poor one for interpretation: it tells us an encoder fits the data without telling us whether it has internalized the functional organization of the brain. We propose feature visualization -- gradient ascent on the encoder's predicted activation for a target region of interest (ROI) -- as a complementary interpretability technique, and apply it to TRIBE v2 composed with V-JEPA 2 (ViT-G, 40 layers), holding both frozen and synthesizing still images for seven regions spanning the ventral and dorsal visual hierarchies. Under identical hyperparameters, the probe recovers a visible progression of increasing spatial scale and feature complexity across V1 to V4, matching the ventral-stream hierarchy. It also produces three distinctive downstream regimes: radial "frozen-motion" streaks for the middle temporal area (MT) despite static-only optimization, face-like features for the fusiform face area (FFA), and consistent rectilinear line patterns for the parahippocampal place area (PPA). Optimized FFA stimuli drive the predicted region ~4x as much as a natural face photograph, consistent with feature visualization producing adversarial super-stimuli rather than canonical exemplars. The probe is simple, differentiable, and applicable to any brain encoder with a differentiable backbone, allowing for qualitative evaluation of brain encoders.

</details>


### [516] [Wahkon: A Statistically Principled Deep RKHS Superposition Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14041)
*Yongkai Chen,Wenxuan Zhong,Ping Ma*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Wahkon网络，将Kolmogorov叠加原理与RKHS正则化统一，实现深度学习与核方法的优势互补，兼顾预测精度、可解释性和统计严谨性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习预测能力强但缺乏有限样本保证和校准的不确定性；RKHS方法能提供这些保证但在高维下适应性差。作者希望弥合两者鸿沟，构建兼具深度学习灵活性和核方法统计严谨性的统一框架。

Method: 1) 将Kolmogorov叠加原理与Wahba平滑样条传统的RKHS正则化结合；2) 推导出有限维深度表示定理，使训练可处理；3) 证明惩罚估计量等价于分层高斯过程先验下的MAP估计，扩展样条/GP对偶到深度组合；4) 通过度量熵论证建立极小化最优收敛率。

Result: 在模拟基准和单细胞CITE-seq研究上，Wahkon优于多层感知机、神经正切核和KAN网络，并具有显式的层间复杂度控制和统计最优性保证。

Conclusion: 通过统一Kolmogorov叠加原理与RKHS正则化，Wahkon在一个框架内同时实现了准确性、可解释性和统计严谨性，为深度学习的理论保证提供了新路径。

Abstract: Deep learning excels at prediction but often lacks finite-sample guarantees and calibrated uncertainty; RKHS (Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space)-based methods provide those guarantees but struggle to adapt in high dimensions. We propose Wahkon, a deep RKHS superposition network that unifies Kolmogorov's superposition principle with RKHS regularization in the smoothing-spline tradition of Wahba. This yields a finite-dimensional deep representer theorem that makes training tractable and provides explicit layerwise complexity control. We show the penalized estimator is exactly the MAP (maximum a posteriori) estimate under a hierarchical Gaussian-process prior, extending the spline/GP duality to deep compositions. Using metric-entropy arguments, we establish minimax-optimal convergence rates under mild smoothness and clarify how depth and width trade off with regularity. Empirically, Wahkon outperforms multilayer perceptrons, Neural Tangent Kernels, and Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks across simulation benchmarks and a single-cell CITE-seq study. By unifying Kolmogorov's superposition principle with RKHS regularization, Wahkon delivers accuracy, interpretability, and statistical rigor in a single framework.

</details>


### [517] [RoSHAP: A Distributional Framework and Robust Metric for Stable Feature Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15154)
*Lanxin Xiang,Liang Shi,Youhui Ye,Boyu Jiang,Dawei Zhou,Feng Guo*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RoSHAP框架，通过Bootstrap重采样和核密度估计建模SHAP值的分布，从而获得更稳定、鲁棒的特征归因排序，提升模型可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 特征归因方法（如SHAP）在不同数据划分或随机种子下会产生显著波动，导致特征重要性排序不稳定，影响模型解释的可信度。

Method: 基于Bootstrap重采样和核密度估计对SHAP值分布建模，证明在温和条件下聚合归因分数渐近服从高斯分布，从而降低计算成本；提出RoSHAP指标，综合考虑特征的活跃性、强度和稳定性来进行鲁棒排序。

Result: 模拟和真实数据实验表明，RoSHAP在识别信号特征方面优于单次归因方法，且基于RoSHAP选择的特征子集能以更少特征达到与全特征模型相当的预测性能。

Conclusion: RoSHAP有效提升了特征归因的稳定性和可解释性，为可信赖的模型分析提供了更一致的见解。

Abstract: Feature attribution analysis is critical for interpreting machine learning models and supporting reliable data-driven decisions. However, feature attribution measures often exhibit stochastic variation: different train--test splits, random seeds, or model-fitting procedures can produce substantially different attribution values and feature rankings. This paper proposes a framework for incorporating stochastic nature of feature attribution and a robust attribution metric, RoSHAP, for stable feature ranking based on the SHAP metric. The proposed framework models the distribution of feature attribution scores and estimates it through bootstrap resampling and kernel density estimation. We show that, under mild regularity conditions, the aggregated feature attribution score is asymptotically Gaussian, which greatly reduces the computational cost of distribution estimation. The RoSHAP summarizes the distribution of SHAP into a robust feature-ranking criterion that simultaneously rewards features that are active, strong, and stable. Through simulations and real-data experiments, the proposed framework and RoSHAP outperform standard single-run attribution measures in identifying signal features. In addition, models built using RoSHAP-selected features achieve predictive performance comparable to full-feature models while using substantially fewer predictors. The proposed RoSHAP approach improves the stability and interpretability of machine learning models, enabling reliable and consistent insights for analysis.

</details>


### [518] [Hand-in-the-Loop: Improving Dexterous VLA via Seamless Interventional Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15157)
*Zhuohang Li,Liqun Huang,Wei Xu,Zhengming Zhu,Nie Lin,Xiao Ma,Xinjun Sheng,Ruoshi Wen*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Hand-in-the-Loop (HandITL)方法，通过融合人类纠正意图与自主策略执行，解决灵巧操作中VLA模型因命令不匹配导致的"手势跳跃"问题，显著减少干预抖动和抓取失败，并提升策略性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵巧操作中VLA模型易出现复合误差，高维动作空间和接触动力学使小偏差在长程任务中放大；现有交互模仿学习在人类遥操作接管时存在命令不匹配，导致手势跳跃，限制了策略微调效果。

Method: 提出HandITL方法，在人类干预时平滑混合人类纠正意图与自主策略执行，避免直接遥操作接管带来的突然配置变化，实现无缝的人机协同干预。

Result: 干预抖动降低99.8%，抓取失败减少87.5%，平均完成时间减少19.1%；在三个长程灵巧任务上，使用HandITL收集的干预数据训练的策略相比标准遥操作数据提升19%的平均性能。

Conclusion: HandITL有效解决了灵巧操作中人类干预的命令不匹配问题，提升了交互模仿学习的数据质量和策略性能，为高自由度灵巧操作的人机协同训练提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are prone to compounding errors in dexterous manipulation, where high-dimensional action spaces and contact-rich dynamics amplify small policy deviations over long horizons. While Interactive Imitation Learning (IIL) can refine policies through human takeover data, applying it to high-degree-of-freedom (DoF) robotic hands remains challenging due to a command mismatch between human teleoperation and policy execution at the takeover moment, which causes abrupt robot-hand configuration changes, or "gesture jumps". We present Hand-in-the-Loop (HandITL), a seamless human-in-the-loop intervention method that blends human corrective intent with autonomous policy execution to avoid gesture jumps during bimanual dexterous manipulation. Compared with direct teleoperation takeover, HandITL reduces takeover jitter by 99.8% and preserves robust post-takeover manipulation, reducing grasp failures by 87.5% and mean completion time by 19.1%. We validate HandITL on tasks requiring bimanual coordination, tool use, and fine-grained long-horizon manipulation. When used to collect intervention data for policy refinement, HandITL yields policies that outperform those trained with standard teleoperation data by 19% on average across three long-horizon dexterous tasks.

</details>


### [519] [RQ-MoE: Residual Quantization via Mixture of Experts for Efficient Input-Dependent Vector Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14359)
*Zhengjia Zhong,Shuyan Ke,Zaizhou Lin,Jiaqi Song,Hongyi Lan,Hui Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 32.0

TL;DR: RQ-MoE是一种结合混合专家机制与双流量化的残差量化框架，通过动态码本适应实现高效向量量化，在重建和检索任务上达到SOTA，且解码速度比之前方法快6-14倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多码本向量量化方法依赖静态码本，难以适应异构数据几何结构；虽然QINCo等动态量化器提升了表达能力，但其严格的顺序依赖导致解码瓶颈。本文旨在设计一种既能动态适应输入又能并行解码的高效量化框架。

Method: 提出RQ-MoE框架，包含两级MoE（混合专家）和双流量化流。第一级MoE根据输入特征选择量化专家，第二级MoE动态构建残差码本；双流设计将指令（instruction）与量化过程解耦，从而实现并行解码。

Result: 在重建和检索任务上达到或超越SOTA性能；解码速度比此前方法快6倍到14倍；理论上证明了标准残差量化和QINCo是RQ-MoE的约束特例。

Conclusion: RQ-MoE通过MoE动态码本和并行解码设计，在保持高表达力的同时大幅提升解码效率，为高效向量量化提供了新范式。代码已开源。

Abstract: Vector quantization is a fundamental tool for compressing high-dimensional embeddings, yet existing multi-codebook methods rely on static codebooks that limit expressiveness under heterogeneous data geometry. While recent dynamic quantizers like QINCo adapt codebooks to individual inputs and improve expressiveness, their strict sequential dependencies create decoding bottlenecks. We propose Residual Quantization via Mixture of Experts (RQ-MoE), a framework combining a two-level MoE with dual-stream quantization to enable input-dependent codebook adaptation for efficient vector quantization. RQ-MoE enables dynamic codebook construction and decouples instruction from quantization, facilitating parallel decoding. Theoretically, we show that standard Residual Quantization and QINCo can be recovered as constrained special cases of RQ-MoE, and derive a guideline for setting expert dimensionality in RQ-MoE. Extensive experiments show that RQ-MoE achieves state-of-the-art or on-par performance in reconstruction and retrieval, while providing 6x-14x faster decoding than prior vector quantization methods. The implementation is available at https://github.com/KDEGroup/RQ-MoE.

</details>


### [520] [AIM-DDI: A Model-Agnostic Multimodal Integration Module for Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14327)
*Yerin Park,Sangseon Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出AIM-DDI，一种架构无关的多模态融合模块，将异构药物信息表示为共享潜在空间中的token，通过统一融合模块建模跨模态依赖关系，从而提升药物相互作用预测性能，尤其适用于完全未见药物的预测场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DDI预测模型的多模态融合机制与特定预测架构紧密耦合，难以跨模型复用，限制了模型在未见药物泛化场景下的表现。

Method: 提出AIM-DDI，将结构、化学、语义等异构药物模态信息统一编码为token序列，在共享潜在空间中通过统一融合模块建模模态间依赖，实现与下游DDI预测架构无关的多模态集成。

Result: 在多种DDI模型和DrugBank设定下，AIM-DDI持续提升预测性能，在双方药物均未见的"both-unseen"最难设定下增益最为显著。

Conclusion: 将多模态集成视为可复用模块而非模型特定的融合组件，是提升未见药物DDI预测鲁棒性的有效策略。

Abstract: Drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction is a critical task in computational biomedicine, as adverse interactions between co-administered drugs can cause severe side effects and clinical risks. A key challenge is unseen-drug generalization, where interactions must be predicted for drugs not observed during training. Although multimodal DDI models exploit diverse drug-related information, their fusion mechanisms are often tied to specific prediction architectures, limiting their reuse across models. To address this, we propose AIM-DDI, an architecture-independent multimodal integration module that represents heterogeneous modality information as tokens in a shared latent space. By modeling dependencies across modality tokens through a unified fusion module, AIM-DDI enables model-agnostic integration of structural, chemical, and semantic drug signals across different DDI prediction architectures. Extensive evaluations across diverse DDI models and DrugBank-based settings show that AIM-DDI consistently improves prediction performance, with the strongest gains under the most challenging both-unseen setting where neither drug in a test pair is observed during training. These results suggest that treating multimodal integration as a reusable module, rather than a model-specific fusion component, is an effective strategy for robust unseen-drug DDI prediction.

</details>


### [521] [Focused PU learning from imbalanced data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14467)
*Elias Zavitsanos,Georgios Paliouras*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对高度不平衡数据集的PU学习方法，通过聚焦经验风险估计器处理正例稀少且难以与负例区分的问题，在SCAR和SAR两种标记机制下均取得了SOTA性能，并在财务错报检测中验证了实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PU学习方法很少处理高度不平衡场景，尤其是正例极少且与负例相似度高的困难情况，而许多现实问题（如欺诈检测、疾病基因识别）恰恰具有这种特征。

Method: 提出一种聚焦经验风险估计器（focused empirical risk estimator），同时利用正例和无标注数据来训练二分类器，适用于SCAR和SAR两种正例标注机制。

Result: 在不平衡数据集上，SCAR和SAR两种标注机制下均取得了SOTA性能；在财务错报检测的真实应用中验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了不平衡PU学习问题，在正例稀少且难检测的场景下优于现有方法。

Abstract: We propose a new method of learning from positive and unlabeled (PU) examples in highly imbalanced datasets. Many real-world problems, such as disease gene identification, targeted marketing, fraud detection, and recommender systems, are hard to address with machine learning methods, due to limited labeled data. Often, training data comprises positive and unlabeled instances, the latter typically being dominated by negative, but including also several positive instances. While PU learning is well-studied, few methods address imbalanced settings or hard-to-detect positive examples that resemble negative ones. Our approach uses a focused empirical risk estimator, incorporating both positive and unlabeled examples to train binary classifiers. Empirical evaluations demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on imbalanced datasets under two labeling mechanisms - selecting positives completely at random (SCAR) and selecting at random (SAR). Beyond these controlled experiments, we demonstrate the value of the proposed method in the real-world application of financial misstatement detection.

</details>


### [522] [An Amortized Efficiency Threshold for Comparing Neural and Heuristic Solvers in Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14624)
*Sohaib Afifi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文指出“神经网络求解器因训练能耗高而整体效率低”的常见批评逻辑有误，提出摊销效率阈值（AET）概念，定义神经网络求解器在部署量超过某阈值后，总能耗/碳排放可低于传统元启发式方法。在MTVRP环境下（n=20）实证表明，交叉点约为15.8万次部署，每个实例能耗比为0.41。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纠正“神经网络组合优化求解器训练昂贵→整体效率低”这一常见但错误的推论，提供一个公平比较两类求解器能耗/碳足迹的框架。

Method: 提出摊销效率阈值（AET）概念，将训练的一次性GPU能耗与部署阶段每次实例的CPU能耗进行摊销比较，并考虑解质量约束与硬件制造碳排放。在MTVRP基准（n=20，19个变种）上进行实证，以HGS（PyVRP）为基线。

Result: MTVRP实验中，摊销交叉点约1.58×10^5次部署；每实例能耗比（神经/元启发式）为0.41；当网络在每实例上占优时，累积能耗比趋于小于1的常数，且不依赖于训练成本的具体测量方式。

Conclusion: 神经网络求解器并非天然不如元启发式高效，其整体效率取决于部署规模。本文贡献在于框架、开源工具与测量协议，更大问题规模下的收敛性留待未来研究。

Abstract: A common critique of neural combinatorial-optimization solvers is that they are less energy-efficient than CPU metaheuristics, given the operational energy cost of training them on GPUs. This paper examines the inferential step from "training is expensive" to "neural solvers are net-inefficient", which is where the critique actually goes wrong. Training the network costs a large fixed amount of GPU energy; running the metaheuristic costs a small amount of CPU energy on every instance, repeated as long as the solver is deployed. The two are not commensurable until a deployment volume is fixed. We define the Amortized Efficiency Threshold (AET) as the deployment volume above which a neural solver breaks even with a heuristic baseline in total energy or carbon, under an explicit constraint on solution quality. We show that the cumulative-energy ratio between the two solvers tends to a constant strictly below one whenever the network wins per-instance, and that this limit does not depend on how the training cost was measured. An embodied-carbon term amortizes hardware fabrication symmetrically on both sides. We instantiate the framework on the Multi-Task VRP (MTVRP) environment at n=20 customers across 19 problem variants and five training seeds, with HGS via PyVRP as the heuristic baseline. The measured crossover sits near $1.58 \times 10^5$ deployed instances; the per-instance ratio is 0.41, reflecting the moderate size of the instances tested. The contribution is the framework, the open instrumentation, and the measurement protocol; structural convergence of the ratio at larger problem sizes is left to future empirical work.

</details>


### [523] [ReMIA: a Powerful and Efficient Alternative to Membership Inference Attacks against Synthetic Data Generators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14686)
*Davide Scassola,Andrea Coser,Sebastiano Saccani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ReMIA，一种只需两次SDG训练即可高效评估合成数据隐私风险的成员推断攻击方法，灵敏度媲美最先进方法但实用性大幅提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有成员推断攻击要么依赖影子建模（需数百次SDG训练），要么使用代理指标（灵敏度有限），缺乏实用且敏感的隐私评估方法。

Method: ReMIA只需两次SDG训练：用两个源数据集分别生成合成数据，然后训练分类器判断一条记录来自哪个源数据集，从而间接推断成员关系。

Result: 在多个表格数据集和SDG上，ReMIA的灵敏度与最先进MIA相当，但所需训练次数从数百次降至2次，辅助数据量也大幅减少。

Conclusion: ReMIA是一种实用且敏感的隐私评估指标，并揭示了SDG在隐私-效用权衡上优于传统噪声匿名化方法。

Abstract: Tabular data sharing under privacy constraints is increasingly important for research and collaboration. Synthetic data generators (SDGs) are a promising solution, but synthetic data remains vulnerable to attacks, such as membership inference attacks (MIAs), which aim to determine whether a specific record was part of the training data. State-of-the-art MIAs are powerful but impractical: they rely on shadow modeling, requiring hundreds of SDG training runs, and need auxiliary data several times larger than the original training set. Fast proxy metrics like distance to closest record (DCR) are efficient but have limited sensitivity to MIA risk. We introduce ReMIA (Relative Membership Inference Attack), a practical privacy metric that requires only two SDG training runs and additional data no larger than the original training set. Rather than predicting whether a record was in the training set, ReMIA generates two synthetic datasets from two source datasets and measures whether a classifier can identify which source a record came from. Experiments across multiple tabular datasets and SDGs show that ReMIA has a sensitivity comparable to state-of-the-art MIAs while being substantially more practical. We further observe that SDGs can achieve privacy-utility trade-offs that traditional noise-based anonymization methods do not match. Code is available at https://github.com/aindo-com/remia.

</details>


### [524] [Peng's Q($λ$) for Conservative Value Estimation in Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14779)
*Byeongchan Kim,Min-hwan Oh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于多步Q(λ)算子的无模型离线强化学习算法CPQL，通过保守值估计实现隐式行为正则化，在D4RL基准上优于现有方法，并支持离线到在线学习的平滑迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线RL方法多基于单步Bellman算子进行保守值估计，存在过悲观估计问题，且无法充分利用离线轨迹中的多步信息。

Method: 将Peng's Q(λ)算子引入离线RL框架进行保守值估计，利用多步算子使固定点更接近行为策略的价值函数，从而自然引入隐式行为正则化。

Result: 在D4RL基准上，CPQL一致且显著优于现有离线单步基线方法；预训练的Q函数可用于在线PQL智能体，避免微调初期的性能下降。

Conclusion: CPQL同时缓解了过悲观估计、实现了不低于行为策略的性能，并提供了接近最优的性能保证，这是此前保守方法未能实现的里程碑。

Abstract: We propose a model-free offline multi-step reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm, Conservative Peng's Q($λ$) (CPQL). Our algorithm adapts the Peng's Q($λ$) (PQL) operator for conservative value estimation as an alternative to the Bellman operator. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work in offline RL to theoretically and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of conservative value estimation with a \textit{multi-step} operator by fully leveraging offline trajectories. The fixed point of the PQL operator in offline RL lies closer to the value function of the behavior policy, thereby naturally inducing implicit behavior regularization. CPQL simultaneously mitigates over-pessimistic value estimation, achieves performance greater than (or equal to) that of the behavior policy, and provides near-optimal performance guarantees -- a milestone that previous conservative approaches could not achieve. Extensive numerical experiments on the D4RL benchmark demonstrate that CPQL consistently and significantly outperforms existing offline single-step baselines. In addition to the contributions of CPQL in offline RL, our proposed method also contributes to the offline-to-online learning framework. Using the Q-function pre-trained by CPQL in offline settings enables the online PQL agent to avoid the performance drop typically observed at the start of fine-tuning and to attain robust performance improvements. Our code is available at https://github.com/oh-lab/CPQL.

</details>


### [525] [A Mutual Information Lower Bound for Multimodal Regression Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14917)
*Leonardo Ferreira Guilhoto,Akshat Kaushal,Paris Perdikaris*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文针对连续回归中主动学习的获取函数问题，提出了一种双索引框架（Two-Index framework），将认知不确定性与偶然不确定性解耦，并推导出互信息下界（MI-LB）作为适用于混合密度网络集成的获取函数。实验证明MI-LB在具有多模态输出的系统中表现优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续回归的主动学习方法缺乏能有效捕获认知不确定性的获取函数：方差无法区分模态分歧，而BALD等信息论方法针对离散输出设计。本文的动机是解决多模态预测分布下的认知不确定性量化问题。

Method: 提出双索引框架：一个随机索引选择竞争模型假设（认知源），另一个控制假设内随机性（偶然源）。通过熵分解将输出与认知索引的互信息作为获取目标，并针对连续输出的难解性，为混合密度网络（MDN）集成推导出互信息下界（MI-LB）闭式近似。

Result: 在多模态系统基准测试中，MI-LB匹配或超越了所有评估的基线方法，并且是唯一一致表现良好的方法；几何和Fisher基线仅在输入空间已编码多模态性时才有竞争力，否则失效。

Conclusion: MI-LB作为连续回归中主动学习的获取函数，有效捕获了多模态分布下的认知不确定性，且理论证明了该互信息随数据增长而收敛至零。

Abstract: Active learning for continuous regression has lacked an acquisition function that targets epistemic uncertainty when the predictive distribution is multimodal: variance misses modal disagreement, and information-theoretic targets like BALD are designed for discrete outputs. We introduce a Two-Index framework that makes this separation explicit: one stochastic index selects among competing model hypotheses (epistemic source), while a second governs within-hypothesis randomness (aleatoric source). An entropy decomposition within the framework identifies the mutual information between the output and the epistemic index as a principled acquisition objective, and we prove this quantity vanishes as the model is trained on growing datasets, confirming that it captures exactly the uncertainty data can resolve. Because this mutual information is intractable for continuous outputs, we derive the Mutual Information Lower Bound (MI-LB) acquisition function, a closed-form approximation for Mixture Density Network ensembles. On benchmarks featuring multimodal systems, MI-LB matches or beats every baseline evaluated and is the only method to do so consistently -- geometric and Fisher-based baselines compete only when the input space already encodes the multimodality, and collapse otherwise.

</details>


### [526] [Learning with Shallow Neural Networks on Cluster-Structured Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14927)
*Elisabetta Cornacchia,Laurent Massoulié*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个可处理的理论模型，研究输入空间中的空间相关性如何影响浅层神经网络在梯度下降下的样本复杂度。研究表明，样本复杂度仅与隐变量数量相关，在高信噪比下与输入维度无关（对数项除外）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论通常假设数据的低维结构存在于目标函数中，但真实数据（如图像、文本）的强空间相关性位于输入空间本身。作者希望量化这种输入空间相关性对学习样本复杂度的影响。

Method: 基于布尔隐变量和分组相关输入特征构建可处理模型，在可识别性假设下，使用逐层梯度下降变体进行分析。

Result: 样本复杂度随隐变量数量缩放；当信噪比足够高时，样本复杂度与输入维度无关（仅对数项依赖）。在合成数据和真实数据上验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 输入空间的相关性结构可以显著降低学习所需的样本复杂度，该发现有助于理解深度学习在高维数据上的成功。

Abstract: The success of deep learning in high-dimensional settings is often attributed to the presence of low-dimensional structure in real-world data. While standard theoretical models typically assume that this structure lies in the target function, projecting unstructured inputs onto a low-dimensional subspace, data such as images, text or genomic sequences exhibit strong spatial correlations within the input space itself. In this paper, we propose a tractable model to study how these correlations affect the sample complexity of learning with gradient descent on shallow neural networks. Specifically, we consider targets that depend on a small number of latent Boolean variables, and input features grouped into clusters and correlated with the latent variables. Under an identifiability assumption, we show that for a layerwise gradient-descent variant, the sample complexity scales with the number of hidden variables and, when the signal-to-noise ratio is sufficiently high, is independent of the input dimension, up to logarithmic terms. We empirically test our theoretical findings on both synthetic and real data.

</details>


### [527] [Novel Dynamic Batch-Sensitive Adam Optimiser for Vehicular Accident Injury Severity Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15083)
*Daniel Asare Kyei,Alimatu Saadia-Yussiff,Maame G. Asante-Mensah,Abdul Lateef-Yussiff,Charles Roland Haruna,Derry Emmanuel*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出DBS-Adam优化器，通过基于梯度范数和批次损失的自适应学习率缩放，结合Bi-LSTM网络处理不平衡序列数据，在交通事故伤害严重程度预测中达到95.22%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化器在处理不平衡和序列数据集时存在困难，难以捕捉少数类模式，影响模型效率与收敛速度。

Method: 提出DBS-Adam优化器，利用指数移动平均梯度范数和批次损失计算批次难度分数，动态缩放学习率；结合双向LSTM、SMOTE-ENN重采样和Focal Loss处理不平衡问题。

Result: 与AMSGrad、AdamW、AdaBound对比，DBS-Adam在5个随机种子下取得统计显著的精度提升(p=0.020)，达到95.22%准确率、96.11%精确率、95.28%召回率、95.39% F1-score。

Conclusion: DBS-Adam能有效优化不平衡序列数据的学习，适用于实时事故严重程度分类等实际应用场景。

Abstract: The choice of optimiser is important in deep learning, as it strongly influences model efficiency and speed of convergence. However, many commonly used optimisers encounter difficulties when applied to imbalanced and sequential datasets, limiting their ability to capture patterns of minority classes. In this study, we propose Dynamic Batch-Sensitive Adam (DBS-Adam), an optimiser that dynamically scales the learning rate using a batch difficulty score derived from exponential moving averages of gradient norms and batch loss. DBS-Adam improves training stability and accelerates convergence by increasing updates for difficult batches and reducing them for easier ones. We evaluate DBS-Adam by integrating it with Bi-Directional LSTM networks for accident injury severity prediction, addressing class imbalance through SMOTE-ENN resampling and Focal Loss. Four experimental configurations compare baseline Bi-LSTM models and alternative architectures to assess optimiser impact. Rigorous comparison against state-of-the-art optimisers (AMSGrad, AdamW, AdaBound) across five random seeds demonstrated DBS-Adam's competitive performance with statistically significant precision improvements (p=0.020). Results indicate that DBS-Adam outperforms standard optimisation approaches, achieving 95.22% test accuracy, 96.11% precision, 95.28% recall, 95.39% F1-score, and a test loss of 0.0086. The proposed framework enables effective real-time accident severity classification for targeted emergency response and road safety interventions, demonstrating the value of DBS-Adam for learning from imbalanced sequential data.

</details>


### [528] [Stochastic Matching via Local Sparsification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14195)
*Sara Ahmadian,Edith Cohen,Mohammad Roghani*

Main category: cs.DS

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文针对在线随机匹配问题中本地通信带宽瓶颈，提出两阶段本地稀疏化框架：到达请求将其兼容集裁剪至k条边，再由中央协调器进行全局匹配。提出基于分数解的参数化局部选择策略，理论上证明了近似比与解"展开度"的关系，并在纽约网约车数据集上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统在线随机匹配假设决策需即时且不可撤销，但在打车、云计算等现代分布式系统中，真正的瓶颈是本地通信带宽而非匹配时机。本文旨在弥合局部信息约束与全局优化效用之间的"中间地带"。

Method: 提出两阶段本地稀疏化框架：阶段一，到达请求将兼容集裁剪至k条边；阶段二，中央协调器基于裁剪后的图进行全局匹配。核心贡献是参数化的局部选择策略，其参数由期望实例的分数解确定。

Result: 理论上证明了在充分"展开度"下，稀疏化能在全局上保持最大匹配的期望规模。在纽约网约车数据集和合成对抗基准上，即使本地预算高度受限，仍能实现接近最优的全局匹配，显著优于标准在线基线。

Conclusion: 通过两阶段稀疏化框架，证明了在严格的本地通信约束下也能实现高质量的全局匹配，为分布式匹配问题提供了新的理论视角和实用方法。

Abstract: The classic online stochastic matching problem typically requires immediate and irrevocable matching decisions. However, in many modern decentralized systems such as real-time ride-hailing and distributed cloud computing, the primary bottleneck is often local communication bandwidth rather than the timing of the match itself. We formalize this challenge by introducing a two-stage local sparsification framework. In this setting, arriving requests must prune their realized compatibility sets to a strict budget of $k$ edges before a central coordinator optimizes the global matching. This creates a "middle ground" between local information constraints and global optimization utility.
  We propose a local selection strategy, parametrized by a fractional solution of the expected instance. Theoretically, we quantify the approximation ratio as a function of the solution's {\em spread}. We prove that under sufficient spread, our sparsifier globally preserves the expected size of the maximum matching. Empirically, we demonstrate the robustness of our approach using the New York City ride-hailing datasets and adversarial synthetic benchmarks. Our results show that near-optimal global matching is achievable even with highly constrained local budgets, significantly outperforming standard online baselines.

</details>


### [529] [bde: A Python Package for Bayesian Deep Ensembles via MILE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14146)
*Vyron Arvanitis,Angelos Aslanidis,Emanuel Sommer,David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: bde是一个基于JAX实现的贝叶斯深度集成Python包，专注于表格数据，提供scikit-learn兼容的估计器，用于快速训练、MCMC采样和不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为表格数据提供用户友好的贝叶斯深度集成工具，降低使用门槛。

Method: 基于JAX实现Microcanonical Langevin Ensembles (MILE)采样推理方法，提供scikit-learn兼容API。

Result: 实现了快速训练、高效MCMC采样和不确定性量化，支持回归和分类任务。

Conclusion: bde是一个实用工具包，使贝叶斯深度集成在表格数据上更易用。

Abstract: bde is a user-friendly Python package for Bayesian Deep Ensembles with a particular focus on tabular data. Built on an efficient JAX implementation of the sampling-based inference method Microcanonical Langevin Ensembles (MILE), it provides scikit-learn compatible estimators for fast training, efficient Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling, and uncertainty quantification in both regression and classification tasks.

</details>


### [530] [CSI-JEPA: Towards Foundation Representations for Ubiquitous Sensing with Minimal Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14171)
*Xuanhao Luo,Zhizhen Li,Yuchen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CSI-JEPA，一种自监督预测性表示学习框架，用于标签高效的Wi-Fi多任务感知。通过在未标记CSI样本上预测掩码区域潜在特征来学习可复用的时频谱表示，在7个真实Wi-Fi感知任务上相比监督方法提升高达10.64%准确率，并节省高达98%的标签数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CSI感知模型依赖任务特定的监督训练，需要大量标注数据，限制了在实际部署中的可扩展性。未标记CSI数据丰富但标注成本高昂，因此需要一种能从未标记数据中学习可复用表示的方法。

Method: CSI-JEPA采用自监督预测式学习框架：(1) 将信道响应幅度窗口沿时间和子载波维度进行token化；(2) 提出信道变化感知的掩码策略，对局部变化更强的区域进行预测；(3) 通过预测掩码区域的潜在特征进行预训练；(4) 预训练后冻结编码器，添加轻量级任务适配器用于下游感知任务。

Result: 在7个真实Wi-Fi感知任务上，CSI-JEPA相比监督Transformer基线平均准确率提升最高10.64个百分点，在匹配预算下标签节省高达98.0%。

Conclusion: 自监督预测式学习框架能够有效利用未标记CSI数据，学习可跨任务、设备、用户和环境复用的表示，显著降低对标注数据的需求，为规模化Wi-Fi感知部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Channel state information (CSI) provides a widely available sensing modality for human and environment perception, but existing CSI sensing models usually rely on task-specific supervised training and require substantial labeled data for each task, device, user, or environment. This limits their scalability in practical deployments where unlabeled CSI is abundant but labeled data is costly to collect. In this paper, we present CSI-JEPA, a self-supervised predictive representation learning framework for label-efficient, multi-task Wi-Fi sensing. CSI-JEPA learns reusable temporal-spectral representations from unlabeled CSI samples by predicting latent features of masked channel regions from visible context. To better match the physical structure of CSI, CSI-JEPA tokenizes channel-response amplitude windows along the time and subcarrier dimensions. It then introduces a channel variation-aware masking strategy that samples predictive targets from regions with stronger local temporal and subcarrier-domain variations. After pretraining, the encoder is frozen and used as a backbone, with lightweight task-specific adapters added for downstream sensing tasks. We evaluate CSI-JEPA on seven real-world Wi-Fi sensing tasks spanning diverse objectives and deployment settings. The results show that CSI-JEPA improves downstream sensing performance over competitive baselines, achieving up to 10.64 percentage points mean accuracy gain over state-of-the-art supervised Transformer and matched-budget label savings of up to 98.0%.

</details>


### [531] [Quantum Advantage in Multi Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14235)
*Simranjeet Singh Dahia,Claudia Szabo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文实证评估了量子多智能体强化学习（QMARL）中的纠缠机制，通过CHSH博弈（经典上限0.75 vs 量子Tsirelson极限0.854）证明了纠缠带来的量子优势，并发现无纠缠的量子电路仅匹配经典基线。在协作导航任务中，混合量子-经典方案（量子Actor+经典Critic）相比经典MAA2C提升了约2倍的成功率（0.85 vs 0.40）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有QMARL研究缺乏可证明的基线对比，无法严格区分量子优势与算法巧合；本文旨在通过具有理论经典性能上界的基准任务来系统评估纠缠在QMARL中的真实作用。

Method: 采用去中心化QMARL框架，使用变分量子电路（VQC）作为Actor并共享纠缠态；在CHSH博弈（理论经典上限0.75）和CoopNav任务上进行对比实验，分离纠缠、量子电路结构等因素的影响。

Result: 1) CHSH博弈中纠缠QMARL达到0.854（接近Tsirelson极限），无纠缠量子电路仅匹配经典基线0.75；2) 不同Bell态对协调增益影响各异，部分甚至有害；3) CoopNav中无纠缠QMARL成功率达0.85，是经典MAA2C（0.40）的2倍多；4) 混合架构（量子Actor+经典Critic）优于纯经典和纯量子方案。

Conclusion: 纠缠是QMARL实现量子优势的关键机制，而非量子电路本身；混合量子-经典架构在实际任务中可能优于纯量子方案；未来需进一步探索纠缠结构的选择与设计。

Abstract: We present an empirical evaluation of quantum entanglement in agent coordination within quantum multi agent reinforcement learning (QMARL). While QMARL has attracted growing interest recently, most prior work evaluates quantum policies without provable baselines, making it impossible to rigorously distinguish quantum advantage from algorithmic coincidence. We address this directly by evaluating a decentralized QMARL framework with variational quantum circuit (VQC) actors with shared entangled states. In the CHSH game, which has a mathematically proven classical performance ceiling of 0.75 win rate, we show that entangled QMARL agents approach the Tsirelson limit of 0.854, providing clear evidence of their quantum advantage. We show that unentangled quantum circuits match the classical baseline, confirming that entanglement and not the quantum circuit itself is the active coordination mechanism. We also explore the effect of specific entanglement structures, as some Bell states enable coordination gains while others actively harm performance. On cooperative navigation (CoopNav), QMARL without entanglement achieves $\sim2\times$ improvement in success rate over classical MAA2C ($\sim$0.85 versus $\sim$0.40), with the hybrid configuration, quantum actor paired with a classical centralised critic, outperforming both fully classical and fully quantum solutions. We present our experimental analysis and discuss future work.

</details>


### [532] [Not All Timesteps Matter Equally: Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation for Spiking Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14252)
*Kai Sun,Peibo Duan,Yongsheng Huang,Guowei Zhang,Benjamin Smith,Nanxu Gong,Levin Kuhlmann*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），通过选择性对齐错误时间步的类别级和时间级知识，提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SNN知识蒸馏方法对所有时间步施加统一对齐，忽略了SNN预测随时间演变且中间时间步不必单独正确的事实，导致蒸馏效果受限。

Method: SeAl-KD选择性对齐类别和时间知识：在错误时间步均衡竞争logits，并基于置信度和时间步间相似性重新加权时间对齐。

Result: 在静态图像和神经形态事件数据集上，SeAl-KD一致优于现有蒸馏方法。

Conclusion: 选择性对齐比统一对齐更适合SNN的时序特性，能有效提升蒸馏效果。

Abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are brain-inspired and spike-driven, achieve high energy efficiency. However, a performance gap between SNNs and artificial neural networks (ANNs) still remains. Knowledge distillation (KD) is commonly adopted to improve SNN performance, but existing methods typically enforce uniform alignment across all timesteps, either from a teacher network or through inter-temporal self-distillation, implicitly assuming that per-timestep predictions should be treated equally. In practice, SNN predictions vary and evolve over time, and intermediate timesteps need not all be individually correct even when the final aggregated output is correct. Under such conditions, effective distillation should not force every timestep toward the same supervision target, but instead provide corrective guidance to erroneous timesteps while preserving useful temporal dynamics. To address this issue, we propose Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation (SeAl-KD), which selectively aligns class-level and temporal knowledge by equalizing competing logits at erroneous timesteps and reweighting temporal alignment based on confidence and inter-timestep similarity. Extensive experiments on static image and neuromorphic event-based datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over existing distillation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/KaiSUN1/SeAl

</details>


### [533] [Distributionally Robust Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning via Adaptive Task Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14350)
*Nicholas E. Corrado,Wenyuan Huang,Josiah P. Hanna*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DRATS算法，通过自适应优先采样最难任务来解决多任务强化学习中因数据分配不均导致的性能不平衡问题，在MetaWorld基准测试中提升了最差任务性能和数据效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MTRL方法关注梯度冲突问题，但忽略了另一关键挑战——数据分配不均：标准方法为每个任务分配等量环境交互，导致简单任务数据过剩而困难任务数据不足，造成学习失衡。

Method: 将MTRL形式化为可行性问题，推导出最小化最差回报差距的极小极大目标；据此提出DRATS算法，自适应地优先采样离解决最远的任务，即当前表现与目标回报差距最大的任务。

Result: 在MetaWorld-MT10和MT50基准上，DRATS相比现有任务采样算法提升了数据效率，并显著提高了最差任务的性能。

Conclusion: 数据分配不均是MTRL中未被充分探索的重要挑战，DRATS通过自适应任务采样有效缓解了该问题，为多任务强化学习提供了新思路。

Abstract: Multi-task reinforcement learning (MTRL) aims to train a single agent to efficiently optimize performance across multiple tasks simultaneously. However, jointly optimizing all tasks often yields imbalanced learning: agents quickly solve easy tasks but learn slowly on harder ones. While prior work primarily attributes this imbalance to conflicting task gradients and proposes gradient manipulation or specialized architectures to address it, we instead focus on a distinct and under-explored challenge: imbalanced data allocation. Standard MTRL allocates an equal number of environment interactions to each task, which over-allocates data to easy tasks that require relatively few interactions to solve and under-allocates data to hard tasks that require substantially more experience to solve. To address this challenge, we introduce Distributionally Robust Adaptive Task Sampling (DRATS), an algorithm that adaptively prioritizes sampling tasks furthest from being solved. We derive DRATS by formalizing MTRL as a feasibility problem from which we derive a minimax objective for minimizing the worst-case return gap, the difference between a desired target return and the agent's return on a task. In benchmarks like MetaWorld-MT10 and MT50, DRATS improves data efficiency and increases worst-task performance compared to existing task sampling algorithms.

</details>


### [534] [Turning Stale Gradients into Stable Gradients: Coherent Coordinate Descent with Implicit Landscape Smoothing for Lightweight Zeroth-Order Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14373)
*Chen Liang,Xiatao Sun,Qian Wang,Daniel Rakita*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种确定性的零阶优化方法 CoCD（Coherent Coordinate Descent），通过利用历史梯度信息实现 O(1) 查询复杂度，在样本效率和收敛稳定性上优于现有的随机零阶方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零阶优化方法存在样本效率低（标准有限差分）或方差高（随机子空间方法）的权衡问题，亟需一种既样本高效又低方差的确定性方法。

Method: 提出 Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD)，通过形式化"梯度一致性"概念，将历史（过时）梯度转化为计算资产，等价于带"热启动"的 Block Cyclic Coordinate Descent (BCCD)，实现每步 O(1) 查询复杂度。

Result: 在 MLP、CNN、ResNet（最高 27 万参数）上，CoCD 在样本效率和收敛损失/准确率上显著优于 BCCD，且相比随机 ZO 方法具有更优的稳定性。

Conclusion: 确定性的、结构感知的更新策略是轻量级零阶优化中优于随机化的选择。

Abstract: Zeroth-Order (ZO) optimization is pivotal for scenarios where backpropagation is unavailable, such as memory-constrained on-device learning and black-box optimization. However, existing methods face a stark trade-off: they are either sample-inefficient (e.g., standard finite differences) or suffer from high variance due to randomized estimation (e.g., random subspace methods). In this work, we propose Coherent Coordinate Descent (CoCD), a deterministic, sample-efficient, and budget-aware ZO optimizer. Theoretically, we formalize the notion of gradient coherence and demonstrate that CoCD is equivalent to Block Cyclic Coordinate Descent (BCCD) with ``warm starts,'' effectively converting historical (stale) gradients from a liability into a computational asset. This mechanism enables $O(1)$ query complexity per step while maintaining global descent directions. Furthermore, we derive error bounds revealing a counter-intuitive insight: larger finite-difference step sizes can induce an implicit smoothing effect on the optimization landscape by reducing the effective smoothness constant, thereby improving convergence stability. Experiments on MLP, CNN, and ResNet architectures (up to 270k parameters) demonstrate that CoCD significantly outperforms BCCD in terms of sample efficiency and convergence loss/accuracy, and exhibits superior stability over randomized ZO methods. Our results suggest that deterministic, structure-aware updates offer a superior alternative to randomization for lightweight ZO optimization.

</details>


### [535] [A Novel Schur-Decomposition-Based Weight Projection Method for Stable State-Space Neural-Network Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14489)
*Sergio Vanegas,Lasse Lensu,Fredy Ruiz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Schur分解的投影方法，确保离散线性状态空间层中状态矩阵的渐近稳定性，同时支持反向传播。该方法通过将状态矩阵的拟三角因子投影到最近的稳定矩阵上，实现稳定动力学建模，在合成和真实数据集上达到与现有技术相当的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从数据构建动力系统的黑箱模型时，确保模型的渐近稳定性是一个挑战性问题。现有方法在保证稳定性的同时往往需要大量过参数化或计算复杂度过高。

Method: 基于状态矩阵的实Schur分解，将拟三角因子动态投影到其最近的稳定同行上，提出一个可微的投影方案；同时给出预因子化的替代公式，支持反向传播。

Result: 在合成线性系统上，精度和收敛速度与最先进方法相当；在真实数据集的堆叠神经网络架构中，较低权重数有助于训练收敛而不牺牲精度。

Conclusion: 基于Schur分解的投影方法为识别复杂动力学提供了数值鲁棒的框架，能在满足严格渐近稳定性要求的同时达到现有技术水平。

Abstract: Building black-box models for dynamical systems from data is a challenging problem in machine learning, especially when asymptotic stability guarantees are required. In this paper, we introduce a novel stability-ensuring and backpropagation-compatible projection scheme based on the Schur decomposition for the state matrix of linear discrete-time state-space layers, as well as an alternative pre-factorized formulation of the methodology. The proposed methods dynamically project the quasi-triangular factor of the state matrix's real Schur decomposition onto its nearest stable peer, ensuring stable dynamics with minimal overparameterization. Experiments on synthetic linear systems demonstrate that the method achieves accuracy and convergence rates comparable to those of state-of-the-art stable-system identification techniques, despite a marginal increase in computational complexity. Furthermore, the lower weight count facilitates convergence during training without sacrificing accuracy in stacked neural-network architectures with static nonlinearities targeting real-world datasets. These results suggest that the Schur-based projection provides a numerically robust framework for identifying complex dynamics on par with the State of the Art while satisfying strict asymptotic-stability requirements.

</details>


### [536] [Discovering Physical Directions in Weight Space: Composing Neural PDE Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14546)
*Pengkai Wang,Pengwei Liu,Yuanyi Wang,Guanyu Chen,Xingyu Ren,Xiaolong Li,Zhongkai Hao,Yuting Kong,Qixin Zhang,Dong Ni*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了神经算子在不同物理参数域微调后权重更新的结构，发现其可分解为家族共享适应和物理参数方向分量，据此提出校准条件合并（CCM）方法实现无训练的跨PDE域迁移，在反应-扩散、Navier-Stokes等基准上显著降低外推误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子预训练后在不同物理参数域微调，但权重更新是否仅仅是孤立的领域专家，还是揭示了可复用的物理结构尚不明确。本文旨在探索微调权重更新的内在结构。

Method: 从家族共享锚点出发微调低/高端点专家，发现权重更新可分解为家族共享适应和沿物理参数方向的定向更新。基于此提出CCM（校准条件合并），利用物理元数据或短观测前缀推断目标组合坐标，合并专家权重生成单一检查点进行剩余推演。

Result: 在反应-扩散、2D Navier-Stokes、径向溃坝动力学上，CCM在外推区域分别降低分布外误差54.2%、42.8%、13.8%。实验覆盖FNO尺度、DPOT风格骨干及消融研究。

Conclusion: 端点微调并非任意的检查点漂移，而是揭示了可校准的物理方向，可用于无训练的参数域间迁移。

Abstract: Recent advances in neural operators have made partial differential equation (PDE) surrogate modeling increasingly scalable and transferable through large-scale pretraining and in-context adaptation. However, after a shared operator is fine-tuned to multiple regimes within a continuous physical family, it remains unclear whether the resulting weight-space updates merely form isolated regime experts or reveal reusable physical structure. Starting from a shared family anchor, we fine-tune low- and high-regime endpoint experts and show that their updates can be separated into a family-shared adaptation and a direction aligned with the underlying physical parameter. This separation reinterprets endpoint experts as finite-difference probes of a local physical direction in weight space, explaining why static averaging can interpolate between regimes but attenuates endpoint-specific physics. Building on this perspective, we propose Calibration-Conditioned Merge (CCM), a post-hoc coordinate readout method for composing neural PDE experts along this physical direction. Given physical metadata, a calibrated coordinate mapping, or a short observed rollout prefix, CCM infers the target composition coordinate and deploys a single merged checkpoint for the remaining rollout. We evaluate CCM on the reaction--diffusion system, viscosity-parameterized two-dimensional Navier--Stokes equations, and radial dam-break dynamics. Across these benchmarks, CCM achieves its strongest gains in extrapolative regimes, reducing out-of-distribution rollout error relative to the family anchor by 54.2%, 42.8%, and 13.8%, respectively. Further experiments across FNO scales, a DPOT-style backbone, and ablations confirm that endpoint fine-tuning is not arbitrary checkpoint drift, but reveals a calibratable physical direction for training-free transfer across PDE regimes.

</details>


### [537] [Action-Inspired Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14631)
*Eshwar R. A.,Debnath Pal*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出动作启发生成模型（AGMs），通过轻量级可学习势函数Vφ在线评分桥接样本并加权漂移目标，在不增加推理开销的情况下提升桥接匹配方法的生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有桥接匹配方法对所有随机转移分配统一回归权重，忽略了样本是否位于结构连贯轨迹上，导致生成质量受限。

Method: 引入轻量级可学习标量势函数Vφ（参数仅占主漂移网络~1.4%），在线评分桥接样本并通过stop-gradient机制导出重要性权重来调制漂移目标，避免双网络间对抗反馈。

Result: 在保真度和覆盖度指标上持续提升生成质量，且推理时Vφ可完全丢弃，不增加任何计算开销。

Conclusion: 选择性惩罚非信息性传输路径能有效提升桥接匹配生成模型的性能，Vφ可作为即插即用模块增强现有训练流程。

Abstract: We introduce Action-Inspired Generative Models (AGMs), a dual-network generative framework motivated by the observation that existing bridge-matching methods assign uniform regression weight to every stochastic transition in the transport landscape, regardless of whether a given bridge sample lies along a structurally coherent trajectory or a degenerate one. We address this by introducing a lightweight learned scalar potential $V_φ$ that scores bridge samples online and modulates the drift objective via importance weights derived through a stop-gradient barrier -- preventing adversarial feedback between the two networks whilst preserving $V_φ$'s guiding signal. Crucially, $V_φ$ comprises only $\sim$1.4% of the primary drift network's parameter count, adds no overhead to the inference graph, and requires no iterative half-bridge fitting or auxiliary stochastic differential equation (SDE) solvers: it is a plug-and-play enhancement to any bridge-matching training loop. At inference, $V_φ$ is discarded entirely, leaving standard Euler-Maruyama integration of the exponential moving average (EMA) drift. We demonstrate that selectively penalising uninformative transport paths through the learned potential yields consistent improvements in generation quality across fidelity and coverage metrics.

</details>


### [538] [DeepTokenEEG Enhancing Mild Cognitive Impairment and Alzheimers Classification via Tokenized EEG Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15009)
*Thinh Nguyen-Quang,Minh Long Ngo,Ngoc-Son Nguyen,Nguyen Thanh Vinh,Huy-Dung Han,Bui Thanh Tung,Nguyen Quang Linh,Khuong Vo,Manoj Vishwanath,Hung Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了DeepTokenEEG，一种轻量级（仅0.29M参数）的EEG信号分类模型，利用时空tokenizer捕捉阿尔茨海默症的生物标志物，在274名受试者数据集上达到100%的最高准确率，优于现有方法1.41-15.35%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阿尔茨海默症的早期检测至关重要，但现有EEG诊断方法面临数据可用性有限、深度学习模型准确率不足以及专家解读耗时等挑战，需要一种轻量且高性能的解决方案。

Method: 设计了DeepTokenEEG模型，采用空间和时间tokenizer分别从时域和频域提取AD相关的生物标志物特征，模型参数量仅0.29M，确保轻量化部署。

Result: 在包含274名受试者（180例AD、94例健康对照）的联合数据集上，在特定频段达到100%的最高准确率，比现有最优方法提升1.41-15.35%。

Conclusion: DeepTokenEEG展示了轻量级模型在AD早期筛查中的潜力，其紧凑尺寸便于实际部署应用。

Abstract: The detection of Alzheimers disease (AD) is considered crucial, as timely intervention can improve patient outcomes. Electroencephalogram (EEG)-based diagnosis has been recognized as a non-invasive, accessible, and cost-effective approach for AD detection; however, it faces challenges related to data availability, accuracy of modern deep learning methods, and the time-consuming nature of expert-based interpretation. In this study, a novel lightweight and high-performance model, DeepTokenEEG, was designed for the diagnosis of AD and the classification of EEG signals from AD patients, individuals with other neurological conditions, and healthy subjects. Unlike traditional heavy-weight models, DeepTokenEEG ultilizes spatial and temporal tokenizer that effectively captures AD-related biomarkers in both temporal and frequency domain with only 0.29 million paramaters. Trained in a combined dataset of 274 subjects, including 180 AD cases, and 94 healthy controls, the proposed method achieves a maximum recorded accuracy of 100% on specific frequency bands, representing an improvement of 1.41-15.35% over state-of-the-art methods on the same dataset. These results indicate the potential of DeepTokenEEG for early detection and screening of AD, with promising applicability for deployment due to its compact size.

</details>


### [539] [Croissant Baker: Metadata Generation for Discoverable, Governable, and Reusable ML Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15079)
*Rafi Al Attrach,Rajna Fani,Sebastian Lobentanzer,Joan Giner-Miguelez,Debanshu Das,Varuni H. K.,Nobin Sarwar,Rajat Ghosh,Anwai Archit,Surbhi Motghare,Christina Conrad Parry,Luis Oala,Lara Grosso,Joaquin Vanschoren,Steffen Vogler,Sujata Goswami,Eric S. Rosenthal,Marzyeh Ghassemi,Matthew McDermott,Tom Pollard*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Croissant Baker，一个本地优先的开源命令行工具，能够直接从数据集目录生成经过验证的Croissant元数据，解决了受管控和大规模本地数据集无法上传到公共平台生成元数据的问题，在超过140个数据集上评估，与真实元数据的一致性达到97-100%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Croissant已成为机器学习数据集元数据标准，NeurIPS要求数据集提交必须包含Croissant元数据，但现有生成路径通常需要先将数据上传到公共平台，这对于受管控的大型本地数据集不可行。因此需要一种本地化的Croissant元数据生成工具。

Method: 开发了Croissant Baker，一个本地优先、开源的命令行工具，通过模块化处理器注册表直接从数据集目录生成经过验证的Croissant元数据（JSON-LD格式）。

Result: 在超过140个数据集上评估，可扩展到包含8.86亿行、374个Parquet文件的MIMIC-IV数据集。与生产者编写或标准派生的真实元数据相比，跨多个领域的一致性达到97-100%。

Conclusion: Croissant Baker有效解决了受管控和大规模本地数据集的Croissant元数据生成问题，实现了高准确度，推动了ML数据集可发现性和可重复性标准在更广泛场景下的应用。

Abstract: Croissant has emerged as the metadata standard for machine learning datasets, providing a structured, JSON-LD-based format that makes dataset discovery, automated ingestion, and reproducible analysis machine-checkable across ML platforms. Adoption has accelerated, and NeurIPS now requires Croissant metadata in every submission to its dataset tracks. Yet in practice Croissant generation usually starts with uploading data to a public platform, a path infeasible for governed and large local repositories that hold much of the high-value data ML increasingly relies on. We release Croissant Baker, a local-first, open-source command-line tool that generates validated Croissant metadata directly from a dataset directory through a modular handler registry. We evaluate Croissant Baker on over 140 datasets, scaling to MIMIC-IV at 886 million rows and 374 Parquet files.
